english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, onupɛ itsiɖi ɛlɛ abha ɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhuiɛ shuɔ pɔ, kiɖeso pɛ baka atɔnɔ miede? Nɛ Kibui ɛlɛ shuɔ, kibui kpa gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ butsi osiɛ shuɔ batsà odì akpɛ ɛlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: Nɛ banɔ alɛ gɛ beetũ ebuiɛ kpɛ shu xɔnɔɔ, ɛta pɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ balɛ xɔnɔ agã kidzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ̀ badɛ tsaɖà balɛishu flogo!

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, bekulu ɔnɔ asɛ nɔzã ishu ahɔɛ mɛ. Pɔ nɔtɛ lɔkɔ ɔnɔ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazãa lɔkɔ ɔgana kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, pɔ nɔplɛnɔ agɔlɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: Bebhui ɔshaa petee gulũi nɛ̀ ɔsha kɔkɔ tonikpo ɔlɛ ɔsɛ, “Dɛmɛ nɛ wɔhagbo asɛ gɛ ɔdɛmɛ nɛ wɔshu ana.”

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Onupɛ nɔ onemì agɔlɔ asɛ tɛ̀ novũ agɔlɔ mɛnɔ ana, nɔoɖi piapii onu gɛnɛ ana, noboyì agɔlɔ. Ɛkpã Zazãna Nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Nulũ

english_verse: If you are guided by the Spirit, you won't obey your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Kliso ɛɖɔ sɛ, nɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nulũ, kɛlɛ nɔzɔkɔ kpɛ same nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ebui kpa tɛpɛpɛ nɔ shu.

english_verse: The Spirit and your desires are enemies of each other. They are always fighting each other and keeping you from doing what you feel you should.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui kpa adɛmɛ nɔ agã ɔtɔ nɛ agɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ dɛmɛ nɔ shu, kɛlɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ tsyɛ ɔgã ɔtɔ nɛ kɛgɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui kpa adɛmɛ nɔ. Balɔɛtití nɛ bagɔlɔ shu, sɛ tɛ ɔtɛ bhɛtɛ kɛgɛ ɔpɛɛ nɔ.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Pɔ onupɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɔ gbanà wɔɔ, ɔma ɔshaa niesi.

english_verse: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
translation_verse: Ebuiɛ gɛ akpà ɔplɛnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ edzoɔ awɔ̃ɛ asɛ, ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ, atsɔ̃bui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã kpa tɛŋaŋã,

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: ibudi ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ banɔ tatã, anɔ nyanyana kpɛ ɛyamɛ, ebela pɛpɛɛ, kiwuhũ dzadzã, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ kpɛkpɛ, mɛ ɛyɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ̃, kibui esi malũ malu, kititì lɔlɔ nɛ agɔlɔ shu

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: nɛ̀ kawɔ̃kpɛ, bunù tibubuku, edzo kpa ede tɛtɔtɔnɔ, nɛ agɛ dzi asɛ alɛ nɛidi. Ɛkpɛ ɔnɔ ɔsha, asɛ gɛ ɛtɛ kpɛ bafala nɔ ɔsɛ, banɔ gɛ edzi nɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ nɛidiɛ batɛ bavɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ŋaŋãa mɛ.

english_verse: God's Spirit makes us loving, happy, peaceful, patient, kind, good, faithful,
translation_verse: Pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ eyuyuɔ yɛenu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, same mɔmɔ, ishu yɔyɔ, tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ, ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, kibui gbã tɛɖɔɖɔ,

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: ishu nyanyãnà, nɛ̀ ishu abha tɛŋaŋã. Ɔsha nanà ɔgɛnyã ebui alɛ nɛidi.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: Bagɛ enu Kristo Yesu ayɛ xɔnɔ, bakpalà balɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ badɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ bapɛ nɔ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Gɛ budzi nɛ ɛkpã nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔgã nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ kɔ buzi feke ɔlɔ ishu, tɛ bɔzɛ kpɛ bagɔlɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ̀ awɔ̃.

english_verse: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, onupɛ bevũ anɔ teli nɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, wɔnɔ bagɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ kpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛɛ, nɔohu buluhũ ɔkɔɛ nɛ kidzo gbangbã abha tɛ etsyina aba. Pɔ noɔlu awɔ̃ nɛishu, ɔsɛ tɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔtɛmɔ̃ tifefekeɖi ɛlɛ.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Nɔplɛnɔ agɔlɔ nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, nɔbɔ bhɛtɛ ɔtɔɖɔ Kristo yɛɔshaa nabha.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli eɖi asɛ enu kɛdɔ̃ tili pɔ ama kɛnanà mɛɛ, ishu yɛawɔɛ.

english_verse: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.
translation_verse: Anɔ ka nyia ka elu awɔ̃ eɖi yɛebui bhɛbhɛtɛ. Kɛlɛ abalà etũ yɛahɔɛ itelũ, gɛ atɛbà lɔkɔ yɛishu ashɔnɔ anɔ nanà,

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ ka nyia ka alɔkɔ yɛɔtɔ etuku.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ edenɔ Akaa nɛibuiɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ yɛ tsyɛ akɔ yɛadɔkasɛ amɔ ebui gbangbã edenɔ yɛɔkɔ.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛkɔ bawɔɛ ɔnɔ, ananà atɛba là akpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɔga. Kɛgɛ anɔ aɖaa, kɛlɛ yɛebe edzyinì.

english_verse: If you follow your selfish desires, you will harvest destruction, but if you follow the Spirit, you will harvest eternal life.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ aɖa bɔdɔ̃ sɛ tɛ eku yɛebui kpa gɛ abhɛtɛ nawɔ̃ɔ, denɔ kibui kpa ɛlɛ mɛɛ, ebedzyinì butsí, anunɔ gɛ aɖa bɔdɔ̃ sɛ tɛ eku Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ awɔ̃ɔ xɔnɔɔ, denɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛɛ, abamɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Kliso nɔtɛ kɔ bubotsò nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, ɔmɔsɛ kibè lɛ ɛbà gɛ bɔbà pɔ̃ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ onupɛ bɔgɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ shuɔ.

english_verse: We should help people whenever we can, especially if they are followers of the Lord. Final Warnings
translation_verse: Kliso, gɛ kibè lɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔbhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã kɔ anɔ ka nyia ka, asɛ bagɛ ede bayɛyɛkɛŋã eshopo mɛ ana. Gɛnɛ Kɛhɔ̃a Bhuibhui Pɔ Ebui Vɔvɔ Gɛ Babhɛbhɛtɛ

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Nɔoɖi bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ gbagbla ɛlɛ nɛidi gɛ ɛlɔkɔ fɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ ɔlɛ kɔ ɔnɔ nɛ mɛahɔɛ!

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Bagɛ eetũ ɛlɛ akpɛ ɔnɔ ulũ sɛ tɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ, benu bagɛ akasɛ ishu pɛ beetũ itelũ nɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui shu. Babhɛtɛ ana sɛ tɛ batɛkɔ batɔnɔ alɛ ede nɛ Kristo butsi osiɛ nɛtakpu.

english_verse: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
translation_verse: Bagɛ bebhui ahɔ̃a akɔ alɛ tsyɛ elo, batɛ abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ ɔshaa nabha, pɔ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ̀ betũ itelũ nɛ ɔnɔ ishu tɛlɔlɔkɔ kɔ alɛ sɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ shu.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Kɛnanà tɛkɔ mɛitũ mɛitelũ ɖi, ɔdɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛ butsi osiɛ shu ibui ete, gɛ ɔgana yɛabhaa bakpalà kanɔ nɔ̀ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu akɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ mɛtsyɛ kɔ kanɔ nɔ̀.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui nɛ̀ kɛhɔ̃a mabhui mabhui tinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà, kɛgɛ pɛɔdɛ kɛlɛinu ebui vɔvɔɔ gɛ babhɛtɛ.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Ishu yɔyɔ nɛ̀ ashagabui ɖiɖi ɔkɔ bagɛ alɛ idzo vɔvɔ ɛlɛ niedeɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ Israelanɛ gɛenu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ tsyɛ azã ɔsha ɔlɛ niesi.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔɛ nɔ, nɔtɛ ɔkɔ anɔ nanà akpɛ mɛ bɔtɔ, ɔmɔsɛ apɔ̃biɛ gɛ alɛ mɛishu akasɛ ɔsɛ inu Yesu ayɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ ɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ. Amen.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo gɛedzi anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Kristo Yesuɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ulũ, Mɛ sɛsɛ̀ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã nɛ Efeso pɛ bakpasɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ keplukpa alɛ,

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ. Ɔfɔfuĩa Mɛ Tiyuyula Nɛ Kristo Mɛ

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ bɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo Yɛakaa nɛinye nɛitití, anɔ gɛ alɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ tiyuyula ka nyia ɛdi gɛ kpasɛ Kristo mɛ eyula akɔ ɔlɔ odenɔ kititiɛ.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ sɛ bɔzã yɛ mɛ, flogo pɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ aba kpɛ esi, tɛ bɔlɔ shu dalɛ tɛ batɛ mɔ ibui zizĩ nanà nɛ ɔlɔ shu nɛ yɛamɛ. Nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛɛ,

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: atɛ tɔɖɔ ɛlɛ ɔsɛ ababhɛtɛ ɔlɔ akpɛ otugbà tɛ budzi asɛ yɛeyi alɛ ana ɔgana Yesu Kristo abha, nɛ yɛ tɛpɛpɛ nɛ̀ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ulũ,

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: ɔkɔ yɛinyeɛ tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibu dadalɛ gɛ alɔkɔ akɔ ɔlɔ kɛbhɛ mabuia mabuia ɔgana agɛ yɛadɛmɛ nɔ nabha.

english_verse: and by what Christ has done, God has shown us his own mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ akɔ butì ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ akpasɛ yɛ kibui gɛ apɛ, pɛ atɔɖɔ ɔganà Kristo abha,

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ akpɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ gɛ onupɛ kibeɛ bana sɛ tɛ laba alɛ mɛɛ, tɛ balɔkɔ ebuiɛ petee nɛititíɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa nabha akpɛ itsu tɛ lazã anɔ tenikpo esi, anɔ gɛenu Kristoɔ.

english_verse: God always does what he plans, and this is why he appointed Christ to choose us.
translation_verse: Yɛ mɛ bebu ɔlɔ tsyɛ, gɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ ababhɛtɛ ɔlɔ akpɛ otugbà nɛ yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ulũ, anɔ gɛ yɛawɔa axɔ̃ɛ sɛ labhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ kɛgɛ yɛatɔɖɔ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛapɛ ulũ,

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ ɔlɔ bagɛ idzì banɔ gɛeputɔ gɛ buɖì idzo mɛ ɔkɔ Kristoɔ, tɛ bɔzã ɔkɔ yɛishu dadalɛ tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛitití.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔkpasɛ Kristoɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nolũ kibuiɛ gɛinu kibui gbãa, kibui gbangbã gɛ yɛkɛ ɔnɔ lu nɛkpã. Gɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã soɔ, atsà kɛna ɔkɔ ɔnɔ elu pɛ balɔkɔ adadã edere ɔnɔ ulũ, nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ akɔ ɔnɔ,

english_verse: The Spirit also makes us sure we will be given what God has stored up for his people. Then we will be set free, and God will be honored and praised. Paul's Prayer
translation_verse: gɛenu kɛdɔ̃ gɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ ide ɔkɔ ɔlɔ kaŋãsiɛ odiyinɔ kibeɛ gɛ bebu bagɛ enu Owusoso Akaa yɛanunɔ ɔkɔ yɛ tɛdadalɛ kpɛkpɛ nɛitití. Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, odenɔ kibeɛ gɛ ilũ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Apaleteɛ Yesu abha nɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔkɔ banɔ dadalɛ petee nɔ,

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: ɛka yɔlɔ ahɔɛhuhu nɛ ɔnɔ ɛtakpu ɖi, nɛ̀ ɔnɔ tɛbabakà nɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ.

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: Itsiɖi ɛlɛ abha bisi sɛ tɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ, Akaa gɛ yɛishu dalɛ, sɛ akɔ ɔnɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bubutiɛ nɛ̀ kibui bubu kasɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔoti yɛ piapii ɔdɛ.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: Ikulu Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ebui mɛ adalɛ akɔ ɔnɔ etú mɛ awuhũɔ sɛ tɛ nɔotì tɛtɔtɔɖɔ nɔnɔ ɛtakpu so pɛ ekulu ɔnɔ, ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛ lɛ ɔkɔ kaŋãsi dadalɛ gɛakpɛ banɔ dadalɛ mɛ,

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: nɛ̀ yɛ ohumi hohoe nɔ gɛ batɛ balà lɔkɔ ashɔnɔ ɔnanà, ɔkɔ bɔlɔ bagɛ yɛkɛ aŋãa. Ohumi ɔlɛ odzi asɛ yɛ ohumi gbagbla nɔ gɛ alɔkɔ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɔ,

english_verse: when he raised Christ from death and let him sit at his right side in heaven.
translation_verse: gɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ Kristoɔ mɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ efeke yɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ pɛ alɔkɔ yɛ edzu yɛ kɛŋã ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ kitití bukusi ɔŋãkɔ,

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: gɛ bɔɖama ɔdɛ bukusi ŋaŋã nɛ̀ ɔsha ka nyia ka ɛdi, ohumi nɛ̀ banɔ abha ŋaŋã, nɛ̀ ɔzãkɔ inye ka nyia ka gɛ babalà akɔ, gɛnɛ obo kanɔ alɛ mɛ ete, pɔ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ gɛ kababáa mɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ kɛka nyia ka akpɛ yɛtsɛɖɛ esi, kɛlɛ ebú yɛ sɛ tɛ edzi kɛtakpu akɔ ɔhaa, ɔlɛ kɛka nyia ka

english_verse: The church is the body of Christ and is filled with Christ who completely fills everything.
translation_verse: gɛinu yɛishu dzyaa, nɛ̀ yɛishuɔ petee gɛ alɔkɔ eyuku kɛka nyia ka mɛ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ xɔnɔɔ, notitsí ɔbɔ fala nɛ wɔnɔ kesi tata nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ,

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: gɛ alɛ mɛ nɔtɛ zã oɖi nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔkpà tɔnɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ edzoɔ nɛ̀ agɛ yɛaŋã bukusi nɛ bukusi ɔpã gɛ kpasɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ nɔ mɛ, ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɔɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ otsiɛ nɛ batɔ̃ gagalĩ eleteɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ petee tsyɛ tɛzã balɛishi ɖi nɛ kibè tili gɛ bafala, pɛ bɔzɛ kpɛ samè nɛ bɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, kɛlɛ bɔzɛ pɛedzo alɛ pɛ bɔɔ bhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ alɛishu. Asɛ gɛ banɔ gɔgɔ̃ɔ aza bhɛtɛɛ, budzi banɔ gɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpa ɔzã bɔlɔ mɛ.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: akɔ bɔmɔ ɛkpã ɔplɛnɔ Kristo nɛ kibeɛ gɛ butsí nɛ bɔlɔ esi tata mɛ, ashagabui ɖiɖi so pɛ bebu ɔlɔ.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa efeke ɔlɔ aplɛnɔ Kristo kɛlɛ alɔkɔ ɔlɔ adɛzã esi ɔplɛnɔ yɛishu nɛ kititì bukusi ɔŋãkɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ,

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ nɛ agɔɔ gɛ lababaa mɛɛ, aba kasɛ yɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛ batɛ balà alɔkɔ shɔnɔ bɔnanà ɔgana tibhui bhuibu mɛ, gɛ akasɛ nɛ yɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ tibhui bhuibu shu so pɛ bebu ɔlɔ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, kɛlɛ kɛgi de wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, pɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛdɔ kɔkɔ kinu,

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: gɛnɛ wɔnɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, sɛ tɛ ananà atɛ befeke yɛishu.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ ɛdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ bunu, gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ sɛ tɛ bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gbangbã, gɛ Owusoso Akaa eputɔ abalɛ elu akɔ ɔlɔ sɛ bɔbhɛtɛ. Budzì Tenikpo Nɛ Kristo Mɛ

english_verse: Don't forget that you are Gentiles. In fact, you used to be called “uncircumcised” by those who take pride in being circumcised.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, nɔ bakà ɔsɛ kuku ibeɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ bamɔ́ ɔnɔ pɛ nɔotinu Yudanɛ pɛ beze kulu ɔnɔ asɛ “bagɛ begi bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ” banɔ alɛ gɛ ezekulu ishu asɛ “kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui”

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: nɔ bakà ɔsɛ nɛ kibe ɛlɛ, bebu ɔnɔ ɔtɔ nɛ Kristo shu, kɛlɛ bebu ɔnɔ ɔtɔ sɛ nɔma Israelanɛ nɛ̀ befuɔ balɛ olugbũnyanyã gɛ batɔɖɔ eluɔ mɛ, gɛ otugbà mɛ ɖiɖi nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa agɛzã bɔlɔ ahɔɛ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Pɔ otsi alɛ xɔnɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛɛ, wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔtɛ zã kitsí oɖiɛɛ, bagbana ɔnɔ ɔplɛnɔ ɔgana Kristo yɛ dzyosu nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ yɛenu ɔlɔ ishu yɔyɔɔ, gɛ abhɛtɛ ɔlɔ ediɛ taabha budzi tenikpo kɛlɛ ezĩ kɛgi bhui bɔlɔ ishiɛɛ, gɛinu kigiliɛ gɛ mana kishi zizĩɛ,

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ebu ɔsha gɛ ɔlɛ mɛ yɛazã nɛ ishudzyaa mɛ nɛ̀ ɔlɛ ɛkɔɔ eyinɔ. Yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ kɛlɛinu sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ yɛishu anɔ vɔvɔ tenikpo odenɔ banɔ taabha mɛ, sɛ tɛ amana ishu yɔyɔ,

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: nɛ ishudzya ɛlɛ bedzì tinikpo mɛ, sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ alɛ taabha tenikpo ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔgana butsi osi nabha, gɛ ɔlɛ abha yɛetsí pɛ ebu kishi zizĩɛ.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Aba ɖɔ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ebui etseɖe wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔzã odzlolo ɔkɔ, pɛ aɖɔ ishu yɛyɔyɔ ebui etseɖe bagɛ etso aplɛnɔ yɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ ɔgana yɛabha bɔlɔ ediɛ taabha mɔ kidzo ɔvɛ Akaa ɔkɔ ɔganà ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo mɛ.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, nɔ otikonu bededeba alo beefù, pɔ nɔonu Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔpãmɛ ayɛ,

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: gɛ bedzu atɔɖɔ banɔkpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɔ balɛ ebui nabha, ɔplɛnɔ Kristo Yesuɔ gɛ yɛenu odekrekpu ɛklagbu hohoeɛ.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɛabha babhɔ buvũɔ atɔ̃ atsà, pɛ buwu kabha pɛ bɔba dzì Akaavũɔ gɛ bɔlɛ shu dalɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ yɛmɛ babhɔ ɔnɔ tsyɛ akpɛ itsù sɛ tɛ nɔodzì ɔzãkɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa abazã nɛ̀ yɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ.

english_verse: Christ Jesus made me his prisoner, so I could help you Gentiles.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, mɛ Paulo, gɛinu buvũazazã ɔkɔ Kristo Yesu nɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔotinu Yudanɛ ɛtakpu-.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ nɔolũ Owusoso Akaa yɛ tibhui bhuibu ɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ akɔ mɛ akɔ ɔnɔ,

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: gɛ kɛlɛinu, kibui kpukpũɔ gɛ bebu akasɛ mɛ, asɛ gɛ ɛtɛ fɔnɔ lu gulũi nɔ.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Denɔ kibui ɛlɛ tɛkaklà mɛ, nɔobolũ mɛibui ɛlɛ mɛ piapi nɛ Kristo yɛebui kpukpũɔ shu,

english_verse: No one knew about this mystery until God's Spirit told it to his holy apostles and prophets.
translation_verse: kibui gɛ begi bu akasɛ banɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛtɛ bafala mɛ, asɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ obu ɛlɛ ɔkasɛ Owusoso Akaa anɔkpɛkpɛ dadalɛ nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɔ.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Kibui kpukpũ ɛlɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ ɔgana kibui gbangbã nabha, bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ abamɔ̃ kaŋãsiɛ ɔplɛnɔ Israel, gɛ bebedzi banɔ tenikpo gɛede ishudzya tinikpo mɛ, nɛ̀ banɔ gɛ aba yɛkɛ ɔdɔ̃ itsù nɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ lu nulũ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Ɛbadzì axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ akɔ mɛ ɔganà yɛohumi nɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: Gɛ mɛinu anɔ bhlui ɔdɛ nɛ bagɛ edzì bhlui nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ petee ishi tsyɛ elo, mɛ ɛyɛkɛ tibhui bhui ebu ɛlɛ, sɛ tɛ mɛɖɔ Kristo ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛ ɔtɛ bɔmɔ nɛ ɔkɔ nanà ibui otseɖe bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ,

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: nɛ̀ tɛ mɛ dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ kpukpũ ɛlɛ gɛ asɛ agɔ kpekpè nɛ alɛ bekpũ ɛlɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛabhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka.

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: Yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ kɛlɛ idzì ɔsɛ otsiɛ nɔ, ɔgana ɔha nabhaa, kɛlɛ sɛ bebu Owusoso Akaa bubutiɛ gɛ bukpè tɔɖɔɔ ɔkasɛ bekusiɛ nɛ̀ ihumi eleteɛ nɛ kititì ɔdɔ̃ mɛ,

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: nɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ ɔkɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔ, gɛ abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ebeke ɔgana Kristo Yesu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Nɛ yɛ mɛ̀, nɛ̀ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ yɛabha, bɔba là tso plɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ lulu mɛ.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Ibisi denɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ sɛ, nɔotì yi idè nɛ mɛ bɔtɔ gɛ ɛtɔ nɛ ɔnɔ shuɔ, gɛ bɔlɛinu wɔnɔ ishu dadalɛ. Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu Ɔkɔ Efesoanɛ

english_verse: I kneel in prayer to the Father.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ idzu ekluisi esi nɛ Akaa namɛ,

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: ganà anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛabha yɛeshopo alɛ petee, nɛititíɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa ayɛkɛ balɛ inyeɛ.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: Ikulu Owusoso Akaa asɛ odenɔ yɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ dadalɛ mɛɛ, tɛ akɔ nɔ gagalĩ nɛ̀ yɛohumi nɔ ɔgana yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔlɛ ɔnɔ mɛ,

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ Kristo azã wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. Kɛlɛ ikulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ igu tɛ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gagalĩ,

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: tɛ ohumi ɔzã wɔnɔ ahɔɛ, ɔplɛnɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã petee, tɛ nɔ nyana kana gɛ Yesu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ anɔ dzeɛ pɛ kɛɖama pɛ kidzuɔ gɛinu Kristoɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ovunɔ,

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ nɔoti tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɛlɛ gɛ dɛ kibui titì-ɔsɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa oyuku wɔnɔ mɛ piapii nɛ yɛ kɛlɛɛ gɛ alɛɛ nulũ.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: ishu dadalɛ ɔkɔyɛ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ, nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu mɛ ɔgana kibeɛ petee gɛ babaa mɛ, odenɔ tihɔɔ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ! Amen.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Asɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ azazã ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ anaa, ɛkpalà ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔzã nɛ ɛkpã nɔnɔ gɛ shɔnɔ tikukuluɔ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ nulũ.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Nɔ ozhinì ishu esi tɛ nɔ nyanà ishu ovunɔ piapii, nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ, tɛ nɔmɔ̃ ɔtɔ mɛ kɔ agɔlɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Nɔgã kidzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ nɔzã tenikpo nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ ɔgana ishu yɔyɔ gɛ nyanà ɔnɔ ovunɔɔ mɛ.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: Ishudzya tinikpo nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo ɔlɔ lɛ, asɛ kana gɛ bekulu ɔnɔ akɔ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi tinikpo nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bekulu ɔnɔ.

english_verse: We have only one Lord, one faith, and one baptism.
translation_verse: Apalete tenikpo, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tinikpo, bulĩkpɛkpɛ tunikpo,

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa tenikpo gɛenu Akaa ɔkɔ aka nyia aka, anɔ gɛ adɛ alɛ petee, pɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔgana alɛ petee mɛ, kɛlɛ kpasɛ yɛanɔ nɔ̀ petee mɛ.

english_verse: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
translation_verse: Pɔ bɔlɔ mɛ anɔ ka nyia ka, akɔ yɛ tibhui bhuibu asɛ kana gɛ Kristo ayá ɛlɛ akɔ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ so pɛ kibuiɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Kibeɛ gɛ ewu avɛ kititíɛ faa nɔ, agbana bagɛ awɔ keyuɔ aplɛnɔ yɛishu kɛlɛ akɔ banɔ ɔdɔ̃

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: (Gɛ “ewu avɛ” kɛlɛ esi enu ɔsɛ ezhi aba kesiɛ gɛenu kesiakpa nabha tsyɛ dza?

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ yɛezhi abaa esiɛ, yɛenu agɛ yɛewu avɛ faã ɔdɛ kitití ɛzãkɔ petee sɛ tɛ eyuku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ.)

english_verse: so his people would learn to serve and his body would grow strong.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ babalɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa anunɔ akɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa nɛ̀ axɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ, sɛ tɛ babhɔ Kristo yɛishudzyaa ewunɔ kabha

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: odiyinɔ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ petee tɔnɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ kibuititiɛ mɛ pɛ bushè, pɛ bɔlɔ tɛzazã petee tsyinà gɛ ná nɛ Kristo mɛ.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ bɔza kazã asɛ bunuvɔɛ ana, pɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ka nyia ka ɛdi bazi fù ɔlɔ falanɔ ɔvɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ ɔmana ɛkɛlɛ̀ nɛ̀ banɔdzyrame bɔshɛ nɛ̀ banɔ wɔɛwɔɛ edzoɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ eluɔ shu.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Pɔ bɔɖɔ kibui gbã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, bɔbà shè nɛ ebuiɛ petee mɛ nɛ Kristo anɔ gɛinu ɔlɔ ɛtakpuɔ mɛ.

english_verse: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
translation_verse: Odenɔ yɛ mɛɛ, ishudzya petee, tsà pɛ bazɛɛ anyanã ɛlɛ ovunɔ, pɛ bushè pɛ lɛbhɔ ishu utɔɖɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, asɛ kɛwɔa gɛ kawɔ̃pɛ ka nyia ka awɔa kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛ ana. Anɔ Ɛkpã Zazãna Nɛ Kanɔ Dadalɛ Mɛ

english_verse: As a follower of the Lord, I order you to stop living like stupid, godless people.
translation_verse: Kliso itseɖe ɔnɔ ibui ɛlɛ, pɛ ɛɛtɔɖɔ̀ ɛklagbu nɛ ɛlɛ abha nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, nɔtɛɔkɔ zã nɛkpã asɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ, nɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ ama kɛnanà mɛ.

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: Balɛ ebui esi lulũɔ mɛ eku otumũ, kɛlɛ bebu ishu ɔtɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛkpã shu, nɛ kibui matì matiɛ gɛ kpasɛ alɛ mɛ, nɛ gɛ bagagalĩ balɛ etúɔ mɛ so.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛlɛ mɛ sɛ nɔolũ yɛɔdɔ̃, kɛlɛ bakasɛ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ yɛ mɛ, nɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nɛ Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Bakasɛ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃, nɛ ɛkpã gɛ nɔtɛ zã ɔbɔ falanɔ shu, sɛ tɛ nɔ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ edzo kukuɔ shu, edzoɔ gɛedzì ebui zizĩ ɔganà alɛ anɔ wɔɛwɔɛ gɛ badɛmɛ nabha,

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ babhɛtɛ edzo alɛ avɔvɔ nɛ ebui gɛ alɛ ɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ,

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ nɔodzinì ishu ɔbhɔ avɔvɔ, gɛ babhɛtɛ ɔnɔ sɛ nɔzã asɛ Owusoso Akaa ana nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ asɛnɛ sɛsɛ shu, tɛ aɖɔ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ otseɖe yɛɔhagbo, ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ petee kpasɛ ishudzya tunikpo mɛ.

english_verse: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
translation_verse: “Tɛbhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ wɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ mɛ”. Tɛkɔ kiwui dɔ nɛ wɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ mɛ,

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ tɛkɔ abosam ɔtsɛɖɛ odzukɔ nanà.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Agɛ yɛezuruɔ, ayɔlɔ yɛuzĩɛ gɛ ezuruɔ, pɔ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ, tɛ alɔkɔ yɛahɔɛ aza bhɛtɛ kibui tili gɛbà plɛnɔ, sɛ tɛ amɔ kɛdɔ̃ tili akɔ bagɛ apɛ ɛdɔ̃.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ kɔ kibui kpa nanà de koeyi nɛ ɔnɔ olugbũɔ mɛ oɖi, pɔ kɛgɛ ba plɛnɔ pɛ nɔ bɔbhɔ babhlatɔ ɔtɔɖɔ nɛ kɛpɛɛ gɛ bapɛ ulũ, tɛ kɛkɔ sɛ bagɛ elũ kibuiɛ amɔ kibui tili edenɔ ɛlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ nɔtɛ kɔ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔmɔ̃ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, gɛ ɔlɛ balɔkɔ adã ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ elu nɔ, odiyinɔ kiwuiɛ gɛ bebè bu ɔnɔ.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Nɔobu ishu mɛ pɔpɔɛ, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ nɛ̀ ɔmɔpɔɛ, banɔ kwɔakwɔala nɛ̀ olugbũ edzi gagã, banɔ shu zizĩ ka nyia ka ɛdi nɛ wɔnɔ ɛshi.

english_verse: Instead, be kind and merciful, and forgive others, just as God forgave you because of Christ.
translation_verse: Nɔbhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, nɔlɔkɔ kibui otsye agɔlɔ, asɛ kana gɛ ɔgana Kristo mɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ etsye ɔnɔ.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Nɔkpasɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛkpã, asɛ bunuvɔɛ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ ana,

english_verse: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: tɛ nɔzã nɛ ɛkpã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ Kristo adɛmɛ ɔlɔ ɛbui pɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ asɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛɛlɔ̃ huhuhu nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ, kɛma sɛ tɛ belũ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ shu, alo atsɔ̃bui ka nyia ka ɛdi shu, alo anɔ gɛ apɛɛ kɛdɔ̃ gbagbla adɛ, ɔmɔsɛ ebui alɛ agɛpɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ dadalɛ.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ zɔɖɔ atsɔ̃bui nɛ̀ bɔga ebui nɛ̀ kaɖɔ gɛ kama kalɛ ɔzãkɔ, pɔ nɔlɔkɔ ahɔɛ huhu ɔkɔ Akaa.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shuɔɔ, nɔ ɔbɔ ɔtɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ ɛlɛ abha ɔsɛ, ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ, ishu madalɛ madalɛ alo anɔ gɛ apɛɛ ɛdɔ̃ akɔ yɛ ete shu, anɔ alɛ nɛidi enu obudi elete, kɛlɛ atɛ bamɔ kaŋãsiɛ galɛ Kristo nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ɔŋãkɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛkɔ ananà awɔɛ ɔnɔ nɛ ebui gɛ lama alɛ mɛ shu, ɔmɔsɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi shu Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔba bagɛ etielũ atɔ̃ nabha.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nɔtɛ kpɛ alɛ ɔha.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nɔ tɛzã otumũ mɛ oɖi, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔɔ nɔonu tɛdadalɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. Nɔzã nɛ ɛkpã asɛ bunuvɔɛ gɛ balɛ amɛ adalɛ ana

english_verse: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
translation_verse: tɛ nɔ pɛɛ kɛgɛ ikù Apaleteɛ sameɛ,

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ kpɛ ɔhɔɛ nɛ otumũ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɔnɔ gɛ kɛnanà ma alɛ mɛ mɛ̀, pɔ nɔobu alɛ ɔkasɛ boŋ.

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kiwũi ibui kinu tsyɛ ɔsɛ tɛ baɖɔ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ bagɛ etie lũ atɔ̃ abhɛtɛ nɛ tikpukpũ mɛ.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Pɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ tɛdadalɛ bu kasɛɛ, kidzi kɛdɔ̃ gɛ baamɔ̃,

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ kiwuiɛ kɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ bamɔ̃ kɛka nyia ka. Kliso pɛ baɖɔ asɛ, “Nyɛmɛ, O wɔ agɛ ɔɔdɔ̀ taɖaa, lɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ Kristoɔ aba tsé kifu atɔɖɔ wɔabha.”

english_verse: Act like people with good sense and not like fools.
translation_verse: Nɔoɖi piapii nɛ kana gɛ nɔodzinɔ wɔnɔ ɛkpã shu-nɔtɛ zã asɛ bagɛ etinyi ibui, pɔ asɛ bagɛ enyi ibui ana,

english_verse: These are evil times, so make every minute count.
translation_verse: tɛ nɔwɔa kibè ka nyia ka shu axɔ̃ɛ piapii, ɔmɔsɛ ewuiɛ enu ewui kpa.

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nɔotidzì bawɔaga, pɔ nɔolũ kɛgɛ Apaleteɛ apɛɛ asɛ ɔbhɛtɛ.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛwɔɛ bunu obuku, kɛdɔ̃ gɛ gbana anɔ kpɛ same mɔmɔ falanɔ ɛfú mɛ. Pɔ nɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ zã ɔnɔ mɛ.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Nɔɖɔ kaɖɔ kpɛ agɔlɔ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ ɛdzɛ zhazhã nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ɛdzɛ zhazhã. Nɔzhã ɛdzɛ odenɔ ɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ,

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: tɛ nɔozohu Owusoso Akaa gɛ enu Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia ibe ɔkɔ kɛka nyia ka, nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo inyeɛ mɛ.

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Banyɛ edzinì mɔ, nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ enyine alɛ asɛ gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ ana.

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ adzɛ enyineɛ yɛenu kɛtakpu ɔkɔ yɛedzinì asɛ kana gɛ Kristo tsyɛ enu kɛtakpu akɔ ɔhaa ana, yɛishu dzyaa, gɛ bɔlɛishu yɛenu agɛ Yɛebu ɔlɔ.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Badzɛ enyine, nɔ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ edzinì alɛ, asɛ kana gɛ Kristoɔ tsyɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ɔhaa pɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ nɛ ɔlɛ takpuɔ ana,

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ tɛ ɔlɛ ishuɔ dalɛ nɛ tipuplu nɛ̀ ɔlɛ tiwuwulu nɔ nɛ̀ bulĩ ɔganà kibuiɛ mɛ,

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ ɔlɛ akɔ yɛishu asɛ ɔha gɛ lootséɛ, tɛ kibo, ishupi bɔbɔlɔ alo kihututũ nanà tɛzã ɔlɛ shu, pɔ tɛ lɔdalɛ tɛ batɛ mɔ bamɛ tsitsí nana nɛ ɔlɛ shu.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abhaa, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ baadzɛ enyine tsyɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ balɛ edzini alɛ asɛ balɛ ahɔɛ ishupi ana. Anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛedziniɛ, adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛishu.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: nɛ alɛ petee edeɛ, ananà aka nyanà yɛishupiɛ akpɛ ɛyamɛ eɖi, pɔ akɔ yɛishu bɔŋaŋã pɛ eɖi ɔlɛ abha, asɛ kana gɛ kristo tsyɛ abhɛtɛ ɔhaa,

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ bunu yɛishudzya nɔ wɔpɛ̃.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: “Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu so anyɛ aba shɛ nɛ yɛakaa nɛ̀ yɛelĩɛ ɔbha, pɛ aba dɛ bhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ yɛedzinì, kɛlɛ balɛ taabha ebedzi ishudzya tunikpo.”

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: Kibui gikpũ pɛ kɛlɛ mɛ dzú nɛ ɛlɛ, pɔ ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ Kristo nɛ̀ ɔhaa shu.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Pɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka tsyɛ adɛmɛ nɛ̀ yɛedzinì asɛ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛishu ana, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ anyɛ edziniɛ akpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ yɛinyineɛ.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Bunuvɔɛ nɔ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ elĩ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ akaa alɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kibui ɛlɛ pɛ̃.

english_verse: and you will have a long and happy life.”
translation_verse: “sɛ tɛ apɛ̃ kɔ wɔ tɛ ɔmɔ ɛkpã dzlolo nɛ kesiakpa nabha.”

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Beyiaka mɔ, nɔtɔ kpɛ wɔnɔ eyi alɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ, pɔ, nɔnyɔnɔ alɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ nulũ. Banɔ Dzidzì Nɛ Bapalete

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Banɔ dzidzi mɔ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ esiakpa abha apaleteɛ nɛ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kifu sisi mɛ, nɛ wɔnɔ etú dadalɛ mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ nobolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ Kristo ana.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Nɔotilũ atɔ̃ kɔ alɛ sɛ tɛ noku balɛ awɔ̃ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ balɛ awuhũɔ etsiɖi wɔnɔ abha ete, pɔ asɛ banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ Kristo ana, tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ odenɔ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi nɛ̀ wɔnɔ etúɔ nyɔ̃ɔ, asɛ gɛ onupɛ Apaleteɛ nɔkpɛ̀ ketakpu esi ɔkɔ ana, gɛnɛ banɔ,

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ aba buia kɛbhɛ̃ akɔ aka nyia aka ɔkɔ kɛgbangbã ka nyia ka ɛdi gɛ abhɛtɛɛ, gɛ onu ɔnɔ dzidzi alo ishu ahɔɛmɛ azazã elete yɛenu tsyɛ.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ wɔnɔ bapaleteɛ tsyɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ banɔ dzidziɛ nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha. Nɔtɛ kpɛ alɛ ɛkpã ifù, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ agɛ yɛenu wɔnɔ Apaleteɛ nɛ̀ balɛ ayɛ alɛititíɛ, kɛlɛ yɛetiɖi banɔ amɛ. Owusoso Akaa Ɔɖa Akpɛkpɛ Gɛ Balɔkɔ Epo Ishu Nɔ

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔɛ nɔ, nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ, nɛ̀ yɛohumi nɔ gɛɔdɛ.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Nɔlɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔɖa akpɛkpɛ gɛ nɔlɔkɔ po ishu nɔ ɔkpɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔlà zã abosam ebui tɔtɔɖɔ nulũ.

english_verse: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ bɔtɛ tà keyù nɛ̀ ishupi nɛ̀ dzyosu, pɔ nɛ̀ beekusi, nɛ̀ ɔshaeleteɛ, nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛ otumũ mɛ ihumi nɔ gɛ ɛŋã kabha, nɛ̀ ɛfɔfuĩa gagalĩ zizĩɛ nɛ kititì ɔdɔ̃ mɛ.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, nɔ lɔkɔ wɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔɖa akpɛkpɛ ɔdɔ̃ petee gɛ nɔlɔkɔ opo ishu nɔɔ ɔkpɛ, sɛ tɛ onupɛ ewui zizĩ ebekuɔ, nɔ bɔlà ɔtsyɔa etelũ nɛ alɛ, kɛlɛ onupɛ ewui alɛ abafalaa, nobo wlui ɔzã gagalĩ.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nɔzã gagalĩ, tɛ nɔ lɔkɔ kibui gbã atsatsà tɔɖɔ ɔnyã kashɛ nɔ, ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔ kitemɛ ɔɖaa akpɛkpɛ gɛ yɛishu kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔkpɛ ɔtɔɖɔ yɛɔzãkɔ

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: nɛ̀ tɛ wɔnɔ tsɛɖɛ zã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ nɛ kibui gbangbã gɛ mana ishu yɔyɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: Ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ ebui alɛ petee nɔ, nɔ lɔkɔ ɔɖaɛtɛ̃ gɛinu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, gɛ ɛlɛ nɔbɔ lɔkɔ olĩ ɔpɔ̃ɛ ifuɔ gɛide anɔ zizĩɛ ɔkɔ ɔbaa.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: Nɔ lɔkɔ ɔɖaɛkutuɔ gɛ yɛkɛ ɔkɔ anɔ ovunɔ, nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bɛtɛ̀ɛ, gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ.

english_verse: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ nɔokulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ kibe nyia be nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu nɛ̀ tibibisi ka nyia ka ɛdi. Gɛ alɛ akpasɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpuɔ mɛ soɔ, nɔzã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ tɛ nɔzã Owusoso Akaa tikukulu abha ɔkɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã petee.

english_verse: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
translation_verse: Nɔ okulu Owusoso Akaa kɔ mɛ tsyɛ, sɛ tɛ onupɛ ɛdalɛ mɛolugbũɔ, babàkɔ mɛ ebui ɖɔɖɔ sɛ tɛ ɛdalɛ kibui kpukpũɔ gɛ kpasɛ kibui gbangbã mɛ kifù masi masi,

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: gɛ kɛlɛ so pɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ inyè mɛ pɛ ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahui mɛ. Nɔokulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ ɛlà dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ kifù masi masi mɛ asɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɛbhɛtɛ. Tɛsɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: Ishuyɔyɔ ɔkɔ badzyaa, nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔplɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã odenɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Tibhui bhuibuɔ zã ]plɛnɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔ dɛmɛ nɔ ɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛlɛ tihɔɔ nɔ.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Timoteo, gɛenu Kristo Yesu yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ, Balɛ asɛsɛ banɔ dadalɛ pete eplukpa nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ nɛ Filipi, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ ɛsofo nɔ nɛ̀ ɛzãkɔ bhlui eleteɛ,

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ ɔkɔ. Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: Ihu mɛ Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be gɛ onupɛ ɛbaka wɔnɔ ɛbui.

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: Nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukuluɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ petee mɛɛ, ikulu yɛ nɛ̀ same kibe nyia be

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: nɛ wɔnɔ ɔha axɔ̃ɛ nɛ̀ kibui gbangbã mɛ odenɔ kiwuiɛ gɛiputɔ nabha ɔlɔkɔ mana otsiɛ,

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: gɛ ilù awɔ̃ nɛ ibui ɛlɛ abha soɔ, inyi sɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛakpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã tɛwɔawɔa esi nɛ ɔnɔ, abavɛ ɛlɛ abha ɔdɛ tɔ̃ nɛ Kristo Yesu kiwui nabha.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: Kɛpɛ̃ ɔkɔ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ kibui ɛlɛ zã mɛ mɛ̀ nɛ wɔnɔ petee shu, gɛ wɔnɔ ibui gbangbã kpasɛ mɛitúɔ mɛ so, ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahui mɛ alo ibu ishu ulũ alo pɛ ɛtɔɖɔ ɛklagbu nɛ ɛlɛ abha tsyɛ, wɔnɔ petee ɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ ɔplɛnɔ mɛ.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa abalà dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ kana gɛ ɛpɛ sɛ mɔ̃ ɔnɔ nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛlɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: I pray that your love will keep on growing and you will fully know and understand
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ́ɛ kɛlɛinu mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu ɔsɛ, tɛ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ kpè tɔɖɔ nɛ kibui titì nɛ̀ ebui esi lulũɔ gɛedzuɔ mɛ,

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ nɔlà mɔ kɛgɛ pɛ̃ɔdɛ pɛ kɛlɛishu dalɛ pɛ bamɛ tsitsí ama ɛlɛ shu ɔvɛnɔ Kristo yɛiwuiɛ nabha.

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ busi eyuyuɔ gɛ agã Yesu Kristo abha eyuku ɔnɔ mɛ, tɛ kidzi ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa. Paulo Ɛɖahuimɛ Zazã Kɔ Kibui Gbangbã Vɛ Otugba

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, otsiɛ nɔ, ɛpɛɛ sɛ nɔotì ɔsɛ kɛgɛ ba mɛabha kɛlɛ vɛnɔ kibui gbangbã nɛ Otugba.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɛlɛ shu soɔ, kɛlɛ mɛ badãlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ epo ekusiupã petee nɛ̀ aka nyia aka tsyɛ sɛ, ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahui mɛ ɔkɔ Kristo.

english_verse: Now most of the Lord's followers have become brave and are fearlessly telling the message.
translation_verse: Nɛ mɛ ɛɖahui ɛlɛ mɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ soɔ, kɛkpɛ badzya gelee gɛ akpasɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ emi ɔsɛ tɛ baɖɔ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ nɛ kité kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kifu masi masi mɛ.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ, beteli aɖɔ Kristo ibuiɛ nɛ kiwuhũ dzadzã nɛ̀ kabhã wɔawlɔ̃akɛ mɛ, pɔ teli xɔnɔ̃ aɖɔ ɛlɛ ɔganà kibui gbangbã mɛ.

english_verse: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
translation_verse: Banɔ ebelũ ɛlɛ mɛ kidegba nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, bakpɛ mɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ̀ asɛ tɛ mɛba wlɔ̃akɛ kibui gbangbã nɛtakpu.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: Bagɛ eti putɔɔ, balɛ aɖɔ Kristo ibuiɛ ɔkɔ balɛ ishu tɛpɛpɛ̃, kigi de balɛ etúɔ mɛ, pɔ babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana asɛ tɛ bakɔ mɛmɔ buluhũ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Pɔ kiɖuwoe kɛbhɛtɛɛ dza? Kɛgɛ pɛ ɔdɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abhaa, onupɛ kinu asɛnɛ ibui tɛtɔtɔɖɔ pɛnɔsɛ kibui gbã tsyɛ elo, baɖɔ Kristo ibuiɛ. Kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ ɛmɔ sameɛ. Ee, ɛbazã ɛlɛ abha zɛmɔ sameɛ,

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ inyi sɛ ganà wɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu nɛ̀ tɛpɛplɛnɔ gɛ Yesu Kristo ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkɔ mɛɛ, kɛgɛ ba mɛabha batsyina dzì mɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛ lu nɛ ɛkpã.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Iɖi idzo mɛ gagalĩi pɛ ilu awɔ̃ sɛ ɛtɛ bà ŋã kiwũi nɛidzo nanà abha, pɔ ɛba mɔ̃ kemì kpɛkpɛ gelee, sɛ tɛ otsiɛ nɔ gɛ babà zakpɛ̀ Kristo inyeɛ nɛitití nɛ mɛ mɛ̀, kɛbà gã ɛkpã mɛ alo butsì mɛ tsyɛo.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Nɛ mɛ awɔ̃pɛ mɛɛ, Kristo mɛ lɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã ɔkɔ kɛlɛ onupɛ its’ tsyɛɛ, ɛbamɔ kɛdɔ̃ tili.

english_verse: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
translation_verse: Onupɛ ɛbazã nɛ̀ ɛkpãa nɛ ishudzya mɛɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbadzi busi eyuyu gbangbã ɔkɔ mɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. Pɔ kiɖuwoe mɛbà lɔkɔ dza? Itinyi!

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Ɛkpasɛ alɛ taabha nɛishi, ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛshɛ dɛzã Kristo ɔbha, gɛpɛ̃ ɔdɛ,

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Gɛ ilũ kibui ɛlɛ esi soɔ, inyi sɛ ɛbazã ishupiɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbavɛ ɛlɛ abha plɛnɔ ɔnɔ petee nɛ ɔnɔ otugbà vɛvɛ nɛ̀ same mɔmɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ,

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ onupɛ ɛzɛba wɔnɔ ɔbhaa, wɔnɔ same mɔmɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ ebeyì agbagbà nɛ mɛ ɛtakpu.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Kɛka nyia ka gɛzɛ ba ɛlɛ mɛ tsyɛ elo, nɔ nyanà ishu ovunɔ nɛ kidzo nɔnɔ abha gɛba shɔnɔ Kristo yɛibui gbangbã. Kɛlɛ edzì asɛ ɛba sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ ɔnɔ alo tɛ mɛilũ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛma wɔnɔ ɔbha tsyɛ elo, ɛbatì sɛ nɔodzi gagalĩi nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo mɛ, pɛ nɔbɔ dɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ asɛ anɔ tenikpo ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: gɛ kifù nanà tɛbà yi ɔnɔ ɔganà idzo nanà abha nɛ bagɛ alɔɛtití nɛ ɔnɔ shuɔ. Kɛlɛ kasɛ alɛ ɔsɛ bebè tsí, pɔ tɛ bayɛkɛ wɔnɔ elu nɛ̀ ɛkpãa, Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ kɛbà de.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ batɛ dɛmɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha nɛ Kristo inyeɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, gɛnɛ yɛabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ete, pɔ tɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ ɔplɛni tsyɛ,

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: gɛ nɔɔgã bɔtɔ ɛlɛ nɛidi mɛ gɛ nɔmɔ ɔsɛ ɛzɛgãa, ɛka tsiɖi bɔtɔ ɔlɛ nɛidi abha.

english_verse: Christ encourages you, and his love comforts you. God's Spirit unites you, and you are concerned for others.
translation_verse: Onupɛ nɔmɔ̃ kemì kpɛkpɛ tieli odenɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ Kristoɔ, onupɛ nɔmɔ ishumɛ yɔyɔ tili tsyɛ odenɔ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, onupɛ bɔkpɛ ɔha nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, onupɛ bɔbhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ yɔyɔ ebui pɛ buɖi banɔ ashagabui,

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ nɔkɔ mɛ same mɔmɔ ana nɛ bɔlɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe tenikpo tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ shu, gɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tinikpo ɛlɛ lɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ, pɛ bɔlɛ tenikpo nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɛ̀ ebui tɔtɔɖɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't be jealous or proud, but be humble and consider others more important than yourselves.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ kibui nanà ɔlɔkɔ pɛ ishu tɛpɛpɛ̃ nɔ, alo ishu fefeke gɛ ma kɛnanà mɛ, pɔ nɔ ozhinì ishu esi, tɛ nɔmɔ babhlatɔ asɛ bapɛ̃ adɛ ɔnɔ shu.

english_verse: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ nanà etiɖì kɛgɛ apɛ akɔ yɛishu ete, pɔ eɖì kɛgɛ bapɛ̃ kɔ babhlatɔ tsyɛ.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ ɛkpã zazãna zã ɔmɔasɛ kana gɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ tsyɛ lɛɛ ana.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: Anɔ gɛ alɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛzazã mɛ, tsyɛ agɛ mɔ yɛishu asɛ ashɔ nɛ̀ tɛzazã asɛ Owusoso Akaa kinu kɛdɔ̃ gɛ abalà nyanà

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: pɔ abhɛtɛ ishu asɛ etinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà, pɛ abhɛtɛ yɛishu asɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ana, gɛ babhɛtɛ yɛ nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛ tɛlɛlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: Pɔ bamɔ yɛ tɛlɛlɛ mɛ asɛ anɔdzyrame ana, ezhinì yɛishu esi kɛlɛ elũ atɔ̃ akɔ butsí, butsiɛ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu tsyɛ!

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Kliso Owusoso Akaa ewunu yɛatɔɖɔ ɔɖaɖama ɔkɔ ɔdɛ kɛlɛ akɔyɛ yɛinyèɛ gɛ ɖama ɔdɛ kinye ka nyia ka ɛdi,

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ onupɛ bekulu Yesu inyeɛ, tɛ bedzu kikulusi ka nyia ka esi, nɛ kititiɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa niesi,

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: kɛlɛ kineke ka nyia ka dalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ Yesu Kristo yɛenu Apaleteɛ, ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa shu tɛdadalɛ. Titsetsé Asɛ Awɔ̃ɛɛ Ana

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Mɛɔbhia alɛ mɔ, klisoɔ, asɛ kana gɛ nɔolũ atɔ̃ kibè nyia beɛ, anɛ gɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha ete, pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ɔdɛ ana gɛ onupɛ ɛma ɔnɔ ɔbha tsyɛ, nɔzã ɛlɛ abha ɔzɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɛkpã tɛyɛyɛkɛ lu nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ kifusisi nɛ̀ tishushukù mɛ,

english_verse: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛawɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ ɔnɔ mɛ, flogo tɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɛbui tili, nɛ̀ tɛ obu katsɛɖɛ tieli nɛ yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ gbangbã nɔlũ.

english_verse: Do everything without grumbling or arguing.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ kibui nanà nɛ ishu kpakpãmɛ alo ebui wɔawlɔ̃akɛ mɛ,

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ batɛmɔ bamɛ tsitsí nanà nɛ ɔnɔ shu, pɔ tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ asɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ gɛ batɛ amɔ kibui zizĩ nɛ ɔnɔ shu, nɛ obo kanɔ kɔklɔ̃ nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ alɛ mɛ gɛ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ̃ otsè asɛ awɔ̃ɛɛ gɛ alɛ kititiɛ ana,

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: nɛ kana gɛ nɔnyanà ɛkpã mɛ ibuiɛ ovunɔɔ shu, sɛ tɛ ɛlà tũ ahɔɛ nɛitélũ nɛ Kristo kiwui nabha, sɛ ɛgɛ wɔa ɛxɔ̃ɛ alo ɛtɔ bɔwɔãa.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Pɔ edzi asɛ babalɛ mɛ dzyosu esi odenɔ wɔnɔ ishu tɛlɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛide tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ tsyɛ elo, same eekù mɛ nɛ ɔnɔ petee shu.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Klisoɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔmɔ same plɛnɔ mɛ. Timoteo Nɛ̀ Epafrodito

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Ilù awɔ̃ nɛ Apalete Yesu abha sɛ ɛbàkpɛ Timoteo nɛ ɔnɔ ɔkɔ odunũ ɔlɛ, sɛ tɛ mɛtsyɛ mɔ same gɛ onupɛ ɛyɛkɛ ɔklasɔ̃ nɛ wɔnɔ shuɔ.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Ananà bhama mɛahɔɛ ɔdɛ yɛ, gɛ alɔkɔ kibui nɛ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ shu kɛgbãa.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ aka nyia aka apɛ yɛishu tɛpɛpɛ̀, gɛnɛ Yesu Kristo ayɛ shu.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔonyi ɔsɛ Timoteo alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ, ɔmɔsɛ asɛ eyi gɛ alɛ yɛakaa ɔbhaa, akpɛ kɛtakpu esi aplɛnɔ mɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa ebuiɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawa mɛ.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, ɛkpɛ kemi, sɛ tɛ mɛ sɛsɛ yɛ gɛ onupɛ ɛmɔ kɛvɛɛ gɛ ebuiɛ avɛ alɛ abha nɛ mɛɛ.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛyɛkɛ mɛishu abha aŋã nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ ɔsɛ mɛtsyɛ babà tsĩɔɔ ɔlɛ.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Pɔ ɛmɔ sɛ kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ mɛidzini Epafrodito gɛenu mɛadzya sɛsɛ, nɛ̀ mɛ ɔhagbo xɔ̃ɛwa nɛ keyu atata pɛ enu wɔnɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ nɔsɛsɛ ɔsɛ ezeɖi mɛabhaa.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Edzè gɛ aka mɔ ɔnɔ ɖi, kɛlɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ɔkpasɛ yɛ mɛ ɔmɔsɛ nɔolũ ɔsɛ yɛishumɛ zĩ.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Kibui gbã yɛishumɛ zĩ bafala nɔ, gɛ atɔ ɛbɔɛ tɛ etsí. Pɔ Owusoso Akaa eɖi yɛ ashagabui, kɛlɛ gɛnɛ yɛ ete, pɔ mɛtsyɛ, sɛ tɛ ɛtɛba mɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ dzinì mɔ.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Kliso ɛka pɛɛ gagalĩ sɛ tɛ mɛ sɛsɛ yɛ, sɛ tɛ onupɛ nɔzɔmɔ yɛɛ, same ebeku ɔnɔ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ obozhi kesi.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Nɔtsyanà yɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ nɛ̀ same hohoe, tɛ nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ banyɛ gɛ edzì asɛ yɛ ana,

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ agɔ̃ kɛbɔɛ tɛ etsí nɛ Kristo yɛxɔ̃ɛ shu, gɛ alɔkɔ yɛkpã sɛ tɛ akɔ mɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ gɛ nɔgɛ là kɔ mɛɛ shu.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔmɔ same nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. Kitinu bɔtɔ ɔkɔ mɛ sɛ iwlui kaa fɔnɔ ebui alɛ sɛsɛ ɔnɔ, kɛlɛinu kibui gɛ ba po ɔnɔ.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Nɔolù awɔ̃ nɛ̀ bebu alɛ piapii, banɔ alɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpa, banɔ alɛ gɛ bakpɛ apɔ̃ nɛ ishupiɛ shu.

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ nu kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhuiɛ, bɔlɔ agɛ ɛlɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɔ, gɛ bɔdalɛ Yesu Kristo shu, pɛ buti lu awɔ̃ nɛ ishudzya nabha,

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: gɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ mɛ nɛ kiwui sɛmì nabha, pɛ inu Israel eyi gɛide Benyamin kigbogboɔ mɛ, gɛinu Hebrieyi gbangbã, pɔ nɛ ɔsha nulũɔ, idzi Farisieyi,

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: gɛ ɛtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ gagalĩ, pɛ ɛzɛ tɔnɔ ɔha niede, basɛ anɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ ɔshaa nabha xɔnɔ, kibui nanà gɛzã mɛishu.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Pɔ kɛgɛ ɛta mɔ nɛ ebui alɛ mɛɛ, Kristo soɔ ɛga mɔ alɛ.

english_verse: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ zɛdɛɛ, ɛlɔkɔ ɛlɛ sɛ ɛgɛ mɔ̃ kɛnanà odenɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, nɛ gɛinu kibui hohoe ɔdɛ ɔkɔmɛ sɛ ɛmɔ̃ Kristo Yesu gɛenu mɛ Apaleteɛ gɛ yɛ shu so pɛ ɛga mɔ̃ kɛdɔ̃ nanà nɔ. Ɛmɔ ebui alɛ sɛ tɛwɔnɔ̃ ete lenu sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ̃ Kristo

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: tɛ bamɔ mɛ tsyɛ nɛ yɛ mɛ, gɛnɛ sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ tɛzazã piapii gɛide ɔsha mɛ akɔ mɛishu, pɛ kide tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Kristo mɛ gɛ kinu kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ gɛide Owusoso Akaa mɛ pɛ kide tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛiti Kristo nɛ̀ ohumi nɔ gɛ ɔlɔkɔ yɛalɔ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, nɛ̀ ɔhakpɛkpɛ gɛ ɔkɔ sɛ bɔmɔ ɔtɔ ɔlɛ plɛni, tɛ budzi asɛ yɛ ana nɛ yɛutsi mɛ,

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: klisoɔ, nɛ ɔkɔ toliɛ, tɛ mɛtsyɛ mɔ tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ. Tɛwɔawlɔ̃akɛ Ɔkɔ Kabha Ŋaŋã

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Gɛnɛ sɛ gɛ mɛahɔɛ atɛdɔ ebui alɛ pete abha, alo gɛ batɛ bhɛtɛ mɛ mɛidzì anɔ nanà, pɔ ɛwlɔãkɛ sɛ tɛ mɛahɔɛ adɔ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ shu so pɛ Kristo ahɔɛ adɔ mɛ abha.

english_verse: My friends, I don't feel I have already arrived. But I forget what is behind, and I struggle for what is ahead.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, ɛtɛ mɔ mɛishu otsiɛ asɛ mɛahɔɛ atɛdɔ ɛlɛ abha. Pɔ kibui tinikpo gɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, ɛbà dzɛkɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛatɛ fala tɛ ɛwlɔakɛ ɔkɔ kɛgɛ lɛ mɛ otugbà boŋ,

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Ɛwlɔ̃akɛ sɛ tɛ mɛŋã kabha tɛ ɛyɛkɛ kɛbhɛɛ gɛ ɛlɛ shu so pɛ Owusoso Akaa ekulu mɛ ɔvɛnɔ ititiɛ ɔmana Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔ agɛ ishèɛ petee zilu awɔ̃ ɖi ebuiɛ ana. Kɛlɛ onupɛ nɛ kawɔ̃pɛ tieli mɛ wɔ bhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe bhlatɔ mɛ tsyɛɛ, kɛlɛ tsyɛ Owusoso Akaa abadãlɛ ɛlɛ mɛ akɔ wɔ.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ bɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ kɛgɛ bɔtɛ yɛkɛ ete shu.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ bagɔgɔɛ nɔ tɛ nɔzã nɛkpã nɛ mɛ ɛyɛ ulũ, tɛ nɔ olù awɔ̃ nɛ̀ bagɛ edzi nɛ ɛkpã nɛ edzoɔ gɛ bɔkasɛ wɔnɔ shu.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ, asɛ gɛ izi tseɖe ɔnɔ bafalanɔ, pɛ ɛkaɖɔ ɛlɛ nɛ̀ ɛwɔmɛɛ, banɔ kpekpèɛ edzi nɛ̀ ɛkpã asɛ banɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ Kristo yɛutsi osiɛ.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ babà alɛ abha kɛlɛinu butsí, balɛ obudiɛ ɔlɛonu balɛ kevũɔ, same eku alɛ nɛ kibui nɔnɔ shu gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ baŋã kiwũi. Balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ etsiɖi kesiakpa abha ɔdɔ̃ abha.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Pɔ bɔlɔ xɔnɔɔ, bɔlɛ epi alɛ itití. Kɛlɛ bulipo agɛ aba yɛkɛ kɔ ɔlɔ edenɔ ɛkɛlɛ gagalĩ, gɛenu Apalete Yesu Kristo,

english_verse: has power over everything, and he will make these poor bodies of ours like his own glorious body.
translation_verse: anɔ gɛ, ohumi ɔlɛ yɛahɔɛ, pɛ alɔkɔ agbanà kɛka nyia ka ɔkpɛ yɛesi nɔ, ebè tsyina ɔlɔ ishudzya ɛlɛ gɛ ma kɛnanà mɛɛ tɛ bɔzã asɛ yɛɔyɛ dadalɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, wɔnɔ agɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ pɛ ɛpɛ ɔnɔ amɛ sɛ mɔ, wɔnɔ agɛ onu mɛ same nɛ̀ kabha ŋaŋã ikutu, kana kɛlɛ sɛ nɔzã gagalĩi nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ, mɛ ɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ! Banɔ Emi Kpɛkpɛ

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Ɛɛkɔ Ewodia nɛ̀ Sintixe ɛtakpu sɛ tɛ nɔolũ bagɔlɔ esi nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Ee, kɛlɛ ibisi odenɔ wɔnɔ agɛ onu mɛ ɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛwɔa ɔkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ, nɔ plɛnɔ badzɛ alɛ gɛ gɛazã aplɛnɔ mɛ gagalĩi nɛ kibui gbangbã axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ Klemens nɛ̀ mɛ ɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɔgɔɛ nɔ, gɛ balɛ inyeɛ kpasɛ ɛkpã eplukpa mɛ.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Nɔmɔ same nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ kibe nyia bè, iwlui kaɖɔ ɛlɛ sɛ, nɔmɔ same!

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu nyanyana dzi kibui mɔmɔ ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ̀ petee. Apaleteɛ etso aba.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ lɔkɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ kɛnanà shu, pɔ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛɛ, nɔ ganà ɛlɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu, kɛdɔ̃ bibisì, nɛ̀ ahɔɛ huhú mɛ, nɔ lɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɛdɔ̃ bibisìɛ lu Owusoso Akaa namɛ.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa ishu yɔyɔɔ gɛidɛ ebui esi lulũ ka nyia ka ɛdiɛ mɛɛ, aba gbanà ɔnɔ etúɔ nɛ̀ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔɛ nɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ dzã kiwuhũ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ pɛ̃, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ ɛlɛ shu dalɛ̃, kɛnɔnɔ gɛlɛ sɛ badɛmɛ nɔ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ kiku anɔ same, onupɛ kibui gbangbã tili, kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ bakpɛ ɛlɛ nɛititíɛ, nɔ bhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ alɛ nɛidi shu.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Kɛnɔnɔ gɛ nɔ kpasɛ alo nɔ yɛkɛɛ alo nolũ odenɔ mɛ ɔkɔɔ, alo pɛ nɔmɔ ɛlɛ nɛ mɛ mɛɛ, nɔ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abha. Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu ishu yɔyɔ anunɔ abazã aplɛnɔ ɔnɔ. Ahɔɛ Huhu Ɔkɔ Balɛ Ɔdɔ̃ Kɔkɔ

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Ɛmɔ same hohoe nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ sɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ owlui ɔlɔkɔ tili nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ mɛ. Kibui gbã, nɔ lɔkɔ tili nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, pɔ nɔgɛ mɔ idzo tɛ nobu ɛlɛ ɔkasɛ.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Gɛnɛ sɛ kɛdɔ̃ mɛpɛ so pɛ ɛɛɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ, pɔ ɛkpasɛ kana gɛ kɛdɔ̃ ku anɔ awɔ̃ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: Inyi idzi gɛ kidzi nɛ kɛdɔ̃ pɛpɛ ibè, kɛlɛ inyi kana gɛ kidzi tɛ bɔdɔ̃ kpekpè tsyɛ zã wɔahɔɛ. Ɛkpasɛ kibui kpukpũɔ gɛ kpasɛ kiku gɛ kɛdɔ̃ ku anɔ awɔ̃ nɛ kibui ka nyia ka ɛdì mɛ, onupɛ bakɔ wɔ kɛŋaŋã oxui alo bɔbhɛ yì wɔ tsyɛ elo, onupɛ bɔdɔ̃ lɛ wɔahɔɛ alo kɛnanà ma wɔahɔɛ.

english_verse: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
translation_verse: Ɛba là bhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka ɔganà agɛ yɛakɔ mɛ ohumi nɔ abha.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Pɔ apɛ̃ akɔ ɔnɔ sɛ nɔmɔ ɔtɔ ɔplɛnɔ mɛ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, asɛ gɛ wɔnɔ Filipianɛ onyi ɛlɛ anaa, nɛ kesikpɛkpɛ ewuiɛ gɛ atɛ ba fala mɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ kibui gbangbãa, gɛ ɛlɔ de Makedonia nɔɔ, ɔha tenikpo tsyɛ ɔgɛ lɔkɔ kɛnanà nɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ nɛ ɛlɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛ mɛ, ɔdɛ wɔnɔ ete,

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛzã Tesalonika tsyɛ elo, nɔzɔ sɛsɛ mɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ owlui ɔzɔ sɛsɛ gɛ ɛdanà gɛzã mɛahɔɛ.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Gɛnɛ sɛ gɛ ɛpɛ ɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ so, pɔ iɖi kɛgɛ badzì tiyuyulà kɔ ɔnɔ.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Ɛtɛ yɛkɛ mɛ ɛbhɛ babuia petee, kɛlɛ bazabà buia ɛlɛ atɔɖɔ akɔ mɛ ɔdɛ, baakɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ kpekpe, pɔ otsi ko mɛ yɛkɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ nɔ sɛsɛ mɛ ɔganà Epafrodito abha. Bunu bɔdɔ̃ gbangbã kɔkɔ, bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bayɛkɛ, gɛ buku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa abakɔ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ pɛpɛ nɔ nɛ yɛ ehoeyi udɔ̃ dadalɛ gɛ kpasɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ishu dadalɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ tihɔɔ. Amen. Tɛsɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Ɛɛsɛnɛ bagɛ alɛishu dalɛ pete nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ. Baadzya gɛalɛ mɛɔbha asɛnɛ wɔnɔ asɛsɛ.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Banɔ dadalɛ pete asɛnɛ wɔnɔ asɛsɛ, asɛ banunɔ gɛalɛ Romanɛ Ekusi Gbagbla ɔpãmɛ ana.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: Tɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ ɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ. Amen.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo gɛinu anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Yesu Kristo nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ, nɛ̀ Timoteo gɛenu bɔlɔ adzya,

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ sɛsɛ eplukpa alɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ banɔ dadalɛ gɛenu bɔlɔ adzya alɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ pɛ nɔɖɔ kibui gbã nɛ Koloseɛ, Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ kɔ ɔnɔ. Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Buuhù Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo Yɛakaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be gɛ onupɛ bukulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu,

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ bulu wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Yesu Kristo abha nɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔ banɔ dadalɛ petee,

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛide kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi ebuiɛ gɛ babalɛ elu akɔ ɔnɔ nɛ kititiɛ mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ nɔotilũ nɛ kibuiɛ gɛ kinu kibui gbã mɛ, gɛinu kibui gbangbã

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: gɛ ba ɔnɔ kɔ. Nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee nɔ, kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ yù eyuyù kɛlɛ kishe tɔɖɔ, asɛ kana gɛ kɛbhɛtɛ nɛ wɔnɔɛshi odenɔ kiwui ɛlɛ nabha gɛ nɔolũ ɛlɛ pɛ nɔolũ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ɛlɛ kibui gbã petee esi.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Nɔ kpasɛ ɛlɛ odenɔ Epafro bɔlɔ adzya gɛ aadɛ axɔ̃ɛ aplɛnɔ ɔlɔ ɔkɔ, anɔ gɛ aɖɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ebui nɛ ɔlɔ ɛtakpu,

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, odenɔ kiwuiɛ gɛ kɛlɛ abha bulũ wɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ɔ, bɔkà yɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu kɔ ɔnɔ pɛ bubisi Owusoso Akaa sɛ eyuku ɔnɔ mɛ nɛ̀ kibuititì nɛ yɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulũ ɔganà ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bubuti nɛ̀ ebui esi lulũɔ petee mɛ.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ bukulù Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛkpã gɛ ɛshɔ̃ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ pɛ lɛbàku yɛawɔ̃ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha, tɛ̀ nɔoyu eyuyù nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã ka nyia ka wɔawɔa mɛ̀, tɛ̀ nɔoshè nɛ Owusoso Akaa kibuititìɛ mɛ,

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: tɛ̀ nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ̀ ohumi petee nɛ yɛ ohumi dadalɛ nulũ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔmɔ kemi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kitu esi lulu tɛ nozohu Akaa

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
