translation_verse: ahɔɛ nɛ̀ same, anɔ gɛ akɔ nɔ shɔnɔ sɛ nɔmɔ tili odenɔ banɔ dadalɛ kaŋãsiɛ gɛalɛ bukusi ɔŋãkɔ gɛ dalɛ.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ odenɔ otumũ mɛ kabha ŋaŋã esi, kɛlɛ agbanà ɔlɔ amana Yɛeyianyɛ gɛ adɛmɛnɔ bukusi ɔŋãkɔ,

english_verse: who forgives our sins and sets us free.
translation_verse: anɔ gɛ yɛmɛ bebu ɔlɔ pɛ balɔkɔ ɔlɔ ebui kpa etsye ɔlɔ. Kristoɔ Gɛadɛɛ

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Yesu yɛakpasɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ bɔtɛ mɔɔ tɛlɛlɛ mɛ, eyi gɛiputɔ gɛ bamɔ̃ pɛ aŋã bɔdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ petee abha.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ ɔganà yɛabha babhɛtɛ bɔdɔ̃ɔ petee, kititì ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ kesiakpa abha ɔyɛ, bɔgɛ bamɔ̃ nɛ̀ awuhũ nɛ̀ bɔgɛ batɛ amɔ̃, edzì asɛ beekusi ugbu alo ihumi elete alo beekusi alo ɔshakɔkɔ tsyɛ elo, yɛabhɛtɛ ɔdɔ̃ petee kɛlɛ bɔlɛ kɔɛ.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Yɛalɛ flogo pɛ bɔdɔ̃ petee babà, kɛlɛ yɛmɛ bɔdɔ̃ petee nyana agɔlɔ vunɔ.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ yɛenu kɛtakpu akɔ ishudzyaa nɛ̀ ɔhaa, yɛenu kesi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ eyi gɛiputɔ gɛ bamɔ̃ pɛ ede bekpuɔ mɛ aba, sɛ tɛ̀ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛɛ, yɛabà amɔ̃ ohumi adɛ.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ samè eku Owusoso akaa asɛ yɛakpasɛ yɛmɛ,

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ ɔganà yɛabha tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ̀ yɛishu tenikpo nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ petee, edzì asɛ kesiakpa abha ɔdɔ̃ alo kititi ɔyɛ tsyɛ elo, tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ tenikpo ɔganà yɛ dzyosu nɔ gɛ babalɛ̀ nɛ butsi osiɛ shuɔ mɛ.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Gɛ noyidè nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu pɛ nɔodzì banɔ gɛ nɔtɛ ɔdɛmɛ nɛ yɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ, nɛ wɔnɔ ɛkpã kpaa gɛ nɔodzi nɔ shu so.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ, abhɛtɛ̀ ɔnɔ tenikpo nɛ̀ Kristo ishudzya ɔganà butsi mɛ, tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ wɔnɔ ishu lɛ dalɛ nɛ yɛamɛ, tɛ̀ batɛmɔ kihututũ nanà nɛ ɔnɔ shu tɛ̀ noboli odenɔ kɛpɔ bubu mɛ,

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: onupɛ nɔzã ɛlɛ abha nɛ ɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, pɛ nɔodzi gagalĩ, pɛ nɔgɛ shɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖiɛ gɛlɛ kibui gbangbã mɛ shu. Kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ gɛ nɔolũɔ baɖɔ etseɖe kɛdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ ka nyia ka gɛ lɛ kitití niesi, pɛ kɛlɛ shu mɛ Paulo badzi axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔɔ. Paulo Axɔ̃ɛ Wɔawɔa Ɔkɔ Ɔhaa

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Otsi alɛ ɛmɔ samɛ nɛ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ shu mɛtɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ, kɛlɛ mɛishu dzya mɛ yuku nɛ̀ kɛgɛ ma mɛahɔɛ nɛ Kristo ɔtɔ shuɔ, ɔmɔsɛ nɛ yɛishu dzya shu soɔ, gɛenu ɔhaa

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Ɛbadzì kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔganà kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ mɛ sɛ ɛkpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ ɔnɔ gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ petee,

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: gɛenu ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ balɔkɔ ekpũ agɔ kpekpè nɛ alɛ pɛ bɔmɔ̃ gelee bafala, pɔ otsi bebu ɛlɛ akasɛ banɔ dadalɛ.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Balɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu elu asɛ bakɔ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ etì nɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ dadalɛ gɛlɛ ebui kpukpũ alɛ shu, gɛenu Kristoɔ gɛ akpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛ, yɛabha bulũ awɔ̃ akɔ ebui dadalɛ.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: Bɔɖɔ yɛebuiɛ ɔkanà, kɛlɛ bɔlɔkɔ bubutì petee kpalà anɔ pɛ bɔkasɛ alɛ ɔdɔ̃, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔkɔ aka nyia aka ana nɛ Kristo mɛ.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Ɔvɛnɔ kibui ɛlɛ ɔgɔgɔɛ ɔkɔɔ mɛɛtɔ, pɛ ɛwlɔ̃akɛ nɛ̀ yɛohumi nɔ petee, gɛ lɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩi nɛ mɛ mɛ̀.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Ɛpɛ sɛ nɔotì kana gɛ ɛwlɔãkɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ Ladokia nɔ, nɛ̀ banɔ nɔ petee gɛ akamɔ mɛ eɖiɛ.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ ɛtɔɖɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bamɔ̃ kemikpɛkpɛ nɛ alɛ etúɔ mɛ tɛ̀ babhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ bamɔ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ petee nɛ ebui esi lulũ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ betì Owusoso Akaa ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ bekulu asɛ Kristoɔ,

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: gɛ yɛ mɛ bekpũ bubutì mɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛinu bubutì nɛ̀ kibuititìɛ.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: Itseɖe ɔnɔ kibui ɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ananà atɛ bawɔɛ ɔnɔ, nɛ̀ ebui wawlɔakɛ gɛ lawɔ̃ɛ asɛ lapɛ̃ɛ.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Ɛma ɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ ishupi mɛ tsyɛ elo, ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa xɔnɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛpɛ sɛ mɛitì kɛlɛ gɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lɛ gagalĩ nɛ Kristoɔ mɛ. Ishu Ahɔɛmɛ Zazã Odenɔ Banɔdzyrame Ɔsha Kɔkɔ Ɔganà Ɛkpã Zazãna Nɛ Kristo Mɛ

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, asɛ kana gɛ nɔ yɛkɛ Yesu Kristo asɛ Apalete ana, nɔvɛ̀ ɛlɛ abha tɛ̀ nɔzã yɛ mɛ,

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: nɔkpɛ̀ igu tɛ̀ nɔbhɔ tɔɖɔ kabha nɛ yɛ mɛ, nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ asɛ kana gɛ bakasɛ ɔnɔ ana, tɛ̀ nɔkɔ ɔnɔ ahɔɛhuhu eyuku gbagbà.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Nɔoɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ ananà agɛmɔ idzo nanà pɛ alɔkɔ asɛnɛ bubuti ebui alɔkɔ awɔɛ wɔnɔ nɔ, ebui gɛ lakpà plɛnɔ banɔdzyrame ɛkɔɔ nɛ̀ kanɔ mɛ ɛkpã zazãna ebui ɔdɛ Kritoɔ.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ balɔkɔ Kristo akɔ ɔnɔ petee, anɔ gɛ yɛenu kɛtakpu akɔ ohumi nɛ̀ ɔsha kɔkɔ ka nyia ka.

english_verse: Christ has also taken away your selfish desires, just as circumcision removes flesh from the body.
translation_verse: Yɛmɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ, gɛ nɔ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, gɛnɛ kɛhɔ̃a gɛ bebhui nɛ̀ banɔdzyrame ahɔɛ, pɔ kɛhɔ̃a gɛ Kristo ebhui,

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: gɛ bavɔbɔ wɔnɔ aplɛnɔ yɛ nɛ bulĩ kpɛkpɛ mɛ pɛ befeke wɔnɔ aplɛnɔ yɛ nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, ɔganà Owusoso Akaa yɛohumi nɔ mɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛefeke yɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ.

english_verse: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
translation_verse: Kibeɛ gɛ nɔotsí nɛ wɔnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, gɛ beke bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ pɛ nɔzã ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ tyɛ elo, Owusoso Akaa akɔ nɔzã nɛkpã nɛ̀ Kristo. Alɔkɔ ebui kpa etsye ɔlɔ petee,

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: gɛ batsà odì akpɛ ebui fɔfɔnɔ kukuɔ nɛ̀ alɛ ɔsha gɛ lɔɛtití nɛ ɔlɔ shuɔ mɛɛ, alɔkɔ alɛ ashɛnɔ adɛ kpalà nɛ butsì osiɛ shu.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Kibeɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ keyutadɔ̃ nɛ̀ ihumi nɔ nɛ̀ bekusiɛ petee ahɔɛɛ, ebui ɛlɛ akasɛ nɛ banɔɛshi, gɛ alɔkɔ butsí osiɛ amɔ kabhaŋaŋã nɛ alɛ shuɔ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nɔtɛkɔ anɔ nanà ekulu kebhu nɛ̀ ɔnɔ nɛ kɛgɛ nɔɔŋã alo pɛ nɔwɔ̃ɛ shu, alo nɛ kibui tili gɛ kpa plɛnɔ ɔhamɛ iwui ŋaŋã shu, asɛ woele vɔvɔ iwui ŋaŋã alo nɛ Sabat kimoelewuiɛ shu.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Ebui alɛ enu kɛtɔwui ɔkɔ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ otugbà abaa, ebuiɛ gɛenu ebui gbã, Kristoɔ mɛ bamɔ̃ alɛ.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛkɔ anɔ nanà gɛ adɛmɛ ezhini ishu esi nɛ asɛnɛ mɛ, pɛ aakpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ nɔtɛ mɔ kɛbhɛ̃ babuia nɔ. Anɔ alɛ nɛidiɛ anyɔ̃ ebui mɛ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ amɔ̃ shu, kɛlɛ yɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ ama ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ akɔ efeke yɛishu nɛ kɛgɛ ma kɛnanà mɛ shu.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Ayala idzoɔ gɛ kpasɛ yɛ nɛ agɛ yɛenu Kɛtakpuɔ nɛishi, anunɔ gɛ yɛ mɛ ishudzya petee nyana agɔlɔ ovunɔ pɛ lɛkpɛ tsà nɛ̀ tɛzɛ̃ɛ, pɛ lishe asɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ asɛ lisheɛ.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Gɛ nɔotsí ɔplɛnɔ Kristoɔ nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ɛkpa zazãna shuɔ, kiɖe so pɛ nɔbhɛtɛ asɛ gɛ onupɛ nɔkɔ ɔkpasɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ dza? Nɔkɔɔ ɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ ɔsha ɛlɛ gɛ bakpɛ asɛ,

english_verse: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
translation_verse: “Nɔtɛ vɛnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ ɛdɔ̃ ɛlɛ shu! Nɔoti minì kɛɛlɛ̀ oɖi! Nɔotì hunu kɛɛlɛ̀ tsyɛ oɖi!”

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Babhɛtɛ alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ asɛ lɛezĩ odenɔ alɛ ishu axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ lakpà ɔplɛnɔ banɔdzyrame ɔsha kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Ɔsha ɛlɛ nɛidi wɔ̃ɛ asɛ bubutì ebui lɛinu, nɛ kanà gɛ lɛitũ kibui kpɛ sɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ ɛlɛ, asɛnɛ ishu esi zhizhini kɔ ɛlɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ lɛɛbhɛtɛ̀ ebui gbudugbudù nɛ̀ ishupiɛ, pɔ kɛgɛ bakɔ ɔsɛ beyi ide nɛ ishudzya mɛ ebui pɛpɛ nɔ ma alɛ ahɔɛ.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Gɛ befeke ɔnɔ nɛ̀ Kristo soɔ, nɔlɔkɔ ɔnɔ etúɔ ɔtɔɖɔ kititì ɔdɔ̃ nabha, nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Kristo azã esi nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛŋã mɛɛ.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɔdɔ̃ gɛide ititíɛ nabha, pɔ anɛ kesiakpa ɔdɔ̃ nabha.

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nɔotsí, kɛlɛ otsi alɛ balɔkɔ ɔnɔ ɛkpã ekpũ nɛ Kristoɔ gɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Onupɛ Kristoɔ gɛenu ɔnɔ ɛkpã ebe koeyiɛ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ obokoeyì ɔplɛnii nɛ ishu dadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nɔŋã kanɔ alɛ mɛ kɛka nyia ka idi gɛ kpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛ nabha. Gɛinu asɛ ɔmamɛdɛdɛ, atsɔ̃bui, ishumɛ tɛlɔlɔ nɛ adzɛ shu, ebui zizĩ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ, nɛ̀ mɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ̃ gɛinu ibudi ebui.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: Nɛ ebui alɛ shu soɔ, Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔbɔba.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Nɔzɔ ɔgã nɛ edzo alɛ abha, nɛ ɛkpã gɛ nɔtɛzã oɖiɛ mɛ.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Pɔ otsi alɛ xɔnɔ kɛlɛ sɛ nɔobu ebui alɛ ɔtɛɛ, ebui asɛ, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ kpɛkpɛ, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ gɛɔmana ebela, banɔ shu zizĩ, kaɖɔ kpa ɖɔɖɔ nɛ anɔ shu, nɛ̀ atsɔ̃bui gɛide wɔnɔ olugbũ mɛ.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ̀ sɛ asɛnɛ otseɖe agɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔtɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɛkpã gɛ nɔtɛ zã oɖiɛ nɛ̀ alɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ shu

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: pɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɛkpã vɔvɔ ɔkpɛ, gɛ babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ avɔvɔ nɛ̀ kibuititì nɛ agɛ yɛabhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ kedzi avɔvɔ tɛzazã mɛ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɛkɛlɛ Helaeyi alo Yudaeyi nanà ama, kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui alo kɛhɔ̃a mabhui mabhui ma. Anɔ gɛ ehu buluhũ gɛ betielũ ɔlɛ mɛ tsyɛ ama, alo anɔ gɛ yɛ awuhũ agɛ kpà, anɔ dzidzì alo anɔ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ, pɔ tenikpo balɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ, kɛlɛ Kristo yɛalɛ alɛ petee mɛ.

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: Kliso asɛ banɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu elù, gɛ balɛishu dalɛ pɛ adɛmɛ nɛ alɛ ana, nɔlɔkɔ ashagabui ɖiɖi, ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, ishu esi zhizhini, ishu nyanyana ovunɔ nɛ̀ kitu esi lulu ɔkpɛ asɛ akpɛkpɛ.

english_verse: Put up with each other, and forgive anyone who does you wrong, just as Christ has forgiven you.
translation_verse: Nɔolũ agɔlɔ esi tɛ̀ nɔlɔkɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ ɔkpasɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ otsye agɔlɔ. Nɔlɔkɔ tsye asɛ kana gɛ Apaleteɛ tsyɛ alɔkɔ etsye ɔnɔ ana.

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: Nɛ ebui piapi alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ edeɛ, nɔlɔkɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ ɛlɛ nyanà ebuiɛ petee ovunɔ nɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ gɛ apɛ̃ mɛ.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ Kristo ishu yɔyɔ ŋã wɔnɔ etúɔ nabha, ɔmɔsɛ asɛ banɔ gɛede ishupi tunikpo mɛ ana, bekulu ɔnɔ avɛnɔ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ nɔlɔkɔ ahɔɛhuhu.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ Kristo ibuiɛ zã wɔnɔ mɛ nɛ kedzi yɛyɛkɛ mɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔkasɛ ɔdɔ̃ pɛ nohu buluhũ ɔkɔ agɔlɔ nɛ bubutì petee mɛ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔɔkalà ɛdzɛ zhazhã eplukpa pɛ nɔzhã ɛfɔfuĩa mɛ ɛdzɛɛ nɛ̀ ahɔɛhuhu nɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbhɛtɛɛ tsyɛɛ, onupɛ kibui ɖɔɖɔ alo ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ tsyɛ elo, nɔbhɛtɛ alɛ petee nɛ Apalete Yesu inyèɛ mɛ, tɛ nɔlɔkɔ ahɔɛ huhu ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔganà yɛabha. Ɔsha Gɛ Gbanà Kristo Bɔpamɛanɛ

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Banyɛ edzinì mɔ, nɔozhinì ishu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ enyine alɛ, asɛ gɛ kɛshɔnɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ ana.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Badzɛ enyineɛ, nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ edzinì alɛ, kɛlɛ nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ kɔ alɛ.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Bunuvɔɛ nɔ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ elĩ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ akaalɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ ku Apalete nawɔ̃.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Beyiakaa tsyɛ, nɔtɛ ɔkpɛ wɔnɔ eyi alɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ, onu gɛnɛ anaa kemikpɛkpɛ atɛ bazã alɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Banɔ dzidziɛ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ kesiakpa abha apaleteɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ sɛ gɛ balɛ awuhũɔ etsiɖi wɔnɔ abha tɛ nɔoku alɛ awɔ̃ so, pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ odenɔ ɛyamɛ nɛ̀ kitu gbangbã mɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ nɔ.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kitúɔ petee mɛ, asɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ ana, gɛnɛ ɔkɔ banɔdzyrame

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ nɔbɔmɔ kaŋãsi odenɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ asɛ kɛbhɛ babuia ana. Apalete Yesu nɔ ɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Aka nyia aka gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa, babà buia kɛlɛ bhɛ̃ akɔɛ, kɛlɛ bamɛ ɖiɖi nanà mã ɛlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Bapaleteɛ, nɔkɔ wɔnɔ anɔ dzidziɛ kɛgɛ shɔnɔ pɛ kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ nɔkɔ alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ̀ wɔnɔ tsyɛ Apalete alɛ ɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛititíɛ. Buluhũ Huhuɔ Gɛ Aplɛnɔ Ɔkɔ Alɛ

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Nɔzã ɛlɛ abha tɛ nozo kulu Owusoso Akaa, nɔzã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ tɛ̀ nɔ ozohu ahɔɛ.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ nɔ okulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ ɛtakpu, sɛ tɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa adalɛ kedulũ ɔkɔ kibuiɛ gɛ bɔɖɔɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔɖɔ Kristo yɛebui kpukpũɔ ɔkanà, kibuiɛ gɛ ɛlɛ shu mɛ kpasɛ ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Nɔ okulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ̀ ɛlà ɖɔ kibuiɛ piapii asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɛɖɔ ɛlɛ.

english_verse: When you are with unbelievers, always make good use of the time.
translation_verse: Nɔotì bubutì idzoɔ gɛ nɔbɔ lɔkɔ ɔkpɛ ɔha nɛ̀ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋãa, nɔwɔa kibè ka nyia ka gɛ nɔmɔ̃ shu ɛxɔ̃ɛ piapii.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ ɔnɔ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ akasɛ sɛ bebhui ɔnɔ ebu, kaɖɔ gɛ bɔmɔɛ kpasɛ alɛ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔotì kana gɛ nɔ obobù kibui ulũ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka. Bɔdɔ̃ Sɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Tikikus ebètseɖɔ wɔnɔ ebuiɛ petee mɛ gɛ ɛgã. Enu adzya gbangbã, axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã pɛ ewlui enu axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔplɛnɔ ɔlɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Ɛsɛsɛ yɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, sɛ tɛ akɔ wɔnɔ tititì nɛ bɔlɔ ɔtɔ shu tɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ emi nɔ.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: Yɛ nɛ̀ Onesimo balɛ aba. Bɔlɔ adzya gbangbã nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ pɛ enu wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ tenikpo nɔ. Bebè tseɖe wɔnɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ ba ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ̀.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Mɛɔhagbo Aristaxo gɛ blɔnii kpasɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ. Marko gɛenu elũdzyɔa ɔkɔ Banaba tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Yesuɔ gɛ bekulu asɛ Yustus tsyɛ asɛnɛ ɔnɔ sɛsɛ. Balɛ ete balɛ enu ɔhagbo Yudanɛ axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ukusi ŋaŋãa, kɛlɛ bakɔ asɛ mɛishuɔ mɛ dɔ fɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Epafrodito gɛenu Kristo Yesu yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ pɛ ede wɔnɔ mɛ tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ. Alɔkɔ kemi kpɛkpɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu kibe nyia be, sɛ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ, asɛ anɔ gɛ nɔoshè pɛ bayɛkɛ ɔnɔ abha aŋã ana.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ akɔ wɔnɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ Ladokia nɛ̀ Hilapolisiɛ.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ ɔbhia Luka gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ, anɔ gɛenu awɔa bhɛtɛ, nɛ̀ Demas tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ asɛsɛ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Nɔsɛnɛ badzya gɛ alɛ Ladokia, nɛ̀ Nimpa nɛ̀ ɔhaa gɛalɛ yɛɔpã mɛ.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bakalà eplukpa alɛ akɔ ɔnɔ ebekeɛ, nɔoɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ bakalà kalɛ nɛ Ladokianɛ ɔhaa tsyɛ mɛ, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ wɔ tsyɛ ɔkalà keplukpa onupɛ kede Ladokia ebeku wɔkɔɔ.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Nɔotseɖe Akipo ɔsɛ, “Ɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ ɔwɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ ɔyɛkɛ odenɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ obeke.”

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo, mɛ lɔkɔ mɛahɔɛ pɛ ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ. Nɔbakà ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ. Tɛ Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Paulo, Silvano Nɛ̀ Timoteo, balɔkɔ keplukpa alɛ asɛsɛ Tesalonika ɔhaa nɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo balɛ inyeɛ mɛ, tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ zã ɔplɛnɔ wɔnɔ. Ahɔɛhuhu Tesalonikanɛ Nɛ Alɛ Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Shu

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Buuhu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be kɔ wɔnɔ pete pɛ bukulu wɔnɔ kpɛ ɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ̀.

english_verse: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
translation_verse: Butsiɖi ɛlɛ abha bakà wɔnɔ nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, anɔ gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ wɔnɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ mana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu, wɔnɔ bɔtɔ mana tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɛ̀ wɔnɔ kemi kpɛkpɛ gɛ mana ohumi kpɛkpɛ nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo mɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ, Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ baadzya, kliso pɛ ebu wɔnɔ,

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ ibui gbangbã ba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ anɛ nɛ kaɖɔ bhlui ete, pɔ nɛ̀ ohumi, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã nɛ̀ ebuesilulũ gɛ alɛ mɛ edzuɔ. Nonyi kanà gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔɛshi nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Nobodzi banɔ gɛ nɔgã nɛ bɔlɔ nɛ̀ Apaleteɛ bɔwɔalũɔ mɛ, nɛ bɔtɔ lɛ pete ede tsyɛ, nɔyɛkɛ kibuiɛ nɛ sameɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔkɔɔ.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nobodzì banɔ gɛ bayɛyɛkɛŋã pete nɛ Makedonia nɛ̀ Axarya beɖi wɔnɔ pɛ bagã atɔɖɔ.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ gɛiku wɔnɔ batɔ̃ mɛ̀ nɛ Makedonia nɛ̀ Axaya ete, bebetì wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ. Klisoɔ kɛbha ma ɔsɛ tɛ bɔkaɖɔ kibui nyiɛ bui nɛ kɛlɛ shu,

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ batɛɖɔ kɛlɛ nɛ balɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ kana gɛ nɔyɛkɛ bɔlɔ shu. Betseɖe bɔlɔ nɛ kana gɛ notsyina odenɔ ibudiɛ ɔkɔ pɛ nɔba ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa gbangbã gɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpãa pɛ enu enunuɔ,

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: nɛ tɛ buupo Yɛeyianyɛ gɛ ede kititiɛ anɔ gɛ anyɛmɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, Yesu, gɛ ayɛkɛ bɔlɔ edenɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ gɛ lɔbaa shu.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ, nɔonyi ɔsɛ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ tɛbaba dzi kibui gɛ shɔ̃.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Bɔtɛ mɔ bɔtɔ bafalanɔ pɛ bazakwala bɔlɔ nɛ Filipi, asɛ gɛ nonyi ana, pɔ nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa anɔ tɛpɛplɛnɔ mɛɛ, bɔkpɛ kité pɛ ɖɔ yɛibuiɛ tseɖe wɔnɔ nɛ kititì lɔlɔ gagalĩ ɛlɛ mɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ tibibisiɛ gɛ bubisiɛ gɛide kesitata alo ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ yɛishuɔ gɛ dalɛ mɛ alo sɛ tɛ bɔwɔɛ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: God was pleased to trust us with his message. We didn't speak to please people, but to please God who knows our motives.
translation_verse: Nɛ kidzo bhlatɔ abhaa, bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ asɛ banyɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ abha pɛ alɔkɔ yɛibuiɛ akpɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ. Bɔtɛ pɛɛ sɛ tɛ buku banɔdzyrame awɔ̃ pɔ Owusoso Akaa boŋ gɛ efeke bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ eɖiɛ.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Nɔonyi ɔsɛ bɔtɛ ɖɔ olugbũ mɛ dzyɛdzyɛ ebui, alo pɛ bukumu bɔdɔ̃ nɛ bamɛ asɛ tɛ bukpũ bɔlɔ ishu tɛpɛpɛ̃ɛ, Owusoso Akaa yɛenu agɛ yɛamɔ ebuiɛ aplɛnɔ bɔlɔ.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Bɔdɛmɛ wɔnɔɛbui popoopo, klisoɔ bɔmɔ same nɛ wɔnɔ sɛ anɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛbuiɛ ete bɔmana wɔnɔ pɔ tɛ nɔkpasɛ bɔlɔ ɛkpã zazãna tsyɛ, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔɛbui baku bɔlɔ awɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, kibui gbã, bɔtɔ nɛ ɛkpã zazãna gɛ gagalĩ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ, bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ elishi nɛ̀ kemuze sɛ tɛ butidzi bɔtɔ ɔkɔ ananà gɛ onupɛ bɔɖɔ Owusoso Akaa kibuiɛ tseɖe wɔnɔ.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ onu bagɛ bazã pɛ bamɔ ebuiɛ alɛ, kana Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ bɔlɔ ishuɔ dalɛ, kibui gbangbã nɛ kɛpɔ maŋã maŋã gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔyɛkɛŋã nɛishi.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nonyi kana gɛ bɔnyana wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka vunɔ asɛ kana gɛ eyiaka abhɛtɛ̀ yɛeyi alɛ ana,

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: pɛ bɔkpɛ wɔnɔ kemi, bɔyɔ wɔnɔ ishuɔ mɛ̀ pɛ bɔkpalà wɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔza nɛ̀ ɛkpã gɛ pɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa, anɔ gɛ yɛekulu wɔnɔ ɔkpɛ yɛ bukusiŋaŋã nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ butsiɖi ɛlɛ abha hu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be, ɔmɔsɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ, kibuiɛ gɛ nolũ odenɔ bɔlɔ ɔkɔɔ, nɔgɛ yɛkɛ ɛlɛ asɛ banɔdzyrame ɛbui kinu, pɔ asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ nulũ, Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ gɛ ɛwɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ nɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔyɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Mɛ adzya alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ obodzì banɔ gɛ bagã nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaa nɛ Yudea gɛ akpasɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ. Nɔtɔ odenɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ kesiakpa abha anɔ nɔ̀ tɛhɔɛ mɛ, bɔtɔ lɛ nɛidi ɔha alɛ tsyɛ amɔ denɔ Yudanɛ ahɔɛ mɛ,

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: banɔ gɛeyí Apalete Yesu nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɔ nɔ kɛlɛ baza kakà bɔlɔ tsyɛ eyinɔ. Begiku Owusoso Akaa nawɔ̃ kɛlɛ benu banɔ gɛ batɛ dɛmɛ banɔɛbui

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana tɛ badã kidzo akɔ bɔlɔ tɛ bɔtɛ ɖɔ kibuiɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ sɛ tɛ bayɛkɛ balɛ elu nɛkpã. Nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, bakaa bhɔ balɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ sɛ tɛ lewu kabha. Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ tɛba balɛ abha otsi alɛ. Kana Gɛ Paulo Apɛ Asɛ Tɛ Amɔ Tesalonika Ɔhaa

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, gɛ bɔshɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ kibe gulũi mɛ , nɛ kana gɛ bɔpɛɛ sɛ mɔ wɔnɔ soɔ, bɔbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka tɛ bɔmɔ ɔnɔ.

english_verse: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ bɔba wɔnɔ kɔ, kibui gbã mɛ Paulo, ɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ zɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ-pɔ Satana edzu ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ abha.

english_verse: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
translation_verse: Pɔ kiɖuwoe gɛ kɛlɛinu bɔlɔ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖiɛ, bɔlɔ sameɛ, alo kikutuɔ gɛ kɛlɛ mɛ bɔba mɔ ishu dadalɛ nɛ Apalete Yesu amɛ gɛ onupɛ abaa dza? Gɛnɛ wɔnɔ dza?

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Kɛgbã, wɔnɔ onu bɔlɔ tɛdadalɛ nɛ̀ sameɛ.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: So gɛ bɔzalà kɛlɛ ulũ zãa, bɔbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ sɛ tɛ bɔlɔ ete zã Atene.

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: Bɔsɛsɛ Timoteo, gɛenu bɔlɔ adzya nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛwɔa ɔkɔ Kristo yɛibuiɛ tɛkakanà, sɛ tɛ akpɛ wɔnɔ ohumi nɛ̀ tɛ̀ akpɛ wɔnɔ kemi nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ,

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ ananà atɛba mɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ denɔ tifefekeɖi lɛ mɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ nonyi piapii ɔsɛ babhɛtɛ bɔlɔ ɔkɔ tifefekeɖi ebui alɛ.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Kibui gbã, kibeɛ gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔ ɔbhaa, buzi tseɖe wɔnɔ ɔsɛ babatɔnɔ bɔlɔ kede. Kɛlɛ kɛba ɛlɛ mɛ anà, asɛ gɛ nɔonyi piapii nɔ.

english_verse: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛshu, gɛ ɛzaka là zã kɛlɛ ulũ soɔ, ɛkpɛ banɔ sɛ tɛ̀ milũ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu ebuiɛ. Kifu ziyi mɛ sɛ nɛ kidzo tili abhaa, Satana gɛ efeke banɔ eɖiɛ ebe feke wɔnɔ kɛlɛ bɔlɔ katsɛɖɛ bubuɔ abawɔ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛ. Timoteo Ohumi kpɛkpɛ Gɛ Amana

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Pɔ otsi ko Timoteo ede wɔnɔ ɔkɔ aba bɔlɔ ɔbha, kɛlɛ amana bɔlɔ ɔklasɔ̃ gbangbã nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ shu. Etseɖe bɔlɔ asɛ nɔkɔ baka ebui gbangbã nɛ bɔlɔ shu kɛlɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔmɔ bɔlɔ, asɛ kana gɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ bɔmɔ wɔnɔ ana.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, nɛ bɔlɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ kede tɛtɔtɔnɔ pete mɛɛ, nɔzɔkpɛ bɔlɔ kemì nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: Otsiɛ nɔ bɔlɛ nɛkpã gɛ nodzi gagalĩ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ so.

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ́ bɔbà là hu Owusoso Akaa nɛahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ sameɛ gɛ nɔkpɛ ɔlɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ dza?

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Elishi nɛ̀ kemuze bukulu Owusoso Akaa gagalĩi sɛ tɛ̀ buwlui mɔ wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ bɔkɔ wɔnɔ kɛgɛ ma wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Otsiɛ nɔ tɛ̀ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu adalɛ kidzoɔ mɛ akɔ ɔlɔ sɛ tɛ bɔbà wɔnɔ ɔbha.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Tɛ̀ Apaleteɛ akɔ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ wlui kpè tɔɖɔ tɛ kiyuku balɛ̀ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ nɛ̀ anɔ nyia anɔ tsyɛ, asɛ gɛ bɔlɔ ɛyɛ bhɛtɛ kɔ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Tɛ̀ Yesu akpɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ ohumi sɛ tɛ betibu wɔnɔɛpɔ tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ gɛ onupɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu aba nɛ yɛ̀ banɔ dadalɛ petee.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Otsi alɛ mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, bɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɔsha nɛ kana gɛ nɔbɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã pɛ lɛba shɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa, asɛ ɛkpã gɛ nodzinɔ. Otsi nɔ bubisi denɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ kɛlɛ bɔkpalà wɔnɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ Yesu mɛ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kana odzinɔ bhɛtɛ.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nonyi ɔsha gɛ bɔkpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ gana Apalete Yesu ohumi nabha.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Kinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔyɔlɔ ɔmamɛdɛdɛ,

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: gɛnɛ sɛ tɛ tɛwɔwɔsɔ̃ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ zɛlɔ̀ nɛ wɔnɔ shu mɛ asɛ bagɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ ibudi gɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa,

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ nɛ kibui lɛ mɛ, ananà atɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ yɛelé shu alo tɛ efeke yɛeɖi. Apaleteɛ abapɔ batɔ akɔ banɔ nɛ ebui kpa alɛ nɛidi shu, asɛ gɛ buti tseɖe wɔnɔ ɔbɔfalanɔ pɛ itseɖe nɛ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa egi kulu bɔlɔ asɛ bututru shu, pɔ tɛ bɔza nɛ ɛkpã gɛ ɛlɛ shu dalɛ.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, anunɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ ɔsha kɔkɔ ɔlɛ gɛnɛ anɔ yagɛ yɛkɛ pɔ Owusoso Akaa, gɛ akɔ wɔnɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Otsi nɛ adzya tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ shuɔ, kɛga shɔnɔ ɔsɛ bɔfɔnɔ kɔ wɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa atɛ kasɛ wɔnɔ sɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ nɛ kibui gbã mɛɛ, nɔdɛmɛ nɛ baadzya petee nɛ Makedonia. Mɛ adzya alɛ, pɔ bɔkà kpalà wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kana odzi nɔ bhɛtɛ.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Nɔlɔkɔ kɛlɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ishu abha sɛ tɛ nɔzãnà ɛkpã yɔyɔ, tɛ noɖi wɔnɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ tɛ nɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛhɔɛɛ, asɛ kana gɛ butseɖe wɔnɔ,

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ kɛkɔ sɛ wɔnɔ kibe nyia be ɛkpã zazãna sɛ tɛ bagɛ etinu Kristoanɛ bamɔ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ, tɛ nɔtɛ zã ananà yɛabha. Apaleteɛ Tɛbaba

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ notì kibui nɛ bagɛ etsiɛ shu, alo tɛ nɔmɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ asɛ banɔ gɔgɔɛ nɔ, gɛ betieɖi kidzo mɛ akɔ kibui nanà.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Bɔyɛkɛ ŋã sɛ Yesu etsi kɛlɛ azalɔ, klisoɔ bɔyɛkɛŋã ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa aba nyɛmɛ bagɛ betsi nɛ Yesu mɛɛ aplɛnɔ yɛ.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Nɛ Apaleteɛ kibuiɛ gɛ aɖɔ mɛɛ, butseɖe wɔnɔ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ bagɛ bɔkà lɛ nɛ ɛkpãa, pɛ bɔlɛ odi yinɔ Apaleteɛ tɛbabaa, bɔtɛbà putɔ ɔkɔ bagɛ etitsíɛ.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ ebezhi aba odenɔ kititiɛ, nɛ ɔsha kɔkɔ nɛ̀ ozĩ, nɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛeɖi ulugbũ nyanyã aɖaka nɔ nabha yɛozĩ kpɛkpɛ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa kexoele nɔ gɛ ebe kulu banɔ nɔ, kɛlɛ́ bagɛ etitsí nɛ Kristo mɛɛ bebè putɔ alɔ.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Nɛ kɛlɛ́ niedeɛ, bɔlɔ bagɛ kalɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã bebè feke ɔlɔ ewunɔ kitsù nɛ alɛ nɛ ɔmɔlɔ nɔ mɛ tɛ̀ bɔtsyanà Apaleteɛ nɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ nɔ mɛ. Klisoɔ, bɔbaza plɛnɔ Apaleteɛ tihɔɔ.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nɔkpɛ bagɔlɔ kemi nɛ̀ ebui alɛ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, otsi alɛ, nɛ kiwuiɛ nɛ̀ kibeɛ shuɔ, anɛ ibui kinu sɛ tɛ bɔfɔnɔ sɛsɛ wɔnɔ,

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ nonyi piapii ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ nɛewuiɛ labatɔnɔ wɔnɔ asɛ kɛba gɛ ezĩ aba elishi ana.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: Gɛ banɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ishuyɔyɔ nɛ̀ tɛzazã piapii,” kizizĩ babà alɛ abha nɛ matì matì mɛ, asɛ kɛtã gɛ ɛya tã ayamunu ana, kɛlɛ batɛ balà ebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ nɛ kɛlɛ ulũ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Pɔ mɛadzya alɛ, nɔma otumũ mɛ̀ ɔsɛ tɛ kiwui ɛlɛ̀ babhɛtɛ wɔnɔ asɛ ezĩ tɛbaba ana.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ petee onu beyi nɛ ɔdadalɛ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ beyi nɛ kiwui mɛ.

english_verse: Others may sleep, but we should stay awake and be alert.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, nɔtɛkɔ bɔzã asɛ bagɔgɔ̃ gɛ adɔ taɖa, pɔ nɔkɔ bɔzã nɛ awɔ̃ tɛ bɔnyana ishu ovunɔ.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ apɛ asɛ adɔ taɖa, badɔ tɛlɛ elishi, kɛlɛ bagɛ awɔɛ ebukuɔ tsyɛ awɔ̃ɛ ebuku elishi.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Pɔ gɛ bɔlɛ kɔ kelizaza soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔnyana ishu vunɔ, tɛ bɔkpɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ asɛ kitelũ ɔɖa akpɛkpɛ ana, tɛ bukumũ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi ɔkɔ tibubu asɛ kikutu ana.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa egi bu ɔlɔ asɛ tɛ bɔtɔ nɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ esi, pɔ tɛ bɔyɛkɛ tibubu ɔgana Apalete Yesu Kristo abha.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Etsi akɔ ɔlɔ, sɛ tɛ edzi asɛ budzi nɛ̀ awɔ̃ alo bɔdɔ̃ taɖa tsyɛ elo, bɔba zã ɛkpã plɛni.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, nɔkpɛ bagɔlɔ kemi tɛ nɔbhɔ bagɔlɔ owunɔ, asɛ kɛbhɛtɛ gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana. Ɔshakɔkɔ Gɔgɔɛ

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ adzya alɛ mɔ, otsiɛ alɛ bubisi denɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ, nozhinɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ bagɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ nɛ wɔnɔɛshi, pɛ bagbanà nɔ nɛ Apalete nɛinye mɛ pɛ behu buluhũ akɔ ɔnɔ.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ alɛ tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ alɛ piapii nɛ balɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa shu so. Nɔzã ishu yɔyɔ mɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ adzya alɛ mɔ, bɔkpalà ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ notseɖe nɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ benu banɔ zhɔzhɔrɛ, nɔkpɛ bagɛ kitu bhui balɛ ohuiɛ kemi, nɔplɛnɔ bagɛ ebotsoɔ, tɛ̀ nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔkɔ anɔ ka nyia ka.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Noɖi kɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ ananà agɛ lɔkɔ kibui kpa abuia kɛbhɛ akɔ kibui kpa nɔ, pɔ nɔkpɛ kemi ɔsɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ nɛ aka nyia aka tsyɛ.

english_verse: Always be joyful
translation_verse: Nɔmɔ samɛ kibe nyia be,

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Nɔzã kɛlɛ abha tɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa,

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Nɔohu ahɔɛ nɛ ebui ka nyia ka mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Notilĩ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɛifúɔ,

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Nɔlũ awɔ̃ oɖi kɛka nyia ka piapii. Nɔnyana kɛgɛ pɛ̃ɛ ovunɔ.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Nɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kibui kpa ka nyia ka shu.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa, yɛahɔɛ ishu yɔyɔ, dalɛ wɔnɔ shu tɛ̀ edzinɔ adalɛ. Tɛ̀ Wɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ petee, kɛtɔwuiɛ nɛ̀ ishudzyaa zã kɛpɔ mabu mabu nɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo tɛbabaa shu.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ ekulu wɔnɔ enu kibui gbã ɖɔɖɔ elete, kɛlɛ ababhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abha.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ adzya alɛ mɔ, nokulu Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ ɔlɔ.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Nɔsɛnɔ baadzya petee nɛ̀ ahɔɛ kpɛkpɛ dadalɛ nɛ balɛ olí.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Ɛlɔkɔ ɛlɛ kpɛ̀ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ inye mɛ sɛ̀ tɛ̀ nɔkalà keplukpa alɛ ɔkɔ badzya petee.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Paulo, Silvano Nɛ̀ Timoteo, bɔlɔ sɛsɛ ɔhaa nɛ Tesalonika gɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo mɛ keplukpa alɛ,

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ. Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ buhu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be ɔkɔ wɔnɔ, kɛpɛ ana, ɔmɔsɛ gɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kpe tɔɖɔ soɔ, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ kpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ tsyɛ kpe tɔɖɔ.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaa nɛishiɛ, butũ ahɔɛ nɛitélũ nɛ kana gɛ nɔkpɛ kemi nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, kede tɛtɔtɔnɔ nɛ̀ tifefekeɖiɛ gɛ nɔkpɛ emi ɔkɔ.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Alɛ pete ebu akasɛ asɛ Owusoso Akaa kebhu kukuluɔ alɛ kalɛ ɔzãkɔ, kɛlɛ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, babà kalà wɔnɔ asɛ banɔ gɛ ɔna ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ɔŋãkɔɔ, gɛ bɔlɛ shu nɔmɔ bɔtɔ ɔlɛ.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa atɛasɛ asɛnɛ, aba buia bɔtɔ ɛbhɛ akɔ bagɛ bakpɛ wɔnɔ buluhũɔ

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: kɛlɛ abakɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ bakpɛ buluhũɔ emoelè, kana bɔlɔ tsyɛ. Kibui ɛlɛ babà ɛlɛ mɛ gɛ onupɛ Apalete Yesu ekoeyì denɔ kititíɛ nɛ kifu gɛtã ɔplɛnɔ yɛ ohumi axɔ̃ɛdɛ.

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: Abapɔ̃ batɔ̃ akɔ bagɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa pɛ batɛ abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ kibui gbangbã gɛide Apalete Yesu ɔkɔ nabha.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Babà pɔ̃ atɔ akɔ alɛ nɛ̀ butsi tihɔɔ kɛlɛ abàdã kidzo akpɛ alɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ nɛ̀ yɛ bukusiŋaŋã ohumi namɛ

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: nɛ kiwui ɛlɛ nabha gɛ ababaa sɛ tɛ badalɛ yɛishu nɛ yɛ banɔ dadalɛ nɛishiɛ, nɛ̀ tɛ yɛibui bhɛtɛ bagɛ ayɛkɛ yɛabha ŋã pete nɛibì. Wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔkpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔyɛkɛ kibuiɛ gɛ bɔmɔlú pɛ butseɖe wɔnɔ nabha ɔŋã.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Gɛ kibui ɛlɛ kpasɛ bɔlɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ soɔ, bukulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu kibè nyia bè, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa ayɛkɛ wɔnɔ asɛ nɔna ɔkɔ yɛ tikukuluɔ, kɛlɛ nɛ yɛ ohumi nulũɔ, ababhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ wɔnɔ ebui gbangbã tɔtɔɖɔ nɛ̀ katsɛɖɛ bubu ka nyia ka gɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kɔ nobuɔ nabha.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: Buukulù Owusoso Akaa nɛ kibui ɛlɛ ɛtakpu sɛ tɛ̀ badalɛ Apaleteɛ Yesu kinye nɛ wɔnɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɛ yɛ mɛ, nɛ kibhuiɛ gɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo ebhui bɔlɔ buɔ nulũ.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Nɛ Apalete Yesu tɛbaba nɛ̀ bɔlɔ tishoshogò nɛ̀ yɛishuɔ, bubisi wɔnɔ, badzya,

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ nɔtɛkɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ kibui ɖɔlù, bulũ bhui bhui, alo keplukpa tieli gɛ basɛ kede bɔlɔkɔ pɛ kaɖɔ sɛ Apaleteɛ nɛiwuiɛ tɛba kukuku.

english_verse: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛkɔ anɔ nanà awɔɛ wɔnɔ ɔganà kidzo nanà abha, ɔmɔsɛ flogo tɛ kiwui ɛlɛ baà, kɛlɛ sɛ kititì lɔlɔ putɔ, kɛlɛ bebebu Satana akasɛ, anunɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ butsi elu akɔ.

english_verse: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
translation_verse: Anɔ alɛ aba lɔɛtití kɛlɛ ebe feke yɛishu nɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bekulu sɛ Owusoso Akaa alo pɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ shu, sɛ tɛ edidzu yɛishu nɛ Owusoso Akaa uvũɔ mɛ asɛ yɛenu Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Nɔgɛ baka sɛ gɛ ɛzã wɔnɔ ɔbhaa, izitseɖe wɔnɔ ebui alɛ dza?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ otsi alɛ nɔonyi kɛgɛ kɔ yɛawɔ ideɛ, sɛ tɛ bebebu yɛakasɛ nɛ kibè gbangbã nabha.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Satana tikpukpũ mɛ ohumi nɔ gɛonu ɔsha abha mabhɛtɛ mabhɛtɛ lɔtɛ kpɛ ɔlɛ axɔ̃ɛ esi, pɔ anunɔ gɛedzu ahɔɛ nɛ yɛabha abazã ɛlɛ bha vɛnɔ odiyinɔ sɛ bebu yɛeyinɔ nɛidzoɔ ɛlɛ nabha.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ bebèbu kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ eleteɛ akasɛ, anunɔ gɛ Apalete Yesu abalɔkɔ yɛolugbũ mɛ ɛlɛɛ́ nɔ atsɛ yɛ atɛɛ niegbu nabha kɛlɛ abalɔkɔ yɛ titsetséɛ nɛ yɛ tɛbaba mɛ eyii nɔ.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Kɛtakpumɛ gagalĩ eleteɛ tɛbaba bashɔnɔ Satana axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ bebu akasɛ nɛ asɛnɛ atsyindzye ebui, bɔdɔ̃ bubu kasɛ nɛ̀ ebui gɛ abhɛtɛ ibi mɛ,

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: nɛ ebui kpa ka nyia ka ɛdi gɛ lawɔɛ bagɛ ayalaa. Bayala ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ dɛmɛ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nɛibui sɛ tɛ bebu alɛ.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ Owusoso Akaa asɛsɛ alɛ asɛnɛ ohumi sɛ tɛ bayɛkɛ asɛnɛ nabha ŋã

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ bebù bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ kibui gbã nabha ŋã nɛpɔ, pɛ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ eku alɛ same. Nɔnyanà Ebuiɛ Mɛ Ovunɔ Gagalĩi

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Pɔ badzya gɛ Apaleteɛ adɛmɛ nɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ buzi hu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kiwui nyia wui nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu, ɔmɔsɛ denɔ kesikpɛkpɛ mɛibeɛ, Owusoso Akaa ebu wɔnɔ elú ɔgana ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ nɛ̀ ɔlɛ axɔ̃ɛ dadalɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, nɛ̀ ɔganà kibui gbã tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ekulu wɔnɔ akpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔgana kibui gbangbã mɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔmɔ tɛdadalɛ gɛ kpasɛ ɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ mɛ.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔzã gagalĩi nɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛ bɔlɔkɔ kpɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ, onupɛ kizidzì olugbũ mɛibui alo keplukpa fɔfɔnɔ mɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: Tɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ, nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa, anɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɛ ɔlɔ pɛ nɛ yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ mɛɛ, akɔ ɔlɔ kemikpɛkpɛ tihɔɔ ɔkɔ kidzo gbangbã mɛ tiɖiɖiɛ,

english_verse: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
translation_verse: abakpɛ wɔnɔ kitúɔ niemi pɛ abakɔ wɔnɔ ohumi nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã ka nyia ka wɔawɔa nɛ kibuiɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔɛ nɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nokulu Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ ɔlɔ, sɛ tɛ Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ yì falanɔ nɛ tɛtsɛɖɛ bubu mɛ tɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ ɛlɛ, asɛ kɛlɛ gɛ kɛlɛ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ ana.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nokulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ bebu ɔlɔ odenɔ atakpu mɛ gagalĩ elete nɛ̀ banɔ zizĩ ahɔɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ gɛnɛ aka nyia aka yayɛkɛ aŋã.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Pɔ Apaleteɛ atɛasɛ asɛnɛ, abakpɛ wɔnɔ ohumi kɛlɛ ebebu wɔnɔ odenɔ anɔ kpa ahɔɛ mɛ.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Bɔyɛkɛ Apaleteɛ nabha ɔŋã sɛ notsiɖì ɛlɛ abha pɛ nɔbhɛtɛ, kɛlɛ nɔbɔ zã ɛlɛ abha ɔzɔbhɛtɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɔsha gɛ bɔkpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ abha.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ Apaleteɛ ashɔrɔ wɔnɔ etúɔ akpɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa nɛ kemi kpɛkpɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ. Titsetseɖe Nɔ Nɛ Kɛxɔ̃ɛ Mawɔa Mawɔa Shu

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo kinyeɛ mɛ, bɔɔkpɛ wɔnɔ ɔsha, sɛ nɔtɛ kpɛ ɔha nɛ adzya ka nyia ka gɛ edzi nɛ ahɔɛkpakpa pɛ atɛa zana ɛkpã nɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ odenɔ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ mɛ shu.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi katsɛɖɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ nobu tɛ nɔgã nɛ bɔlɔ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nulũ. Bɔgɛ zã kɛxɔ̃ɛ mawɔa mawɔa nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔ ɔbha,

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: alo pɛ bɔŋã anɔ teli bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔgɛ buia bɔlɛ ɛbhɛ. Kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ elishi nɛ̀ kemuze, kɛlɛ buuwu pɛ buuzhì nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ sɛ tɛ bɔtɛ badzi bɔtɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ nanà.

english_verse: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ gɛ bɔbhɛtɛ, kitinu sɛ gɛ bɔgɛ shɔnɔ sɛ bɔyɛkɛ tɛpɛplɛ nɔ ɛlɛ nɛidi denɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ so, pɔ sɛ tɛ bɔbhɛtɛ kasɛ wɔnɔ tɛ nɔgã nɛ ɛlɛ shu.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔ ɔbha tsyɛ elo, bɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ sɛ, “Onupɛ anɔ atɛba wɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ, atɛŋã bɔdɔ̃ tsyɛ.”

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Bulũ sɛ banɔ teli nɛ wɔnɔɛishi bedzi nɛ ahɔɛ kpakpa. Batɛ adɛmɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɛbui, pɔ olugbũ kedzi ete bagã.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Banɔ alɛ nɛidi bɔkɔ ɔsha pɛ bɔkpalà alɛ nɛ Apalete Yesu mɛ sɛ bapɛ ɔkɔ toli azã tɛ bawɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ tɛ baŋã ɔdɔ̃.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: Pɔ mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, wɔnɔ xɔnɔ, nɔtɛ mɔ ɔtɔ odenɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli agɛ bhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ bɔlɔ ɔsha kpɛkpɛ ɔlɛ nabha nɛ keplukpa alɛ mɛɛ, nɔolú awɔ̃ oɖi piapii. Nɔtɔ kpɛ yɛɔha, sɛ tɛ kiwũi yii.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔtɛ lɔkɔ yɛasɛ anɔ gɛ nɔtɔɖɔ olú ana, pɔ notseɖe nii asɛ adzya ana. Tɛsɛsɛnɔ Piapii Tili Idi

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ ishu yɔyɔ Apaleteɛ, akɔ wɔnɔ ishu yɔyɔ kibe nyia be nɛidzo ka nyia ka abha. Apaleteɛ azã aplɛnɔ wɔnɔ petee.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Tɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ zã ɔplɛnɔ wɔnɔ petee.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo gidzi, Yesu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛebu ɔlɔ yɛɔsha kɔkɔ nulũɔ nɛ̀ Yesu Kristoɔ gɛenu anɔ gɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ,

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: Mɛ sɛsɛ Timoteo mɛeyianyɛ gɛ akpasɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ keplukpa alɛ, Tibhui bhuibu, ashagabui ɖiɖi nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ de Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ. Titsetseɖe Nɔ Nɛ Asɛnɛ Ɔshadɔkasɛ Shu

english_verse: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
translation_verse: Asɛ kana gɛ ɛkpalà wɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛvɛ Makedonia nɔ, zã Efesoɔ tɛ̀ ɔkpɛ ɔsha ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ teli, sɛ batɛ zakasɛ asɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: alo tɛ̀ balɔkɔ ishu ashɔkpɛ asɛnɛ ebui nɛ̀ eshopo tɛshɔshɔrɔ gɛeti beleɛ mɛ. Ebui alɛ amana kawlɔ̃akɛ ebui ɔdɛ Owusoso Akaa kɛxɔ̃ɛ-gɛinu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã.

english_verse: You must teach people to have genuine love, as well as a good conscience and true faith.
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ kɛlɛishu bakpɛ ɔsha ɔlɛ kɛlɛinu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛide kitúɔ gɛ dalɛ nɛ̀ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ yɛmɛ adalɛ ɔplɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gbangbã.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Beteli ashɛ nɛ ebui alɛ ede pɛ betsyina avɛ kaɖɔɖɔɖɔ gɛ kesi lulũ nanà ama kalɛishuɔ mɛ.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bedzi ɔshadɔkasɛ, pɔ betinyi kɛnɔnɔ shu gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ alo kɛnɔnɔ abha gɛ batɔɖɔ kɛklagbuɔ.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Bunyi sɛ ɔsha pɛ gɛ onupɛ bawɔa ɔlɛ shu axɔ̃ɛ piapii.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Bunyi tsyɛ sɛ, bagɛ bhɛtɛ ɔsha akɔ banɔ dadalɛ pɔ babhɛtɛ ɔlɛ akɔ bagɛ betso ɔsha nɛ̀ batɔ̃mɛ gagalĩ eleteɛ. Bagɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ, bagɛ balɛishu gɛdalɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ batɛ akpɛ ketakpu esiɛ, lɔlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ eyí balɛ akaalɛ alo balɛ elĩ alɛ, lɔlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ eyi anɔ,

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: lɔlɛ ɔkɔ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ elete, nɛ̀ bagɛ abhɛtɛ atsɔ̃buiɛ, lɔlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ agã banɔ dzizì edziɛ, basɛnɛ elete nɛ̀ bagɛ betielũ atɔ̃ akɔ ɔsha-nɛ̀ kɛka nyia ka ɛdi gɛ kɛgã ɔtɔ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gbangbã shuɔ

english_verse: of the good news the glorious and wonderful God has given me. Being Thankful for God's Kindness
translation_verse: ɔsha gɛ lɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa gɛ beyulà yɛibui gbangbã, kibui gɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ mahɔɛ mɛ. Kibhuiɛ Gɛ Apaleteɛ Ebhui Paulo Ebu

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: Ihu bɔlɔ Apalete Kristo Yesu ahɔɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛakɔ mɛ ohumi, pɛ ayɛkɛ mɛabha aŋã sɛ ɛtɛsɛ asɛnɛ, pɛ ebu mɛ akɔ yɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: Gɛ itidzì anɔ gɛ ɛbhɛtɛ ebusoebui eɖi, anɔ gɛ atɔnɔ banɔ ede nɛ̀ anɔ gɛ azabhɛtɛ agbagbà ebui tsyɛ elo, ebi mɛ ashagabui, ɔmɔsɛ ɛbhɛtɛ alɛ petee nɛ matì matì nɛ̀ mayɛkɛ mayɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Apaleteɛ akɔ mɛ yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ nɛ tikpekpe mɛ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ kɛkpasɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu kibui gbã tɛɖɔɖɔ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bayɛkɛ ɛlɛ sɛ, Kristo Yesu aba kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ tɛ ebu ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ, gɛ nɛ balɛishiɛ, mɛinu ezizĩɛ ɔdɛ.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ beɖi mɛ ashagabui, sɛ tɛ nɛ mɛtakpuɔ, anɔ gɛezĩ adɛ nɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete nɛishi, tɛ̀ Kristo Yesu ebu yɛitu esi luluɔ gɛ ɛlɛ ɔtɔ̃kɔ ma akasɛ. Sɛ tɛ̀ bagɛ aba yɛkɛ yɛabha aŋã amɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Otsi nɔ, tɛ̀ Ekusiɛ gɛ abazã tihɔɔ nɔ, anɔ gɛ etibetsì eɖi, anɔ gɛ batɛamɔ yɛ, Owusoso Akaa gɛ yɛ ete, yɛ kɛlɛ sɛ balɔkɔ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ishu dadalɛ akɔ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ mɛ. Amen.

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Mɛeyianyɛ Timoteo, ɛkɔ wɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ sɛ tɛ ebuiɛ gɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ aɖɔ nɛ wɔshuɔ aba alɛ mɛ, sɛ tɛ onupɛ ɔzã alɛ edeɛ, obodzi axɔ̃ɛ gbangbã wɔawɔa elete,

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: tɛ ɔnyana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ ovunɔ nɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ adalɛ mɛ. Beteli agɛ yɛkɛ ebui alɛ abha aŋã, klisoɔ balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tsí.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Balɛ mɛ beteli balɛenu Himenaio nɛ̀ Aleksandro, banɔ gɛ ɛlɔkɔ alɛ kpɛ ahɔɛ ɔkɔ Satana sɛ akasɛ alɛ ɔdɔ̃ asɛ batɛɖɔ ebusoebui.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Putɔ nɔɔ, ɛkpalà wɔ ɔsɛ, kɛdɔ̃ bibisi, Owusoso Akaa tikukulu, pɛnɔsɛ tɛ̀ bekulu Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ anɔ teli alo tɛ behu ahɔɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ babhɛtɛ alɛ akɔ anɔ ka nyia ka,

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: akɔ bekusiɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ ɔsha nulũɔ, sɛ tɛ bɔzã nɛ ishu yɔyɔ nɛ̀ ɛkpã gɛyɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ishu dadalɛ pete mɛ.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ pɛ̃, gɛ kiku Owusoso Akaa gɛ ebu ɔlɔ awɔ̃,

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: anɔ gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ bebu anɔ ka nyia ka sɛ tɛ baba kibui titìɛ gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ mɛ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa tenikpo yɛalɛ, nɛ̀ anɔ tenikpo gɛevũ iboe nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ banɔdzyrame ishi, gɛenu Kristo Yesu,

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, bebu mɛ asɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ adɔkasɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ, tɛ ɛdɛ ɖɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ ɔkɔ alɛ. Kibui gbã mɛɖɔ, gɛnɛ asɛnɛ mɛsɛ.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Ɛpɛ sɛ banɔ gɛede ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ efeke balɛ ahɔɛ dadalɛ nɛitití ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu, tɛ̀ ɔmɔpɔɛ alo kibui wɔawlɔãkɛ tɛzã ɛlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: Ɛpɛ tsyɛ sɛ tɛ badzɛ akpɛ bɔdɔ̃ asɛ badzɛ ana, tɛ̀ apɔɔɖi, ɔkɔ ɔhaɛshi tɛzazã asɛ baadzɛ ana, gɛnɛ tɛ beyu ɛtakpu alo tɛ bazã sikã ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ gɛ yɛkɛ kedziɛ mɛ,

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: pɔ nɛ̀ ebui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ gɛ ashɔnɔ badzɛ gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ anɔdzɛ akpasɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ kaɖɔ maɖɔ maɖɔ nɛ̀ ishu esi zhizhinɔ mɛ.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: Ɛgɛ kɔ idzo sɛ anɔdzɛ akasɛ ɔdɔ̃ alo tɛ̀ akɔ anɔnyɛ ɔsha, kɛlɛ sɛ ataatɔ̃.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Adam beputɔ abhɛtɛ, flogo pɛ babhɛtɛ Xawa.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ gɛnɛ Adam bawɔɛ, adzɛ bawɔɛ pɛ ebedzì ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Pɔ bebèbu badzɛ ɔgana eyimɔmɔ mɛ, onupɛ bazã ɛlɛ abha nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã zazãna gbangbã mɛ.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ nu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibui gɛɖɔ ɔsɛ, Onupɛ anɔ teli atɔɖɔ edenɔ yɛitúɔ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ edzì osofo, ebu kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛiku awɔ̃.

english_verse: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
translation_verse: Kɛma ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bazã amɔ bamɛ tsitsí ebui nɛ osofo nɔ shu, edzì anɔ gɛ agbana adzɛ tenikpo, anɔ gɛ elu kitú esi, pɛ aŋã yɛishu abha, anɔ gɛ atɛkpɛ yɛishu awũi, anɔ gɛ adɛmɛ beefu tɛyɛyɛkɛ ibui pɛ alà kasɛ ɔdɔ̃ tsyɛ,

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: anɔ gɛ agɛ lɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ bunù gbagbla tɛwɔɛwɔɛ, etidzi agbagbà ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ elete pɔ edzì anɔ yɔyɔ, etidzi ebela pɛelete, pɛ adzã kiwuhũ nɛ ehoeyi shu.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɔsɛ edzi anɔ gɛeɖi yɛɔpã abha piapii, tɛ̀ eɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ asɛ beyi gɛ elu atɔ̃ piapii pɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔɛ alɛ yɛahɔɛ.

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Kɛma ɔsɛ tɛ̀ edzi anɔ gɛ etsyina avɔvɔ, onu gɛnɛ ana, ebefeke yɛishu kɛlɛ ebeku kebhu kukulu mɛ asɛ gɛ abosam tsyɛ ezhieku ana.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ edzi anɔ gɛ bagɛ ama ɔhaa mɛ tsyɛ adɛmɛ yɛibui, sɛ tɛ̀ atɛba mɔ awũi ebui, tɛ̀ ebezhieku abosam kɛgbã mɛ.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ bedzi banɔ gɛ banyana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ebui kpukpũɔ gɛedzuɔ mɛ evunɔ nɛitú dadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ beputɔ feke alɛ eɖi, kɛlɛ onupɛ kibui nanà ma balɛishuɔ, tɛ badɛ axɔ̃ɛ asɛ ɛzãkɔ bhlui elete ana.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, balɛ edzini alɛ tsyɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ bedzi baadzɛ gɛ banɔ adɛmɛ nɛ alɛ, betinu banɔ gɛ baɖɔ banɔ tibui, pɔ benu badzɛ gɛ belu kitu esi pɛ bayɛkɛ balɛ abha ŋã nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ ɔzãkɔ bhlui anɔ eleteɛ edzi anɔ gɛ agbana adzɛ tenikpo, pɛ alà eɖi yɛeyi alɛ nɛ̀ yɛɔpã abha piapii.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Bagɛ akpɛ ɛtakpu esi piapi nɔ amɔ tɛzazã gagalĩ piapi nɛ̀ kɛklagbu tɔtɔɖɔ nɛ balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: I hope to visit you soon. But I am writing these instructions,
translation_verse: Gɛ ɛtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ɛba wɔ bha gulũi tsyɛ elo, efɔnɔ ebui alɛ akɔ wɔ sɛ tɛ,

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: onupɛ ɛbawɔ kideɛ, obotì kana gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ azã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ Owusoso Akaa bɔpã mɛ, ɔhaa gɛenu Owusoso Akaa enunuɔ ɔyɛ, kɛgɛ inu bubhi asha, nɛ̀ buvũ esi kpɛkpɛ ɛklagbuɔ ɔkɔ kibui gbã.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ dɛ ebui bibisi alɛ petee kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, Owusoso Akaa mɛ ebuiɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ ibiɛ egbogblo. Owusoso Akaa ebu yɛishu akasɛ nɛ ishudzya mɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ bu ɛlɛ ɔkasɛ, baxɔ̃ɛdɛ amɔ ɛlɛ, baɖɔ ɛlɛ nɛ amadiɛ nɛishi, bayɛkɛ ɛlɛ abha ŋã nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ̀, befeke ɛlɛ avɛnɔ kitití nɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛɛ, beteli aba shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu pɛ babà kpatɔnɔ asɛnɛ ɛfɔfuĩa nɛ̀ ebui gɛ ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩɛ kasɛ.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ nɛidi de asɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ elete ɔkɔ, banɔ gɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ atã asɛ gɛ balɔkɔ ɔɖa kpɛkpɛ apɔɛ ɔdɔ̃ ana.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Bagɛ dɛmɛ asɛ tɛ banɔ agbana adzɛ, kɛlɛ bakpɛ alɛ ɔsha sɛ batɛ ŋã bɔdɔ̃ tuli idi, bɔdɔ̃ gɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ asɛ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ benyi kibui gbã ayɛkɛ nɛ̀ ahɔɛ huhu.

english_verse: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ pɛ̃, kɛlɛ kɛma ɔsɛ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kɛnanà shu onupɛ bayɛkɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ̀ ahɔɛ huhuɔ,

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ nɛ̀ yɛ tikukuluɔ kɔ sɛ bɔlɛ ishu dalɛ.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Onupɛ obu ebui alɛ ɔkasɛ badzyaa, obodzi axɔ̃ɛdɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ Kristo Yesu, gɛ banyɔnɔ nɛ kibui gbã tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gbangbã gɛ bɔlɛ ede wɔlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Tɛ kpɛ olugbũ nɛ bagɛ ama Owusoso Akaa edeɛ asɛnɛ ebui nanà mɛ, nɛ̀ badzɛ sheshèɛ balɛ ɛdzɛdzɛ tata mɛ, pɔ nyɔnɔ wɔ shu nɛ Owusoso Akaa kidzo nabha.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: , sɛ bɔlɔkɔ bɔlɔ otugbà mɛ ɖiɖiɛ ɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa enunuɔ ahɔɛ mɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛebu banunɔ petee nɛ butsi mɛ, asɛ bɔnɔ nɔ̀ gɛ bayɛkɛ aŋã ana.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Kɔ ɔsha tɛ̀ ɔkasɛ ebui alɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Tɛkɔ ɔsɛ ananà eɖi wɔ asɛ anuvɔ wɔonu so, pɔ kpɛ kibui tili olu ɔgana kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ mɛ, nɛ wɔɛkpã mɛ, wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ, nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ ɛkpã dadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ ɛba baa, lɔkɔ wɔ ishu ɔkpɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakla ɔlɛ mɛ nɛ banɔ ɛshi, ɔkɔ kibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ nɛ̀ kɛlɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Tɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛ bakɔ wɔ ɔgana ebuiɖɔɖɔ luɔ shu, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ banɔ sheshèɛ ɛzaa nɛ̀ ɔhaa mɛ tɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔabhaa.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Zã ebui alɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ abha, lɔkɔ wɔ ishuɔ petee kpɛ alɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, sɛ tɛ anɔ nyia anɔ amɔ wɔ otugbà vɛvɛɛ.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Lu awɔ̃ nɛ̀ wɔ ɛkpã nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ shu piapii. Kpɛ kemi nɛ bɔlɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ana, obo bu wɔ ishu nɛ bagɛ ɔkasɛ bɔdɔ̃.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Titseɖenɔ nɛ̀ anɔ sheshè gagalĩ, pɔ hu buluhũ kɔɛ asɛ wɔ akaa ana. Lɔkɔ bunuvɔɛ nɔ asɛ baadzya ana,

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: badzɛ sheshèɛ asɛ beelĩ ana, nɛ̀ badzɛnuvɔɛ nɔ asɛ baada ana, tɛ banyana ishu ovunɔ nɛishu dadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
translation_verse: Plɛnɔ bavɛvɛ edzɛniɛ gɛ ɛdɔ̃ nanà ma alɛ ahɔɛ.
