english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Pɔ onupɛ beyi alo beshui alɛ avɛvɛ yɛedzini ahɔɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ banɔ alɛ eputɔ ebu balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Akaa mɛ akasɛ, ɔgana kiɖi gɛ beɖi balɛ eshopo alɛ abha pɛ edzinì kɛbhɛ abuia akɔ balɛ elĩ nɛ̀ balɛ akaalɛ, ashuĩ nɛ̀ balɛ edze alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ ikù Owusoso Akaa nawɔ̃.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Avɛvɛ yɛedziniɛ gɛ kɛdɔ nana ma yɛahɔɛ pɛ yɛ ete yɛalɛ, yɛotugbà mɛ ɖiɖiɛ petee otsiɖi Owusoso Akaa nabha, kɛlɛ azã ɛlɛ abha elishi nɛ̀ kiwui mɛ tɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa tɛ ezebisi tepɛplɛnɔ edenɔ yɛahɔɛ mɛ.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Pɔ avɛvɛ yɛedziniɛ gɛ alɔkɔ ɛkpã ŋaŋã xɔnɔɔ, alɛ nɛkpã pɔ etitsí.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ ɔsha lɛ ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ tsyɛ, sɛ tɛ ananà atɛba mɔ̃ bamɛ tsitsí.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli etieɖi yɛeshopo alɛ abhaa, asɛ yɛɔpã mɛ anɛ anaa, agɛ yɛkɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kɛlɛ ezĩ adɛ anɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋãa.

english_verse: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
translation_verse: Kɛma ɔsɛ bakalà avɛvɛ yɛedzini nanà akpɛ bavɛvɛ edzini alɛ nɛishi odiyinɔ sɛ eshè afala ɔgɔ afɛtehlo, pɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ akɔ yɛenyineɛ

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: pɛ benyi yɛ piapii ɔkɔ yɛ ebui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, asɛ beyi abha tiɖiɖi ana, asɛ beefu tɛyɛyɛkɛ, anɔ gɛ eplu bɔtsɛɖɛkpɔ akɔ banɔ dadalɛ, anɔ gɛ aplɛnɔ bagɛ beku kibui mɛ pɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akpɛ ebui gbangbã ka nyia ka tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Bavɛvɛ edzini alɛ gɛenu bubiteɛ xɔnɔɔ, tɛ kalà balɛ ɔkpɛ enyé alɛ nɛishi. Ɔmɔsɛ anyɛ tɛzazãna kibui bakɔsɛ batɛ balà alɔkɔ balɛishu akɔ Kristo, baba pɛ asɛ tɛ bazana anyɛ.

english_verse: and become guilty of breaking their promise to him.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ba mana kebhu kukulu nɛ balɛ ishu abha, ɔmɔsɛ bata esi nɛ balɛ bɔdɔ̃ tatanàa gɛiputɔɔ shu.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Nɛ kɛlɛ̀ niedeɛ, balɔkɔ balɛishu akpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ mawɔa mawɔa mɛ, pɛ banyɔ afala ode bɔpã ɔlɛ mɛ ɔvɛnɔ bɔlɛ̀ mɛ. Gɛnɛ sɛ gɛ bedzi kɛxɔ̃ɛ mawɔa mawɔa ete, pɔ baɖɔ banɔ shu tibui pɛ bezĩ banɔ shu, pɛ baɖɔ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ kɛma sɛ tɛ baɖɔɔ.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Kliso pɛ itseɖe badzɛ gɛ beke shè pɛ benu bavɛvɛ edzini alɛ asɛ bazana anyɛ, tɛ bamɔ eyi, tɛ beɖi balɛ bɔpã abha tɛ batɛkɔ Satana idzo nɛ olugbũ kedzi gagã shu.

english_verse: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
translation_verse: Kibui gbã beteli xɔnɔ eti tsyina pɛ batɔnɔ Satana kukuku.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Onupɛ adzɛ teli gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã, pɛ bavɛvɛ yɛedzini alɛ yɛɔpã mɛɛ, akɔ alɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ tɛ betidzi bɔtɔ ɔkɔ ɔhaa, sɛ tɛ ɔhaa tsyɛ alà aplɛnɔ bavɛvɛ edzini alɛ gɛ bapɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ gagalĩ nɔ.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Besheshèɛ gɛ beɖì ɔhaa nabha, kɛshɔnɔ ɔsɛ balɔkɔ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ gbangbã tili idi akɔ alɛ, asɛ banunɔ gɛ balɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa kɛlɛinu kibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ nɛ̀ kɛlɛ tɛkakasɛ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kibuiɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Nɔtɛnyã olugbũ ɔkɔ enyíɛ gɛ yɛehu amɔɔ, “kɛlɛ” Axɔ̃ɛwɔa ashɔnɔ ɔkɔ yɛbhɛ babuia nɔ.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ obu anɔ sheshè nanà ɛpɔ, odiyinɔ ɔsɛ banɔ taabha alo tata azã amɔ̃ pɛ baɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ ɛlɛ shu.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Bagɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpaa xɔnɔɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ betseɖe nɛ balɛ nɛ ɔmaɛshi, sɛ tɛ bagɔgɔ alɔkɔ eɖi balɛ ishu abha nɔ.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: Ɛlɛkɔ ɛlɛ kpɛ wɔahɔɛ sɛ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu nɛ̀ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ namɛɛ, tɛ ɔnyana ebui alɛ mɛ ovunɔ banɔ amɛ maɖi maɖi, kɛlɛ tɛbhɛtɛ kɛnanà tsyɛ ɔlɔkɔ oku banɔ awɔ̃ nɔ.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Dɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔkɔ ahɔɛ tɔtɔɖɔ nɛ anɔ abha, kɛlɛ tɛzã ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete ede. Za nɛkpã nɛ wɔshu dadalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Yɔlɔ bulĩ ete tɛwɔwɔ̃ɛ, tɛ ɔwɔ̃ɛ bunu tsyɛ ɛbɔbhlui ɔkɔ wɔ ɛyamɛ gɛtã wɔ nɛ̀ banyã gɛ bakpɛ wɔ buluhũɔ so.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Banɔ teli ebui kpa gɛ babhɛtɛ abawɔ̃ɛ, gɛ leeku kebhu okulukɔ gɛ ɔlɛ otugbà, ebui kpa gɛ beteli xɔnɔ abhɛtɛ alɛ balɛ ede.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Nɛidzo ɛlɛ abhaa, ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ tsyɛ awɔ̃ɛ, kɛlɛ agɛ atɛawɔ̃ɛ tsyɛɛ, batɛ balà alɛ ekpũ.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Banunɔ petee gɛ akpasɛ banɔ dzidzì ɔsha niesiɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ balɛ apalete alɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ batɛ bagã olũgbu kedzi nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛinyéɛ nɛ̀ yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ shu.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Bagɛ balɛ apaleteɛ ayɛkɛ Kristo abha ŋã batɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ badzya benu soɔ batɛ akpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ balɛ apalete alɛ. Nɛ kɛlɛ inye mɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ bedzi baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ amɔ kibui gbangbã odenɔ balɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ enu bayɛyɛkɛŋã, pɛ badɛmɛ alɛ kibui. Ebui alɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ɔkasɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ kpalà alɛ nɔ. Ehoeyi Tɛdɛdɛmɛ Nɔ̀

english_verse: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli akasɛ asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ pɛ agɛ dɛmɛ atɔɖɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛebuiɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ nabhaa,

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: efeke yɛishu kɛlɛ etielũ kɛnanà esi. Enu anɔ gɛ akpɛ same nɛ ebui wɔawlɔ̃akɛ gɛ kesilulũ nanà ama alɛ shuɔ mɛ, ebela pɛpɛɛ nɛ̀ ebui gɛ la mana kiwuhũ dzadzã, anɔ nyanyana kpɛ ɛyamɛ, anɔ shu zizĩ ebui tɛɖɔɖɔ, kizizĩ tɛlɔlɔkɔ nɛ anɔ shu,

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: nɛ̀ kawlɔ̃akɛ ebui kibe nyia be nɛ banɔ gɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ agɛ dalɛ nɛishi, banɔ gɛ bagɛ pɛasɛ eti kibui gbã pɛ abhɛtɛ alɛ asɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ tɛzazã nu kidzo ɔkɔ ehoeyi tɛmɔmɔ.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Pɔ Owusoso Akaa mɛ tɛzazã gɛixui anɔ nu kɛdɔ̃ gikpe.

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ bɔgɛ mana kɛdɔ̃ nanà nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɔtɛ balɔkɔ kɛnanà tsyɛ ɔshɛnɔ nɛ kalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Pɔ onupɛ kɛdɔ̃ ŋaŋã nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ lɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛɛ, nɔkɔ kiku ɔlɔ awɔ̃.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Banɔ gɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ bamɔ ehoeyiɛ, bezhieku tifefekeɖi nɛ̀ kɛgbã dɔdɔ mɛ nɛ bɔga dɔdɔ ebui, nɛ̀ ebui kpa gɛ lagbana anɔ kpɛ kizizĩ nɛ̀ butsi mɛ.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ ehoeyi tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ alɛenu iguɔ ɔkɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ petee. Banɔ teli gɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ bamɔ ehoeyiɛ, betsyina nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu kɛlɛ bakpɛ balɛishu apɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ gelee. Kɛgɛ Paulo Akpɛ Ahɔɛ Akɔ Timoteo

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Pɔ wɔ, Owusoso Akaa anɔ, bu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ɔshɛ nɛ ebui alɛ petee shu, tɛ ɔtɔnɔ ebui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, Owusoso Akaa mɛ tɛzazã, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, kemikpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ anɔ yɔyɔ tidzidzi ede.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Bu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tɛtsɛɖɛ gbangbã mɛ. Nyana kanɔ tihɔɔ ɛkpã mɛ ovunɔ, agɛ alɛ shu bekulu wɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɔdalɛ ishumɛ nɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ gɛ bazã mɔ ebuiɛ namɛ.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛakɔ kɛdɔ̃ ka nyia ka ɛkpã, nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu, anɔ gɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ adalɛ kibuiɛ mɛ nɛ Pontio Pilatoɔ amɛ, adalɛ kibui mɛ piapii, gɛ kɛlɛ mɛlɔkɔ kpɛ wɔahɔɛ

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: ɔsɛ tɛ ɔnyana ɔsha mɛ ovunɔ tɛ kihututũ alo kɛpɔ bubu nanà tɛ ba kɔ wɔ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo ebetsyina aba,

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa aba mana nɛ yɛahɔɛ kibeɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ mɛ, Owusoso Akaa gɛ beyula pɛ yɛete yɛaŋã Ukusiɛ, bekusiɛ petee balɛ Ekusi, nɛ̀ bapaleteɛ petee balɛ Apalete,

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: anɔ gɛ yɛete yɛetitsì, nɛ̀ anɔ gɛ akpasɛ kifu gɛ anɔ atɛ balà tsoplɛnɔ nɛishiɛ, anɔ gɛ ananà aka mɔ yɛeɖi alo pɛ abamɔ eɖi tsyɛ. Yɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bakpɛ yɛinye nɛ̀ yɛohumi nɛitití ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Amen.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Kpɛ obo kanɔ alɛ mɛ ehoeyi eleteɛ ɔsha tɛ betifeke ishu alo tɛ balɔkɔ otugbà mɛ tiɖiɖiɛ atɔɖɔ ehoeyi mɔmɔ abha, gɛ betinyi kɛgɛ baba, pɔ balɔkɔ balɛ otugbà mɛ tiɖiɖiɛ atɔɖɔ Owusoso Akaa nabha, anɔ gɛ yɛakɔ bɔlɔ ehoeyi nɛ̀ kɛka nyia ka ɔkɔ bɔlɔ samɛ mɔmɔ.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Kpɛ alɛ ɔsha sɛ babhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã, sɛ tɛ bamɔ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ nɛ ebui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, nɛ̀ tɛ balɛ ɛyamɛ pɛ̃ tɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ anɔ zã alɛ mɛ.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: Nɛidzo ɛlɛ abhaa, bebe shogò ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ akɔ balɛishu asɛ buvũ esi kpɛkpɛ ɛklagbu gɛ gagalĩ ɔkɔ kibèɛ gɛbaa, sɛ tɛ bamɔ ɛkpã gɛ ɛlɛinu ɛkpã gbangbã.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoteo, balɛ gɛdɔɔ gɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ wɔahɔɛ piapii lo. Tsyina ɔshɛ nɛ ebui ɖɔɖɔ nɔnɔ gɛ lagɛ kpaplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa, nɛ̀ kititì lɔlɔ ebui gɛenu asɛnɛ ebui gɛ baɖɔ asɛ alɛ enu kibui titìɛ shu,

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: ebui gɛ banɔ teli baɖɔ elu, kɛlɛ nɛ ebui alɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, bashɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã niede. Tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔ o.

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Paulo, gɛenu Yesu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ, nɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ olu ɔkɔ ɛkpã zazãna gɛlɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ,

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: Ɛsɛsɛ Timoteo, mɛeyianyɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ keplukpa alɛ, Tibhui bhuibu, ashagabui ibi nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu gɛenu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ. Kemikpɛkpɛ Banɔ Tɛ̀ Baɖɔ Olugbũ Tonikpo

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: Ihu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ, anɔ gɛ ɛkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ, asɛ kana gɛ mɛashuĩ alɛ abhɛtɛ, nɛ̀ ekpeɖekpeɖe dadalɛ mɛ, ɔmɔ asɛ kɛbakà gɛ ɛbakà wɔɛbui elishi nɛ̀ kemuze kibe nyia be nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: Ɛbakà ɛwɔmɛ gɛ ozobiɛ, kinu mɛ tɛpɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ wɔ, sɛ tɛ same eku mɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Batɛkɔ mɛitì nɛ wɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gbangbã shu, gɛ kiputɔ zã wɔedzé Lois nɛ̀ wɔelĩ Eunike mɛ, kɛlɛ kɛzã mɛuli sɛ kɛkpasɛ wɔ tsyɛ mɛ ana.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, ɛbaka wɔ sɛ tɛ̀ ɔkpɛ kifù nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛkpasɛ wɔ mɛ, ɔgana mɛahɔɛ tɔtɔɖɔ nɛ wɔabha mɛ.

english_verse: God's Spirit doesn't make cowards out of us. The Spirit gives us power, love, and self-control.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa agɛ kɔ ɔlɔ ɔfɔfuĩa gɛ lodzi yɔɔ nɔ, pɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ohumi ɔkpasɛ ɔlɛ mɛ pɛ lɔonu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɛ̀ ishu abha tɛŋaŋã.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Kliso tɛkɔ kiwũi yi wɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ shu, alo tɛ kiwũi yi wɔ nɛ mɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ shu. Pɔ plɛnɔ mɛ nɛ bɔtɔ gɛ ɛmɔ nɛ kibui gbangbã shu, nɛ Owusoso Akaa ohumi nɔ shu,

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: anɔ gɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ pɛ ekulu bɔlɔ amana ɛkpã gɛ ɛlishu dalɛ mɛ, gɛnɛ kɛnanà gɛ bɔbhɛtɛ shu so, pɔ nɛ yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibuɔ shu so. Bakɔ ɔlɔ tibhui bhuibu ɛlɛ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ flogo pɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ abakpɛ esi,

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: pɔ otsi alɛ bebu ɛlɛ akasɛ ɔgana agɛ yayɛkɛ akɔ ɔlɔ tɛbaba mɛ, Kristo Yesu, anɔ gɛ aŋã butsì abha pɛ alɔkɔ ɛkpã gɛ bazã tihɔɔ nɔ amana tɛdadalɛ ɔgana kibui gbangbã mɛ.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ shuɔ, bedzu mɛ otugbà anɔ, anɔkpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ adɔkasɛ.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Kliso pɛ ɛmɔ bɔtɔ ɔlɛ asɛ gɛ ɛmɔ ana. Pɔ kiwũi tiyi mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ inyi anunɔ gɛ yɛabha mɛyɛkɛŋã, kɛlɛ ɛyɛkɛŋã sɛ abalà anyanã kibuiɛ gɛ ɛkpɛ yɛahɔɛ ovunɔ ɔvɛnɔ kiwui ɛlɛ nabha.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ nɔolũ odenɔ mɛɔkɔ, nɔnyanà ɛlɛ ovunɔ asɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ piapii, ɔplɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Nyanà kibui gbangbã gɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ wɔ ahɔɛ mɛ ovunɔ piapii, nyanà ɛlɛ mɛ ovunɔ ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gɛ ɔkpasɛ ɔlɔ mɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ mɛ.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Onyi ɔsɛ aka nyia aka gɛ akpasɛ Asia ɔdɔ̃ mɛ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛishu, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ Figelo nɛ̀ Hermogene tsyɛ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Kɛkɔ sɛ tɛ̀ Apaleteɛ ebu yɛashagabui bibiɛ akasɛ Onesiforo yɛɔpã, ɔmɔsɛ akpɛ mɛ kemi kibe nyia be kɛlɛ kiwũi tiyii nɛ ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ shu.

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: Nɛ kɛlɛ shuɔ, gɛ ebeku Roma nɔ, apɛɛ mɛ nɛ̀ awuhũ dzadzã ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ amɔ mɛ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Kɛkɔ sɛ tɛ̀ Apaleteɛ aplɛnɔ yɛ tɛ amɔ ashagabui ɖiɖi nɛ kiwui ɛlɛ nabha. Onyi edzo kpekpèɛ gɛ alɛ abha yɛaplɛnɔ mɛ piapii nɛ Efesoɔ.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Wɔ, mɛeyianyɛ, zã gagalĩi nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ kpasɛ Kristo Yesuɔ mɛ.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Nɛ̀ ebuiɛ gɛ olũ mɛɖɔ nɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ gɛ azã amɔ ebui alɛ amɛ, lɔkɔ ɛlɛ ɔkɔ banɔ gɛ belu awɔ̃ nɛ balɛ abha pɛ balɛ tsyɛ ashɔ̃ asɛ bakasɛ banɔ bhlatɔ ɔdɔ̃.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Kpɛ emi nɛ ebui gagalĩ mɛ asɛ keyuadɛ akɔ Kristo Yesu ana.

english_verse: Soldiers on duty don't work at outside jobs. They try only to please their commanding officer.
translation_verse: Anɔ nanà atɛwɔa axɔ̃ɛ asɛ keyuadɛ ana, pɛ aza lɔkɔ yɛishu akpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ bhlatɔ wɔawɔa mɛ, onupɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ eku yɛanɔ gbagbla nawɔ̃.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Ayadɛ gɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ yɛeputɔ ayɛkɛ kɛŋaŋã gɛ bapɔ̃ kawɔ̃pɛ tieli.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Nɔbaka kibuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔɔ, ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ abakɔ nolũ ebui alɛ petee esi.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Baka Yesu Kristoɔ, anɔ gɛ befeke edenɔ bekpuɔ nɛishi pɛ enu David yɛeshui nɔ. Kɛlɛ nu mɛibui gbangbã,

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: gɛ kɛlɛ shu mɛmɔ bɔtɔ ɔlɛ vɛnɔ sɛ bakpɛ mɛ nɛ ɛɖahui mɛ asɛ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ elete ana. Pɔ bagɛ kpɛ ɛɖahui nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ xɔnɔ shu.

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ ɛkpɛ kemi ka nyia ka ɛdi ɔkɔ bagɛ bebuɔ, sɛ tɛ balɛ tsyɛ amɔ tibubuɔ gɛ kpasɛ Yesu Kristoɔ mɛ, nɛ tɛdadalɛ tihɔɔ.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ nu kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ gɛ baɖɔ asɛ, Onupɛ butsi plɛnɔ yɛɛ, bɔba zã nɛ ɛkpã nɛ yɛ tsyɛ,

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: onupɛ bɔkpɛ kemiɛ, bɔlɔ tsyɛ baŋã bukusi plɛnɔ yɛ. onupɛ bɔdã kadã nɛishuɔ, yɛtsyɛ abadã kadã nɔ ɔlɔ shu,

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: onupɛ bɔgɛ yɛkɛ ŋãa, yɛxɔnɔ abazã tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nabha, ɔmɔsɛ atɛ balà adã kadã sɛ etinyi yɛishu. Axɔ̃ɛwɔa Gɛ Owusoso Akaa Atɔɖɔ Ahɔɛ Nɛ Yɛabha

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Zã kɛlɛ abha tɛ ɔzɔ bakà alɛ nɛ̀ ebui alɛ shu. Kpɛ alɛ ɔsha nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ nɛ ebelà ebui ɖɔɖɔ shu, gɛ kɛnanà maɛlɛ mɛ, bagɛ elũ ɛlɛ ete kiizĩ.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Bhɛtɛ piapii tɛ̀ ɔlɔkɔ wɔ shu ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa, asɛ anɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛabha ana, axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ kɛma sɛ tɛ kiwũi yii pɛ enu axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ anyanã kibui gbã mɛ ovunɔ piapi.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Yɔlɔ kaɖɔɔ gɛetinu Owusoso Akaa shu ebuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ, ɔmɔsɛ banɔ nɔ gɛ balɔkɔ ishu akpɛ kaɖɔ alɛ nɛidi mɛɛ, bebe zĩ atɔɖɔ adɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Balɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ bayɛɛ asɛ kɛpɔ̃ ana. Balɛ mɛ beteliɛ balɛenu Himenaio nɛ̀ Fileto,

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: banɔ gɛ beyì ide nɛ kibui gbã shu. Baɖɔ asɛ tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ tɛba bafalanɔ, kɛlɛ bezĩ beteli tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Pɔ, Owusoso Akaa uvũ esi kpɛkpɛ klagbuɔ xɔnɔ dzi gɛ ɛtɛbà hɔa, pɛ badã ɛlɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ kibui fɔfɔnɔ ɛlɛ ɔsɛ, “Apaleteɛ enyi bagɛ enu yɛayɛ, kɛlɛ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ adalɛ Apaleteɛ nɛinye shuɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ eyidè nɛ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui shu.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Nɛ bɔpã hohoe mɛɛ, gɛnɛ sikã balɔkɔ abhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka nɔ, pɔ babhɛtɛ tili tsyɛ nɛ̀ isi nɛ̀ tisi, teli alɛ akɔ ebui dadalɛ kɛlɛ teli tsyɛ alɛ akɔ ebui gɛ lagɛ dalɛ.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli eplu yɛishu edenɔ ebui kukuɔ mɛɛ, ebedzi anɔ gɛ abazã akɔ ebui piapii, gɛ babhɛtɛ ladalɛ, pɛ lapɛ̃ akɔ Apaleteɛ asɛ alɔkɔ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ gbangbã ka nyia ka ɛdi nɔ.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Bu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ɔshɛ nɛ bɔyisɔ̃ mɛ ebui zizĩ tɛpɛpɛ shu, tɛ ɔtɔnɔ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛishu adalɛ, gɛenu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ede, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ bagɛ bekulu Apaleteɛ odenɔ kitúɔ gɛ dalɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Tɛkpɛ ɔha nɛ̀ bɔga ebui tɛwɔawlɔakɛ, ɔmɔsɛ onyi ɔsɛ lamanà ebelá ebui.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Pɔ kɛma ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ apɛ ebelá, pɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ yɛyamɛ pɛ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka, kɛlɛ sɛ alà bɔdɔ̃ akasɛ, atɛza akpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Bagɛ balɔ kititì nɛishuɔ tsyɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ yɛishu mɛ yɔ tɛ ebu ebui esi ɔkɔ alɛ, nɛ̀ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa abakɔ alɛ etú mɛ tsyitsyina gɛ ɛba gbana alɛ vɛnɔ kibui titìɛ gɛinu kibui gbã mɛ,

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ babavɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ, pɛ bebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ashɛ nɛ abosam kɛgbã shu, anɔ gɛ alɔkɔ alɛ asɛ banɔ dzidzi tɛ̀ babhɛtɛ kɛgɛ yɛapɛɛ nɔ.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Pɔ kpɛ kibui ɛlɛ awɔ̃ olu ɔsɛ. Kibè kpa babà nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: People will love only themselves and money. They will be proud, stuck-up, rude, and disobedient to their parents. They will also be ungrateful, godless,
translation_verse: Baanɔ abadɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ balɛishu, banɔ aba adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ehoeyi, bebetũ ahɔɛ nɛitélũ, bebe feke ishu, babà kwɔalà ɔdɔ̃, babà gagalĩ atɔ̃ mɛ nɛ balɛ elĩ nɛ̀ balɛ akaa alɛ shu, ahɔɛ mahumahu, ishu madalɛ madalɛ,

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mazã mazã, batɛ balɔkɔ kibui etsye anɔ, bebezĩ banɔ shu, batɛ balà balɛishu abha aŋã, atakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui, batɛ badɛmɛ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ kibuiɛ gɛpɛ̃,

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: babà kpɛ anɔ ahɔɛ, babà pɛ bɔdɔ̃ ziazia, baba yɛkɛ balɛishu abha aŋã, baba dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ kanɔ mɛ same mɔmɔ ebui ɔdɛ Owusoso Akaa-

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: babà abhɛtɛ ishu asɛ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ kpasɛ alɛ mɛ, pɔ babà shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kɛlɛ ohumi nɔ shu. Tɛ kpɛ alɛ ɔha.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: Benu banɔ ɛdi tili gɛ shɔku bapãmɛ asɛ kɛsɔ̃ pɛ baŋã badzɛ gɛ ohumi ɔma balɛ ahɔɛ nabhaa, badzɛ gɛ apɛ ana, pɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ akpasɛ alɛ mɛ pɛ bawɔɛ alɛ nɛ̀ ebui kpa ka nyia ka ɛdi tɛpɛpɛ mɛ,

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: babà kpasɛ bɔdɔ̃ kibe nyia be pɔ batɛ bamɔ kibui gbã alɔkɔ elu eɖi.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Asɛ kana gɛ Yane nɛ̀ Yambre alɔɛtití nɛ Moses shuɔ, kana ɛbe banɔ alɛ tsyɛ abalɔɛtití nɛ kibui gbã shu-banɔ gɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ agɛ dalɛ, banɔ gɛ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ balɛishu nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Pɔ batɛ bamɔ otugbà vɛvɛ, ɔmɔsɛ asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ nɛ banɔ alɛ shuɔ, balɛ bɔga dɔdɔ mɛ badalɛ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka. Kɛxɔ̃ɛ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ Gɛ Paulo Akɔ Timoteo

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Wɔ, onyi ibui odenɔ mɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ petee shu, mɛ ɛkpã gɛ idzinɔ, kɛgɛ ɛtɔɖɔ, mɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, mɛ kitú esi lulu, mɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, mɛ kemì tɛkpɛkpɛ,

english_verse: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
translation_verse: kede tɛtɔtɔnɔ, mɛ bɔtɔ mɔmɔ, ebui nɔnɔ ɛdi gɛ laba mɛabha nɛ Antioxia, Ikonio nɛ̀ Listra nɔ, kede tɔtɔnɔ nɔnɔ ɛdi gɛ ɛkpɛ kemi nɛ alɛ mɛ. Pɔ Apaleteɛ ebu mɛ edenɔ alɛ petee mɛ.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui gbã mɛɛ, babatɔnɔ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ azãna ɛkpã kɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Yesu Kristoɔ niede,

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ banɔ kpa nɛ̀ bagɛ abhɛtɛ ishu asɛ bapɛ xɔnɔ ebèzĩ atɔɖɔ, babawɔɛ banɔ kɛlɛ babawɔɛ alɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Pɔ wɔ xɔnɔɔ, zã ɛlɛ abha ɔzɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ ɔkpasɛ, pɛ olũ kɛlɛ esiɛ, ɔmɔsɛ onyi banɔ alɛ gɛ balɛ ɔkɔ wɔ kpasɛ alɛ odenɔ,

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ nɛ kana gɛ onyi Owusoso Akaa kibui odenɔ kinuvɔbe soɔ, kibui gɛ bhɛtɛ wɔ pɛ odzì ebuitinɛ ɔkɔ wɔ tibubu ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Kristo Yesu abha.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: Ebui fɔfɔnɔ luɔ petee enu Owusoso Akaa ɛbui gɛ afuĩa kpɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ akasɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɔ, tɛ̀ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ etseɖe nɔ nɛ̀ anɔ, tɛ balɔkɔ akpalà anunɔ, tɛ bewoese anɔ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ nɛ ishu dadalɛ mɛ,

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa anunɔ abalɔkɔ ɛlɛ epo yɛishu nɔ ɔkɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gbangbã ka nyia ka ɛdi.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: Nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu amɛɛ, anunɔ gɛ yɛebè kulu kebhu nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ nɛkpã nɛ betsitsiɛ, kɛlɛ nɛ yɛ tɛbaba nɛ yɛikusi ɔŋãkɔɔ, ɛkɔ wɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ sɛ,

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: Ɖɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ, balɛ sɛ onupɛ banɔ apɛ asɛ tɛ belũ kibuiɛ alo tɛ betielũ ɛlɛ tsyɛo, woese anɔ, tseɖe nɛ̀ anɔ tɛ̀ ɔkpɛ banɔ emi-nɛ kitu esi lulũ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ piapii mɛ.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kibèɛ baba gɛ, banɔ azapɛ asɛ tɛ belũ batɔ̃ akɔ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ piapii nɔ. Pɔ tɛ beku ishu awɔ̃ soɔ, babalɔkɔ badɔ̃ kakasɛ kpekpè akana balɛ ishu tɛ betseɖe alɛ kɛgɛ batɔ̃ gɛ awɔɛsɛ̃ alɛ apɛɛ asɛ tɛ belũɔ.

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: Bebè tsyina balɛ atɔ̃mɛ ashɛnɔ nɛ kibui gbã shu kɛlɛ bebè tsyina avɛ ɛdzɛdzɛ ebui shu.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Pɔ wɔ xɔnɔɔ, zã gagalĩi nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, kpɛ emi nɛ ebui gagalĩ mɛ, wɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ asɛ anɔ gɛ akanà kibuiɛ ana, wɔa axɔ̃ɛ petee ɔkɔ wɔ ɔhaa.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ batɛ lɔkɔ mɛ xɔnɔ a kpɛ ahɔɛ asɛ beyí, kɛlɛ kibeɛ na kɔmɛ tɛshɛshɛ.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: Ɛta keyu gbangbã, ibu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ beke, ɛnyana mɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ vunɔ.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Otsi alɛ xɔnɔ, balɔkɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ kikutuɔ abalɛ elu akɔ mɛ, kɛgɛ Apalete gɛenu kebhu gbangbã kukulu eleteɛ, abalɔkɔ akɔ mɛ nɛ kiwui ɛlɛ nabhaa, kɛlɛ gɛnɛ mɛ ete yɛabakɔ, pɔ abakɔ bagɛ eɖi yɛ tɛbaba idzo mɛ tsyɛ. Kɛgɛ Ɛmɔlu Nɛ Mɛishu Ahɔɛ Mɛ

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Bhɛtɛ kɛgɛ pɛɔdɛ tɛ ɔba mɛɔkɔ tsĩɔɔ,

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: Dema xɔnɔ gɛ adɛmɛnɔ nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛ soɔ, ashɛ ayɔlɔ mɛ avɛ Tesalonika. Kreske tsyɛ avɛ Galatia, kɛlɛ Tito tsyɛ avɛ Dalmatia.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka ete yɛalɛ mɛɔbha. Nɔpɛ Marko tɛ nɔgbanà yɛɔmana ɔmɔsɛ akɔ mɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ nɛ mɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: Ɛsɛsɛ Tixiko nɛ Efeso.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Onupɛ ɔbaa, lɔkɔ mɛ akpɛkpɛ dzloloɔ gɛ ɛshɛ yɔlɔ nɛ Karpo ɔkɔ nɛ̀ Troa nɔɔ, mana mɛ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ buplukpa nɛ̀ bagã bupiɛ.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Aleksandro gɛ anɔ bɔdɔ̃ɔ, abhɛtɛ kibui kpa tili nɛ mɛ. Apaleteɛ aba bhuia kɛbhɛ ɔkɔ yɛ nɛ kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛ shu.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Wɔ tsyɛ ɖi wɔ ishu abha piapi nɛ yɛishu, ɔmɔsɛ alɔɛtití nɛ bɔlɔ ebuiɛ shu gagalĩi.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Nɛ mɛ ishu ulũ bubuɔ gɛ iputɔ shuɔ, ananà agɛba plɛnɔ mɛ, pɔ aka nyia aka ashɛ ayɔlɔ mɛ. Batɛ̀ lɔkɔ ɛlɛ abuia kɛbhɛ akɔ alɛ nɔ.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Pɔ, Apaleteɛ azã aplɛnɔ mɛ pɛ akpɛ mɛ ohumi, sɛ tɛ ɔgana mɛabhaa, baba ɖɔ kibuiɛ akana, kɛlɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ ebelũ ɛlɛ. Kɛlɛ bebu mɛ edenɔ dzata olugbũ mɛ.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Apaleteɛ ebe bu mɛ odenɔ kibui kpa ka nyia ka ɛdi gɛ balɔkɔ nɛ mɛ shuɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ aba gbanà mɛ avɛnɔ yɛititì bukusi ɔŋãkɔ nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ. Ishu dadalɛ ɔkɔ yɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Amen. Bɔdɔ̃ Sɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Sɛnɔ Priskila nɛ̀ Akwila nɛ̀ Onesiforo balɛ ɔpã mɛ anɛ ɔkɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erasto azã Korinto, kɛlɛ ɛshɛ yɔlɔ Trofimo gɛ adɔ bɔnyã nɛ Mileto.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Ɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ obo ku ɛkɛlɛ flogo pɛ ekukùɔ ana. Eubulo, Pude, Lino nɛ̀ Klaudia nɛ badzya petee asɛnɛ̀ wɔ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Apaleteɛ azã plɛnɔ wɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ. Tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔ o.

english_verse: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
translation_verse: Paulo, anɔ gɛedzì axɔ̃ɛdɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ anɔkpɛkpɛ akɔ Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ bagɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu alɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, nɛ̀ kibuititìɛ gɛlɛ kibui gbã shu pɛ kɛgbanà anɔ vɛnɔ Akaa mɛ tɛzazã,

english_verse: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
translation_verse: tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ kibuititiɛ gɛipo ɛkpã tihɔɔ gɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ, gɛ Owusoso Akaa, anɔ gɛ atɛ sɛ asɛnɛ, atɔɖɔ elu akɔ ɔlɔ flogo pɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ abakpɛ esi,

english_verse: So, at the proper time, God our Savior gave this message and told me to announce what he had said.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ nɛ yɛ kibeɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ shuɔ, amana yɛibuiɛ nɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ ɔgana kibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ gɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ mahɔɛ ɔgana Owusoso Akaa gɛ ebu ɔlɔ yɛɔsha kpɛkpɛ mɛ,

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: Ɛlɔkɔ asɛsɛ wɔ Tito, mɛeyianyɛ gɛ ɔkpasɛ bɔlɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ de Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu gɛenu agɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ kɔ. Kɛxɔ̃ɛ Gɛ Bakɔ Tito Nɛ Kreta

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Kɛnɔnɔ shu so pɛ ɛshɛ yɔlɔ wɔ nɛ Kreta kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ owoese ebuiɛ gɛatɔ̀ pɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ wɔahɔɛ tɛ obu bagɛ abazã ɔha nulũ nɛ ɔma ka nyia ka mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ ɛkasɛ wɔ ana.

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: Kɛma sɛ tɛ kɛpɔ bubu zã osofo shu, edzi anɔ gɛ agbana adzɛ tenikpo, anyɛ gɛ yɛeyi alɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ betinu banɔ gɛ babhɛtɛ agbagbà ebui pɛ betielũ atɔ̃.

english_verse: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
translation_verse: Gɛ balɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɛxɔ̃ɛ akpɛ osofo ahɔɛ soɔ, kɛma sɛ tɛ bamɛ tsitsí ebui azã yɛishu-kɛma ɔsɛ tɛ eze feke yɛishu, etidzi anɔ gɛ akpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ ebui mɛ, etidzi enuwɔ̃ɛ, etidzi ebelapɛ, etidzi anɔ gɛ apɛ kanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ ɔgana kidzo kpa abha.

english_verse: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
translation_verse: Pɔ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ yɛyamɛ pɛ̃, anɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ pɛ, anɔ gɛ aŋã yɛishu abha, aɖɔ kibui nɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ, yɛishu dalɛ pɛ anyana yɛishu evunɔ.

english_verse: They must stick to the true message they were taught, so their good teaching can help others and correct everyone who opposes it.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ anyana kibuiɛ gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ pɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ ovunɔ gagalĩ asɛ gɛ bakasɛ yɛana, sɛ tɛ alà akpɛ bagɔgɔɛ nɔ emi nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ piapi tɛ etilũ bagɛ balɔ kititì nɛishuɔ atɔ̃.

english_verse: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ batɔ̃mɛ gagalĩ elete kpekpè alɛ, banɔ gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ ete, pɛ bawɔɛ anɔ, banɔ asɛ bagɛ bakpasɛ Yudanɛ ɛkɔɔ mɛ ana.

english_verse: But you must make them be quiet. They are after money, and they upset whole families by teaching what they should not.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ bakɔ bata atɔ̃, ɔmɔsɛ bezĩ bapãmɛ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛma ɔsɛ bakasɛ ɔkɔ kidzo kpa abha ɔdɔ̃ mɔmɔ.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Balɛ ahɔɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ tenikpo gɛ ede Krete nɔ tsyɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Kretanɛ enu basɛnɛ elete ɖaa, ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete nɛ̀ banɔ zhyɔzhyɔrɛ elete gɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ ɔtsɔ̃.”

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ shu gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nu kibui gbã. Klisoɔ, notseɖe nɛ alɛ odunu ɔlɛ, sɛ tɛ bazã piapi nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: tɛ batɛ taatɔ̃ nɛ̀ Yudanɛ asɛnɛ ebuiɛ, alo bagɛ atɛapɛ kibui gbã asɛ elũɔ ɔsha.

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
translation_verse: Nɛ banɔ gɛ balɛishu dalɛ shuɔ, kɛka nyia ka shu dalɛ, pɔ nɛ bagɛ batsɔmɔ̃ pɛ bagɛ yɛkɛ aŋã ɔkɔ xɔnɔ, kɛnanà shu gɛ dalɛ. Nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe nɛ̀ balɛ etúɔ mɛ atsɔmɔ.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Baɖɔ asɛ enyi Owusoso Akaa, pɔ nɛ balɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ xɔnɔɔ, betinyi yɛ. Banyana anɔ akpɛ ɛyamɛ, betielũ atɔ̃, kɛlɛ bagɛ na ɔkɔ kɛgbangbã nanà bhɛbhɛtɛ.

english_verse: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ ɔkasɛ kɛgɛ shɔnɔ pɛ kinu bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gbangbã.

english_verse: Tell the older men to have self-control and to be serious and sensible. Their faith, love, and patience must never fail.
translation_verse: Kasɛ banɔ sheshèɛ tɛ belu kitu esi, sɛ tɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ alɛ, ishu abha ŋaŋã, bazã piapi nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ kemikpɛkpɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Kana ɛbe, kasɛ badzɛ sheshèɛ tɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi nɛ kana gɛ baba zana ɛkpã shu, betidzi banɔ gɛ agã olugbũ edzi alo banɔ gɛ bawɔ̃ɛ bunu ebuku, pɔ tɛ bakasɛ kɛgɛ pɛ̃.

english_verse: so the younger women will be loving wives and mothers.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛɛ babalà kasɛ badzɛnuvɔɛ nɔ tsyɛ ɔsɛ tɛ badɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ balɛ enyine nɛ̀ balɛ eyi alɛ,

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: tɛ baŋã balɛishu abha tɛ balɛishu dalɛ, tɛ bazadɛ bɔpã mɛ axɔ̃ɛ, tɛ balɛ ɛyamɛ pɛ, tɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ balɛ enyine alɛ, sɛ tɛ ananà atɛɖɔ kaɖɔ kpà nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ shu.

english_verse: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, nɔkpɛ bayisɔ̃ nɔ emi tɛ baŋã balɛishu abha.

english_verse: Always set a good example for others. Be sincere and serious when you teach.
translation_verse: Nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛɛ, bhɛtɛ ibui ɔkasɛ alɛ ɔganà wɔɛbui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ. Nɛ wɔ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛɛ, kasɛ kana gɛ bazã nɛkpã, nɛ̀ bamɛ gagalĩ.

english_verse: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
translation_verse: Kasɛ kaɖɔ gbangbã gɛ batɛ balà lɔɛtití nɛ alɛ shu tɛɖɔɖɔ, sɛ tɛ kiwũi yi bagɛ balɔɛtití nɛ wɔ shuɔ, ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ mɔ kibui kpa nanà gɛ abaɖɔ nɛ bɔlɔ shu.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Kasɛ banɔ dzidziɛ ɔdɔ̃ tɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ balɛ apalete alɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, babhɛtɛ tɛ beku alɛ awɔ̃, tɛɖɔ kaɖɔ kpa kpɛ balɛ ɔkɔ,

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: kɛlɛ beti zuru alɛ, pɔ kasɛ alɛ ɔsɛ ɔyɛkɛ alɛ abha ɔŋã, sɛ tɛ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛ bayɛkɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa agɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ shu tɛ̀ apɔ ɔɖi.

english_verse: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ mana tibubuɔ koeyì ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ petee.

english_verse: He taught us to give up our wicked ways and our worldly desires and to live decent and honest lives in this world.
translation_verse: Kɛkasɛ ɔlɔ sɛ bɔɖɔ sɛ, “Ao” nɛ kɛgɛ gɛ kpaplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa pɛ kinu kanɔ mɛ ebui tɛpɛpɛ shu, nɛ tɛ̀ bɔŋã bɔlɔ shu abha, bɔɖɔ olugbũ tonikpo tɛ bɔzana ɛkpã ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ obo kanɔ alɛ mɛ,

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: nɛ kibeɛ gɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ tiyuyula gɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔɔ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bupo tiyuyula ɛwuiɛ gɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa gbagbla yɛ tɛdadalɛ nɛ̀ Yesu Kristo gɛ ebu ɔlɔ tɛbaba nabha,

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: anɔ gɛ yɛalɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ asɛ tɛ̀ ebu ɔlɔ denɔ atakpu mɛ gagalĩɛ petee mɛ. Tɛ̀ epulu ɔlɔ akɔ yɛishu asɛ banɔ gɛenu yayɛ, banɔ gɛ apɛɛ asɛ tɛ̀ babhɛtɛ kɛgɛ pɛ.

english_verse: Teach these things, as you use your full authority to encourage and correct people. Make sure you earn everyone's respect.
translation_verse: Ebui alɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ɔkasɛ. Kpɛ balɛ emi tɛ̀ ɔlɔkɔ ɔshakpɛkpɛ petee otseɖenɔ nɛ alɛ. Tɛkɔ ananà amɔ wɔ esi.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Baka banunɔ ɔsɛ bezhinì ishu esi akɔ bekusiɛ nɛ̀ ɔshaeleteɛ, tɛ belũ atɔ̃, tɛ babalɛ elù asɛ babà abhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã,

english_verse: and not say cruel things or argue. They should be gentle and kind to everyone.
translation_verse: tɛ̀ batɛ gã olugbũ kedzi nɛ ananà shu, bazã ishu yɔyɔ mɛ tɛ beɖi anɔ ashagabui, tɛ bezhini ishu esi ɔkɔ aka nyia aka.

english_verse: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
translation_verse: Kibè tili gɛ bafala, bɔlɔ tsyɛ zɛdɔ bɔga, bugizi lũ atɔ̃, bawɔɛ ɔlɔ budzi banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ kanɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ kalɛ mɛ same ebuiɛ petee. Bɔzana ɛkpã kpa kɛlɛ bɔkpɛ banɔ awɔ̃, bɔkɔ sɛ banɔ anyanã ɔlɔ akpɛ ɛyamɛ kɛlɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ nyanã bagɔlɔ kpɛ ɛyamɛ.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã gɛide Owusoso Akaa gɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ ekoeyiɛ,

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: ebu ɔlɔ, gɛnɛ nɛ bɔlɔ ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ shu so, pɔ nɛ yɛ ashagabui ɖiɖiɛ shu so. Ebu ɔlɔ ɔgana tiwuwlunɔ odenɔ tɛmɔmɔ vɔvɔ, nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gɛ lodzinì ɔlɔ mɔ́ avɔvɔ mɛ,

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ alɔkɔ ɛyamɛ gbangbã abalɛ̀ bɔlɔ abha ɔgana Yesu Kristoɔ gɛ ebu ɔlɔ nabha,

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ, onupɛ bebhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ ɔlɔ gana yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ mɛɛ, bɔbadzi kaŋãsi elete gɛ bɔbà ziɖi otugbàa mɛ ɔkɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔ.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ nu kibui gbã. Kɛlɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɔɖɔ ebui alɛ odzinɔ ɔɖɔ, sɛ tɛ bagɛ ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha aŋãa beɖi ishu abha piapii tɛ̀ balɔkɔ balɛishu akɔ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ. Ebui alɛ apɛ̃ kɛlɛ labà manà kibui gbangbã ɔkɔ aka nyia aka.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Pɔ yɔlɔ bɔga ebui wɔawlɔ̃akɛ, eshopo tɛshɔshrɔ nɛ̀ ebela ebui nɛ ɔsha shu ɔzɔ wlɔ̃akɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛnanà ma ebui alɛ mɛ kɛlɛ alɛ shu axɔ̃ɛ waɔwɔa nanà tsyɛ ama.

english_verse: Warn troublemakers once or twice. Then don't have anything else to do with them.
translation_verse: Kpɛ ɔsha ɔkɔ anɔ gɛ amana ɔtɔbubuɔ bɔkpɛ tunikpo, tɛ̀ owlui ɔkpɛ ɔsha ɔkɔɛ bɔbhalà. Nɛ kɛlɛ edieɛ, tɔɔkɔ fɔɛnii.

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ otì ɔsɛ anɔ alɛ nɛidiɛ, yɛtakpumɛ ku otumũ kɛlɛ enu ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete, ebe bu yɛishu ipɔ. Buluhũ Huhu Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: Kibè nɔnɔ gɛ ɛnya sɛsɛ Artena alo Tixiko nɛ wɔkɔ koɔ, kpɛ emi tɛ̀ ɔba mɛɔbha nɛ Nikopolis, ɔmɔsɛ ɛtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ sɛ ɛbazã ɛkɛlɛ nɛ ekukù mɛ.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Bhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ ɔbɔlà bhɛtɛ tɛ ɔplɛnɔ Zena gɛenu ɔshaetinɛ nɛ̀ Apolo gɛ onupɛ batɔnɔ kidzoɔ abaa, kɛlɛ ɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ baba pɛ nɔ lɛ balɛ ahɔɛ.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Anɔ ka nyia ka gɛalɛ mɛɔbha asɛnɛ wɔ. Sɛnɔ bagɛ adɛmɛ nɛ bɔlɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. Tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ petee.

english_verse: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
translation_verse: Paulo gɛedzi anɔ gɛazã ɔɖavũmɛ nɛ Yesu yɛtakpuɔ, nɛ̀ Timoteo gɛenu bɔlɔ adzya, Bɔsɛsɛ wɔ Filimon gɛenu bɔlɔ ɔbhia nɛ̀ axɔ̃ɛwɔa ɔhagbo keplukpa alɛ,

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: bɔsɛsɛ Apia gɛenu bɔlɔ ada, nɛ̀ Arxipo bɔlɔ ɔhagbo keyuta nɛ̀ ɔhaa gɛɔtɔ̃ ɛtakpu nɛ wɔ ɔpãmɛ keplukpa alɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu ɔkɔ akɔ wɔ. Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: Ihu ahɔɛ nɛ wɔɛtakpu nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ kibe nyia be,

english_verse: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ ilũ wɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Apalete Yesu abha nɛ̀ wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔkɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ yɛabha aŋãa petee nɔ.

english_verse: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
translation_verse: Ikulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ ɔgagalĩ nɛ wɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛ, sɛ tɛ ɔmɔ ebui esi lulũ nɛ kibui gbangbã ka nyia ka gɛ kpasɛ Kristo mɛ.

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: Wɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ kɔ mɛ mɔ same gbagbla nɛ̀ kemi kpɛkpɛ, ɔmɔsɛ wɔ, asɛ adzya ana, ɔkɔ sɛ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋãa etúɔ mɛ etsyina edzì avɔvɔ. Paulo Akɔ Filimon Kɛtakpu Sɛ Edzinɔ Onesimo Ayɛkɛ

english_verse: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
translation_verse: ɛkɔ wɔ ɛtakpu nɛ kɛgɛ kɛlɛinu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ shu. Mɛ Paulo anɔ sheshè pɛ otsi alɛ inu ɔɖavũmɛ azazã nɛ Kristo Yesu ɛtakpu,

english_verse: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
translation_verse: ɛkɔ wɔ ɛtakpu nɛ mɛeyianyɛ Onesimo shu, anɔ gɛ edzì mɛeyianyɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛzã ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
translation_verse: Kibeɛ gɛ bafalaa, agɛ pɛ̃ akɔ kɛnanà nɛ wɔ amɛ, pɔ otsi alɛ xɔnɔ ebedzì anɔ gɛ yɛishu axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa alɛ akɔ wɔ nɛ̀ mɛ.

english_verse: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
translation_verse: Idzinì anɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ mɛitúɔ mɛ̀ petee nɔ sɛsɛ wɔ.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Tsyɛ alo ɛta pɛ sɛ tɛ azã mɛɔbha tɛ ayɛkɛ wɔ zãkɔ ɔkɔ mɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã flogo.

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: Pɔ ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ ɛbhɛtɛ kɛnanà gɛ ɔgɛ kpɛ mɛ, onupɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ babà tyɛ, gɛnɛ gɛ bebètũ ɛlɛ akpɛ wɔ ulũ.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Ɔdɛ tsyɛ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ shu so pɛ bebu yɛɔtɔ nɛ wɔ ɔbha ɔkɔ kibè tiliɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ etsodzi aba wɔkɔ tihɔɔ,

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: ezeke dzi anɔ dzidzì, pɔ aba pɛ adɛ anɔ dzidzi, kɛlɛ abazã asɛ adzya ana gɛ ɔdɛmɛnɔ. Ɛdɛmɛ yɛibui, kɛlɛ ɔbɔ dɛmɛ yɛibui ɔdɛ mɛ asɛ anyɛ nɛ̀ adzya gɛ akpasɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ.

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: Kliso onupɛ ɔlɔkɔ mɛ asɛ wɔ ɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛwɔa ana, kɛlɛ yɛkɛ yɛ asɛ gɛ ɔbɔ yɛkɛ mɛ tsyɛ ana.

english_verse: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
translation_verse: Onupɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa tili alo adɔ kɛbhɛ tili nɛ wɔ shuɔ tsyɛ elo, bisi kɛlɛ odenɔ mɛahɔɛ mɛ.

english_verse: With my own hand I write: I, PAUL, WILL PAY YOU BACK. But don't forget you owe me your life.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo mɛ fɔnɔ kibui ɛlɛ nɛ̀ mɛahɔɛ. Ɛba dzini kɛlɛ buia-ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ mɛɖɔ sɛ wɔ tsyɛ ɔdɔ kɛbbhɛ nɛ mɛishu.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya, ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ kɛdɔ̃ tili denɔ wɔahɔɛ mɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ inye mɛ, kɔ mɛituɔ dzi kɛvɔvɔ nɛ Kristo mɛ.

english_verse: I am sure you will do all I have asked, and even more.
translation_verse: Gɛ ɛyɛkɛ wɔabha ŋã nɛ wɔ atɔ̃ lulũ shu so pɛ ɛfɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ lɛ kɔ wɔ, ɔmɔsɛ inyi sɛ ɔbɔ bhɛtɛ ɔdɛ kana gɛ ibisiɛ.

english_verse: Please get a room ready for me. I hope your prayers will be answered, and I can visit you.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ kibui tinikpo katɔ, woese befu ɔtsɛkɔ olú ɔkɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ iɖi idzomɛ ɔsɛ ɛbà tsodzì bà wɔ ɔbha tɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa gɛ okuluɔ ba ɛlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
translation_verse: Epafra anɔ gɛ akpasɛ ɔɖavũmɛ aplɛnɔ mɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ asɛnɛ wɔ.

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha Marko, Aristaxo Dema nɛ̀ Luka gɛenu mɛ ɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛwɔa tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ.

english_verse: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
translation_verse: Nɛ kuku ibeɛ, Owusoso Akaa azaɖɔaɖɔ aganà ebuiɖɔluanɛ nabha akɔ ɔlɔ ashuĩ alɛ gelee nɛ edzo edi edi abha,

english_verse: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
translation_verse: pɔ nɛ ewui gɔgɔ̃ɛ alɛ mɛɛ, aaɖɔaɖɔ akɔ ɔlɔ ɔgãna Yɛeyi nabha, anunɔ gɛ alɔkɔ edzu yɛaŋãsi mɛɔdɔ̃ nulũ, kɛlɛ yɛabha yɛagã abhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: Eyianyɛ alɛ yɛebu Owusoso Akaa yɛishu dadalɛ akasɛ, nɛ kɛlɛ gɛ alɛ nulũ, gɛ abhɛtɛ ebuiɛ pete aganà yɛohumi ebui ɖɔɖɔ nabha. Gɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ nɛ ɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ɛtakpu shu ebekeɛ, avɛ adɛzã esi nɛ Ohumielete nɛ ɛŋã mɛ nɛititíɛ.

english_verse: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
translation_verse: Kliso ebedzi anɔ gɛ aɖama adɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kinyeɛ gɛ bakɔɛ ɛɖama dɛ balɛ ɛyɛ.

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Pɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɖuwoe lu Owusoso Akaa atɛɖɔ etseɖe eɖi asɛ, “Mɛeyianyɛ wonu, oboɔ itsyina dzi akaa kɔ wɔ?” Kɛlɛ azaɖɔ asɛ, “Ɛbadzi Yɛakaa, kɛlɛ ebedzi Mɛeyianyɛ?”

english_verse: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
translation_verse: Gɛ Owusoso Akaa amana yɛeyi kusiɛ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ, aɖɔ asɛ, “Owusoso Akaa yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ petee nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔɛ.”

english_verse: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ nɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ shu asɛ, “Abhɛtɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ benu kɛlɛ fufù, kɛlɛ bagɛ adɛ axɔ̃ɛ asɛ kifú ɔɖɛklɛmɛ.”

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: Pɔ aɖɔ nɛ Yɛeyiɛ xɔnɔ shu asɛ, “O Owusoso Akaa, wɔekusi egbuɔ abazã tihɔ, tihɔ, kɛlɛ ibui gbã bhɛbhɛtɛɛ, kɛlɛ bazã wɔkusi tɛŋaŋãa mɛ.

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: Ɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ɛkpã gbangbã, kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ xɔnɔ ɔgɛpɛ, kliso wɔ Owusoso Akaa edzu wɔ nɛ ɔɖaɖama ɔkɔ ɔdɛ wɔhayɛ ɔgana same bɔbɔ̀ sasará kɔwɔ mɛ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: Azaɖɔ tsyɛ asɛ, “Denɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ esi kpɛkpɛ mɛɛ, Oo, Apalete, wɔ bhɛtɛ kesi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ esiakpa, kɛlɛ iwusoso nɔ nu wɔahɔɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa.

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: Bɔdɔ̃ lɛ nyɔ̃ɔ bazĩ, pɔ wɔ xɔnɔ ɔbɔzã tihɔɔ, bɔbatsã asɛ ishu udɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ ana.

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: Ɔbɔ kã bɔdɔ̃ asɛ akpɛkpɛ dzlolo, ɔmɔ asɛ akpɛkpɛ gɛ babà tsrakɛ. Wɔ xɔnɔ pɔɔ, titsyitsyina ma wɔ shu, kɛlɛ ɔtɔ̃kɔ ma wɔagɔ shu.”

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ mɛ eɖuwoe lu Owusoso Akaa atɛɖɔ etseɖe eɖi asɛ, “Zã mɛŋã mɛ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ ɛlɔkɔ bagɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɛ wɔ bhɛtɛ ɔtsɛɖɛdzudzu egbu ɔkɔ wɔtsɛɖɛ dza?”

english_verse: Angels are merely spirits sent to serve people who are going to be saved.
translation_verse: Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ petee nɔ pɔ, anɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ axɔ̃ɛ badɛ, gɛ Owusoso Akaa akpɛ alɛ asɛ tɛ baplɛnɔ bagɛ babà yɛkɛ edzu nɛ ɛkpãa dza?

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ bulu awɔ̃ piapii nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bulũ ɔshu, sɛ tɛ bɔtɛ shrɛrɛ tsrakɛ idzo.

english_verse: The message spoken by angels proved to be true, and all who disobeyed or rejected it were punished as they deserved.
translation_verse: Onupɛ kibuiɛ gɛ akaa yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ abaɖɔ alɛ ɛnyã ɔlɔ, kɛlɛ bagɛ alɔɛtití nɛ ɛlɛishu alo pɛ begilũ atɔ̃ɔ, babàmɔ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ gɛ ashɔnɔɔ,

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ́ bɔbalà bu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ, onupɛ bɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ tibubu gbagbla ɛlɛ nɛidi shu? Apaleteɛ etiputɔ akɔ tìtitì nɛ tibubu ɛlɛ shu, kɛlɛ bagɛ elũ ibuiɛ eputɔ nɔɔ, adɛmɛ atɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha akɔ ɔlɔ asɛ kɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ.

english_verse: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ aɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ ɛlɛishu ɔgana ɔdɔ̃ tibubu kasɛ, ebui gɛ leku ifu nɛ̀ atsyindzye ebui edi edi mɛ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔdɔ̃ ɔkɔkɔ nɛ yɛtɛdɛdɛ mɛ ulũ. Babhɛtɛ Yesu Asɛ Yɛadzya Alɛ Ana

english_verse: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
translation_verse: Bukusiŋaŋã nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛibui gɛ baɖɔ asɛ kɛbabáa, anɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ niesi balɔkɔ ɛlɛ akpɛ.

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: Pɔ ɔkɔ toli ɔlɛ gɛ anɔ teli adalɛ ɛlɛ mɛasɛ, “Kiɖe gɛinu anɔdzyrame pɛ wɔɛwuhũ tsiɖi yɛabha ana, Nɛ̀ anɔdzyrame yɛeyiɛ pɛ oɖi yɛabha ana?

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: Ɔbhɛtɛ yɛ yɛezhi esi ibɔɛ bhlui ko adɛ akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ, ɔkɔɛ ishu dadalɛ, kɛlɛ ɔkpɛ yɛinye nɛitití

english_verse: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ ɔlɔkɔ kɛka nyia ka ɔkpɛ yɛesi.” Gɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ kɛka nyia ka akpɛ yɛesiɛ, kɛlɛ́ kɛdɔ̃ nanà gɛ gɔ̃ gɛ atɛ baŋã ɛlɛ abha. Pɔ otsiɛ nɔɔ, kɛɛ kasɛ ɔlɔ ɔmɔ asɛ, kɛka nyia ka ma yɛohumi esi.

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: Pɔ bɔmɔ Yesu, anunɔ gɛ bezhinɔ yɛesi ibɔɛ adɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛɛ, otsi alɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔɛ ishu dadalɛ, pɛ akpɛ yɛinye nɛitití, ɔmɔsɛ yɛamɔ bɔtɔ pɛ etsí. Kɛlɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛ tibhui bhuibu nulũɔ, tɛ ètsí nɛ anɔ ka nyia ka yɛulũ.

english_verse: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Tɛ agbana beyianyɛ gelee amana ishu dadalɛ mɛɛ, kɛpɛ sɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ yɛenu anunɔ gɛ yɛabhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka, pɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ bɔlɛ, sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ Kristoɔ gɛ ebu ulɔ piapii nɔ, ɔgana bɔtɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ yɛakɔ banɔ tɛdadalɛ, nɛ̀ bagɛ babhɛtɛ asɛ tɛ badalɛ pete nɔɔ, bede kishopo tinikpo mɛ. Kliso kiti nu kiwuĩ ibui ɔkɔ Yesu asɛ tɛ ekulu alɛ asɛ yɛadzya alɛ.

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ɛbaɖɔaɖɔ dalɛ wɔɛnyeɛ shu ɔkɔ mɛadzya alɛ, kɛlɛ nɛ ɔha namɛɛ, ɛbazhã wɔdzɛ kpɛ wɔɛnye nɛitití.”

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: Azaɖɔ asɛ, “Ɛbalu awɔ̃ nɛ wɔabha.” Kɛlɛ azavɛ kɛlɛ abha asɛ, “Ɔmɔ mɛ, nɛ̀ beyiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ mɛɛ.”

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: Gɛ ishupi nɛ̀ dzyosu alɛ beyi alɛ mɛɛ, Yesu tsyɛ ezhinɔ ishu esi asɛ balɛ ana, sɛ tɛ gana yɛutsíɛ mɛɛ, tɛ etũ ɔtsɛɖɛ ayɛ Satana gɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ butsí ohumi nɔ ɔlɛɛ, gɛ yɛenu anɔ zizĩɛ

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: sɛ tɛ akɔ bagɛ butsí vũ alɛ asɛ banɔ dzidzi, pɛ bezesi utsí ifuɔ, ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazã.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ anɛ akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ yɛaplɛnɔ, pɔ Abraham yɛeshui alɛ.

english_verse: He had to be one of us, so he could serve God as our merciful and faithful high priest and sacrifice himself for the forgiveness of our sins.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ babhɛtɛi asɛ yɛadzya alɛ nɛidzo ka nyia ka abha, sɛ tɛ edzi banɔlũazazã gbagbla gɛ abalà eɖi ashagabui pɛ ababhɛtɛ ibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛxɔ̃ɛ mɛ, sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ nɛ banunɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ gɛ amɔ bɔtɔ nɛ yɛtifefeke ɖi mɛ soɔ, abalà aplɛnɔ banunɔ gɛ beefeke eɖiɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
translation_verse: Kliso mɛadzya dadalɛanɛ gɛ bekulu edeni ititíɛ, nɔkɔ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ azã Yesuɔ gɛenu anɔkpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ banɔlũazazã gbagbla gɛ yɛinye shu bɔɖɔaɖɔ dalɛɛ shu.

english_verse: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
translation_verse: Yesu abhɛtɛ ibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ akɔ anunɔ gɛ akpɛ yɛ ɔmɔ asɛ kɛbhɛtɛ gɛ Mose abhɛtɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaavũ ka nyia ka mɛ ana.

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Yesu ayɛkɛ inye gbagbla adɛ Mose, ɔmɔ asɛ kɛyɛkɛ gɛ evũdzuɔ ayɛkɛ inye gbagbla adɛ buvũɔ gɛ bedzuɔ ana.

english_verse: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
translation_verse: Buvũ ka nyia kaa, anɔ teli ko yɛedzu ulɛ, pɔɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛenu anunɔ gɛ yɛedzu kɛka nyia ka.

english_verse: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
translation_verse: Mose abhɛtɛ ibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaavũ ka nyia ka mɛ asɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ, pɛ azaɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ ebui mɛ nɛ agɛ babàɖɔ idegba mɛɛ shu.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Kristo xɔnɔ alɔkɔ ibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ, gɛ eɖi Owusoso Akaavũ nabha asɛ Eyi ana. Kɛlɛ bɔlɔ nu yɛɔpãa, onupɛ bɔkpɛ emi zã yɛede, pɛ buɖi yɛidzo mɛ nɛ̀ awɔ̃luluɔ gɛ butù itèlũ kɔɔ. Titsetseɖenɔ Nɛ̀ Bagɛ Agɛ Yɛkɛ Aŋãa

english_verse: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
translation_verse: Kliso asɛ kɛɖɔ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔɖɔɔ, “Oboɔ onupɛ nolũ yɛaɖɔɔ,

english_verse: don't be stubborn! Don't rebel like those people who were tested in the desert. *
translation_verse: nɔtɛ ɔgagalĩ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ asɛ kɛbhɛtɛ gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ nɛitití lɔlɔ mɛ nɛ tifefekeɖi ibe nɛ oxuiɛ,

english_verse: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
translation_verse: nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ wɔnɔ ashuĩ alɛ efeke mɛ eɖi pɛ bakpɛ mɛ uluhũɔ kɛlɛ nɛ agɔ afɛtalɛ mɛɛ, bamɔ ebuiɛ gɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ.

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Kɛlɛso pɛ ɛkpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ kibelianɛ shu, pɛ ɛɖɔ ɔsɛ, ‘Balɛ etúɔ ebu ɔtɔ nɛ mɛishu kiwui nyiɛ wui, kɛlɛ bagɛlà eti mɛedzoɔ.’

english_verse: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
translation_verse: Kliso aɖɔ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ tatanà nɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ mɛ asɛ, ‘Beti beku mɛomoelekɔ mɛ eɖi ɖa.’ ”

english_verse: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, noɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ, ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ etúɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã pɛ letsyina nɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã niedeɛ azã ɔnɔ ahɔɛ.

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔkpɛ bagɔlɔ emi iwui nyiɛ iwui, gɛ kiwui lɛ bekulu asɛ Oboɔ nɔ, sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ mɛ ananà aba gagalĩ atɔ̃ nɛ anɔ wɔɛwɔɛ mɛ.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Bɔbá sɛ tɛ bɔmɔ ɔtɔ plɛnɔ Yesu onupɛ bɔnyana kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi ebuiɛ gɛtɛ zã ɔlɔ ahɔɛ bafala nɔ mɛ vunɔ gagalĩ ɔvɛnɔ ewuiɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “If you hear his voice today, don't be stubborn like those who rebelled.”
translation_verse: Ɔmɔ asɛ kɛɖɔ gɛ baɖɔ asɛ, “Oboɔ nolũ Owusoso Akaa nɛaɖɔɔ, nɔtɛ ɔgagalĩ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ɔmɔ asɛ kɛbhɛtɛ gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ nɛ kitití lɔlɔ ibeɛ.”

english_verse: Who were those people that heard God's voice and rebelled? Weren't they the same ones that came out of Egypt with Moses?
translation_verse: Banɔ ɖuwoe lu gɛ béelũ Owusoso Akaa ebui, pɛ baalɔɛtití nɛishu? Pɛnɔsɛ anɛ alɛ enu agɛ Mose agbana edenɔ Egipteɛ dza?

english_verse: And who did God say would never enter his place of rest? Weren't they the ones that disobeyed him?
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ fakɔ anɛ pɔ Owusoso Akaa atanà bɔdɔ̃ akɔ asɛ beti beku yɛomoelekɔ oɖi gɛ kitinu banɔ alɛ gɛ begi zelũ batɔ̃ akɔɛ mɔɔ dza?

english_verse: We see that those people did not enter the place of rest because they did not have faith.
translation_verse: Kliso kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ kɔ ɔlɔ ɔsɛ, banɔ alɛ agɛlà eku ɛkɛlɛ nɛ balɛ mayɛkɛ, mayɛkɛŋã shu so.

english_verse: The promise to enter the place of rest is still good, and we must take care that none of you miss out.
translation_verse: Kliso gɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɔkɔ yɛomoelekɔ mɛ tɛvɛvɛ tsiɖi lɛ abha soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔzã nawɔ̃ piapii sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ nanà atɛ bawɔɛ idzo.

english_verse: We have heard the message, just as they did. But they failed to believe what they heard, and the message did not do them any good.
translation_verse: Kɛɖɔ gɛ baɖɔ Ibui Gbangbã etseɖe olɔɔ, kɛlɛɛ ko baɖɔ etseɖe alɛ tsyɛ, pɔ kibuiɛ gɛ belũɔ gɛ yɛkɛ edzi nanà ɔkɔ alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ elũ ɛlɛ agɛ lɔkɔɛ ɛlɛ akpɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.

english_verse: Only people who have faith will enter the place of rest. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ” God said this, even though everything has been ready from the time of creation.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ agɛ yɛkɛŋã xɔnɔɔ, nɔkɔ butsoku omoelekɔ ɔlɛ, asɛ kɛɖɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ asɛ, “Kliso ɛtana bɔdɔ̃ nɛ mɛɔmɔpɔɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, ‘Beti betsoku mɛomoelekɔ ɔlɛ oɖi.’ ” Pɔ awɔa yɛxɔ̃ɛ ebeke odenɔ kanɔ mɛ bhɛbhɛtɛ ibe ke.

english_verse: In fact, somewhere the Scriptures say that by the seventh day, God had finished his work, and so he rested.
translation_verse: Nɛ Ibuiɛ ɔkɔ toliɛ, aɖɔ nɛ kiwui gegenemiɛ shu asɛ, “Nɛ kiwui gegenemi nabhaa, Owusoso Akaa emoele edenɔ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa petee mɛ.

english_verse: We also read that he later said, “You people will never enter my place of rest!”
translation_verse: Azaɖɔ nɛibui ɛlɛ tsyɛ mɛ asɛ, “Betibeku mɛomoelekɔ ɔlɛ oɖi ɖa.”

english_verse: This means that the promise to enter is still good, because those who first heard about it disobeyed and did not enter.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ beteli eku omoelekɔ ɔlɛ, gɛ bagɛ eputɔ elũ Kibui Gbangbã agɛlà etsoku nɛ balɛ atɔ̃ gagalĩɛ shu so.

english_verse: Much later God told David to make the promise again, just as I have already said, “If you hear his voice today, don't be stubborn!”
translation_verse: Kliso Owusoso Akaa azatɔɖɔ iwui tili gɛ ekulu ɛlɛ asɛ, Oboɔ. Kɛlɛ nɛ ewui dzlolo teli edeɛ aɖɔaɖɔ aganà David abha nɛ ebui alɛ gɛ atɛɖɔ afala nɔ mɛ asɛ, “Oboɔ onupɛ nolũ yɛaɖɔɔ, nɔtɛ ɔgagalĩ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ.”

english_verse: If Joshua had really given the people rest, there would not be any need for God to talk about another day of rest.
translation_verse: Pɔ otɛ ɔsɛ omoelekɔ Yosua akɔ alɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa agɛtɛ ewlui aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kiwui bhlatɔ shu.

english_verse: But God has promised us a Sabbath when we will rest, even though it has not yet come.
translation_verse: Kliso kimoelewui tili lɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ,

english_verse: On that day God's people will rest from their work, just as God rested from his work.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ eku Owusoso Akaa omoelekɔ, anɔ alɛ tsyɛ ebemoele edenɔ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, asɛ kimoele gɛ Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ emoele ana.

english_verse: We should do our best to enter the place of rest, so none of us will disobey and miss going there, as they did.
translation_verse: Kliso nɔkɔ bɔkpɛ emi ka nyia ka idi sɛ tɛ butsoku omoelekɔ ɔlɛ, sɛ tɛ anɔ nanà atɛ gagalĩ atɔ̃ tɛ abadɔ oboe asɛ alɛ ana.

english_verse: God's word is alive and powerful! It is sharper than any double-edged sword. His word can cut through our spirits and souls and through our joints and marrow, until it discovers the desires and thoughts of our hearts.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ lɛ nɛ ɛkpã, gɛ kɛwɔa axɔ̃ɛ. Kibuiɛ lɔŋã ɔdɛ bɛtɛɛ̀ ilugbũ tɛbha- ka nyia ka. Ashɔ banɔ kɛlɛ ayɛ kɛtɔwui, ɔfɔfuĩa, axɔa ɔtsyɔakɔ nɛ̀ axɔamɛɔbɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ ekulu ebhu nɛ anɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe nɛ̀ yɛetú mɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ.

english_verse: Nothing is hidden from God! He sees through everything, and we will have to tell him the truth. Jesus Is the Great High Priest
translation_verse: Kɛnanà ma tikpukpũ mɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ petee. Batsɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ kɛka nyia ka abha, kɛlɛ ka nyia ka dalɛ li nɛ anunɔ gɛ bɔba bhɛtɛ akɔnta ɔkɔɔ nɛ amɛ. Yesu Gɛenu Banɔlũazazã Gbagbla

english_verse: We have a great high priest, who has gone into heaven, and he is Jesus the Son of God. This is why we must hold on to what we have said about him.
translation_verse: Kliso gɛ banɔlũazazã gbagbla, gɛ agã iwusoso nɔ mɛ pɛ yɛenu Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyi Yesu soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔnyana bɔlɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ ɛlɛ mɛ bɔdalɛ vunɔ gagalĩi.

english_verse: Jesus understands every weakness of ours, because he was tempted in every way that we are. But he did not sin!
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ anɛ banɔlũazazã gɛ atɛ balà elũ bɔtɔ gɛlɛ ɔlɔ shuɔ, yɛalɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ, pɔ enu anɔ gɛ befekeɖi nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ ɔmɔ asɛ bɔlɔ ana-pɔ yɛxɔnɔ kibui kpa nanà gɛzã yɛishu.

english_verse: So whenever we are in need, we should come bravely before the throne of our merciful God. There we will be treated with undeserved grace, and we will find help.
translation_verse: Kliso nɔkɔ butso plɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa ekusiegbuɔ gɛ alɔkɔ ebhui ɔlɔ ebu nɔɔ, nɛité kpɛkpɛ mɛ sɛ tɛ onupɛ kiwui gagalĩɛ batɔnɔ ɔlɔɔ, tɛ ebeɖi ɔlɔ ashagabui tɛ ebhui ɔlɔ ebu.

english_verse: Every high priest is appointed to help others by offering gifts and sacrifices to God because of their sins.
translation_verse: Bebu banɔlũazazã gbagbla ka nyia ka edenɔ banɔɛishi. Bedzui asɛ tɛ azã ishi akɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ banɔ, tɛ akɔ ɔdɔ̃ tɛ azapɔɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ ebui kpa ɛtakpu.

english_verse: A high priest has weaknesses of his own, and he feels sorry for foolish and sinful people.
translation_verse: Banɔlũazazã gbagbla alɛ, alàdɔ fɔ̃ akɔ bagɛ nɛ balɛ ibui matimati mɛ pɛ batɔnɔ edzo bhlatɔ avɛɛ, gɛ yɛ tsyɛ bɔtɔ ɔlɛ lɛ yɛishu so.

english_verse: This is why he must offer sacrifices for his own sins and for the sins of others.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛso eputɔ apɔɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ yɛebui kpa nɛ takpu, flogo pɛ apɔɛ nɛ banɔ bhlatɔ tsyɛ ɛtakpu.

english_verse: But no one can have the honor of being a high priest simply by wanting to be one. Only God can choose a priest, and God is the one who chose Aaron.
translation_verse: Anɔ nanà etidzu yɛishu banɔlũazazã gbagbla, kɛlɛ sɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛedzui, asɛ idzu gɛ edzu Aron ana.

english_verse: This is how it was with Christ. He became a high priest, but not just because he wanted the honor of being one. It was God who told him, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!”
translation_verse: Kliso Kristo tsyɛ agɛbhɛtɛ yɛishu asɛ anɔ dadalɛ sɛ tɛ edzi banɔlũazazã gbagbla. Pɔ Owusoso Akaa etseɖe yɛasɛ, “Wonu Mɛeyianyɛ, oboɔ itsyina dzi Wɔakaa.”

english_verse: In another place, God says, “You are a priest forever just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ azaɖɔ nɛ ɔkɔbhlatɔ tsyɛ asɛ, “Odzi banɔlũazazã tihɔ tihɔ, ɔmɔ asɛ Melxizedek ana.”

english_verse: God had the power to save Jesus from death. And while Jesus was on earth, he begged God with loud crying and tears to save him. He truly worshiped God, and God listened to his prayers.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibeɛ gɛ Yesu azã kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ, ekulu Owusoso Akaa pɛ akɔ yɛtakpu ɔgana ozĩ kpɛkpɛ ɔplɛnɔ ɛwɔ̃mɛ bibi mɛ ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ abalà yɛebu edenɔ butsí mɛɛ. Elũ yɛtikukuluɔ, nɛ yɛishu esi zhizhinɔ gbangbã mɛ so.

english_verse: Jesus is God's own Son, but still he had to suffer before he could learn what it really means to obey God.
translation_verse: Gɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyi yɛedzi tsyɛ elo, akpasɛ batɔ̃ lulũ ɔgana bɔtɔ gɛ amɔ mɛ

english_verse: Suffering made Jesus perfect, and now he can save forever all who obey him.
translation_verse: gɛ badalɛ yɛishu piapi soɔ, ebedzi anunɔ abha gɛ bagɛ elũ atɔ̃ abagã pɛ babàmɔ tibubú tihɔɔ.

english_verse: This is because God chose him to be a high priest like Melchizedek. Warning against Turning Away
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ yɛenu anunɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa edzu asɛ tɛ edzi banɔlũazazã gbagbla ɔmɔ asɛ Melxizedek ana. Nɔtɛ Shɛnɛ Ahɔɛ Nɛ Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋãa Shu

english_verse: Much more could be said about this subject. But it is hard to explain, and all of you are slow to understand.
