translation_verse: Yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa alɛ tenikpo, kɛlɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã wɔ̃ɛ ɔgana ɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ mɛ.

english_verse: This is what the Scriptures mean by saying, “Abraham had faith in God, and God accepted him.” That's how Abraham became God's friend.
translation_verse: Kɛkɔ ɔsɛ ibui fɔfɔnɔ lu ɛlɛ bá ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, “Abraham ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha aŋã, kɛlɛ balɔkɔɛ ɛlɛ akɔɛ asɛ, enu anɔ gbangbã,” kɛlɛ bekului asɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔbhia.

english_verse: You can now see that we please God by what we do and not only by what we believe.
translation_verse: Kinu ibui gbã ɔsɛ, bebu utsyɔa akɔ anɔ ɔgana yɛebuiɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ anɛ gana yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ ete.

english_verse: For example, Rahab had been a prostitute. But she pleased God when she welcomed the spies and sent them home by another way.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha balɔkɔ Rahab gɛedzi kedulũ azazãelete asɛ enu anɔ gbangbã, nɛ kɛgɛ abhɛtɛ pɛ ayɛkɛ bagɛ bakpɛ asɛ bedi zuru, elu awɔ̃ eɖi esiakpa mɛ, pɛ akasɛ alɛ idzo bhlatɔ pɛ bashɛ mɔɔ dza?

english_verse: Anyone who doesn't breathe is dead, and faith that doesn't do anything is just as dead!
translation_verse: Ɔmɔ asɛ kinu gɛ anɔ teli enu anɔ tsitsí onupɛ ɔfɔfuĩa ɔma yɛmɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tsyɛ nui idɔ̃ tsitsí onupɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ plɛnɔ nɔ ɛlɛ.

english_verse: My friends, we should not all try to become teachers. In fact, teachers will be judged more strictly than others.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, anɛ ɔnɔ mɛ anɔ ka nyia ka kɛlɛ sɛ yɛalɔkɔ ishu asɛ enu adɔ̃kasɛ, ɔmɔ asɛ kinyeɛ gɛ nonyi ana, bebèkulu ebhu gagalĩ akɔ bɔlɔ agɛ ɛkasɛ ɔdɔ̃ ɔdɛ anɔ nyia anɔ.

english_verse: All of us do many wrong things. But if you can control your tongue, you are mature and able to control your whole body.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ pete ɛta esi nɛ ebui gelee mɛ. Onupɛ anɔ teli atɛtà esi nɛ kɛgɛ aɖɔ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ anɔ alɛ ana piapii, kɛlɛ abalà eɖi yɛishu pete tsyɛ abha.

english_verse: By putting a bit into the mouth of a horse, we can turn the horse in different directions.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bɔkpɛ ɛɖa nɛ ilugbũ mɛ ɔkɔ basɔ asɛ tɛ belũ atɔ̃ɔ, bɔlà tsyina alɛ ɔvɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bavɛɛ.

english_verse: It takes strong winds to move a large sailing ship, but the captain uses only a small rudder to make it go in any direction.
translation_verse: Alo ɔmɔ asɛ kelĩabha ihu ana. Gɛ linu ihu hohoe pɛ kɛlɛ́ gagalĩ kɛlɛ ifu ɛlɛ ɛvɛnɔ tsyɛ elo, ogegè bhlui toli ko ɔlɛ otsyina ɔlɛ ɔvɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ anunɔ gɛ egè ɔlɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ lɔvɛɛ.

english_verse: Our tongues are small too, and yet they brag about big things. It takes only a spark to start a forest fire!
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha kineke tsyɛ nu idzya bhlui tili ko nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛdzya shu, pɔ kinu idɔ̃ gɛifeke ishu. Kɛlɛ̀ asɛ ɛsɔlɛ gɛ ofuɖà ɔsɔlɛ ɔtã nɛ̀ ɔɖɛklɛmɛ, pɛ eplelee bhlui mɛ ete kide ana.

english_verse: The tongue is like a spark. It is an evil power that dirties the rest of the body and sets a person's entire life on fire with flames that come from hell itself.
translation_verse: Kineke tsyɛ inu ifu. Kinu kanɔ alɛ mɛ ɛdɔ̃ zizĩ tili gɛinu ɔlɔ ishudzya awɔ̃pɛ tieli. Kituturu anɔ pɛ kitsu anunɔ yɛkpã zazã nɛifú, kɛlɛ̀ xɔnɔ pɔɔ, kifu gɛtã tihɔɔ nɔ kɛlɛ batsu ɛlɛ ifu.

english_verse: All kinds of animals, birds, reptiles, and sea creatures can be tamed and have been tamed.
translation_verse: Banɔ abalà akɔ baagã petee gɛenu, bɔzhɔɛ, bagã gɛetsì nɛ kesiakpa, nɛ̀ aƒu mɛ agã ka nyia ka idi amɔ̃ awɔ̃,

english_verse: But our tongues get out of control. They are restless and evil, and always spreading deadly poison.
translation_verse: kineke xɔnɔ anɔ nanà atɛlà ɛlɛ akpakà. Kinu kɛdɔ̃ zizĩ gɛiti moele, gɛ kabɔɛ kpa kalɛ alɛ ɛlɛ ulũ.

english_verse: My dear friends, with our tongues we speak both praises and curses. We praise our Lord and Father, and we curse people who were created to be like God, and this isn't right.
translation_verse: Nɛ olugbũ tonikpo ɔlɛ mɛɛ, Apalete nɛinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɔ, nɛ̀ kibui ɖɔɖɔ kpɛ anɔ ede ekoeyi. Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kidzo ma sɛ tɛ kɛzã ana.

english_verse: Can clean water and dirty water both flow from the same spring?
translation_verse: Kɛpɛ sɛ tɛ bulĩ gbangbã nɛ̀ bɔmɔɛlĩ zide koeyi nɛ ulĩhɔ tinikpo ɛlɛ mɛɛ dza?

english_verse: Can a fig tree produce olives or a grapevine produce figs? Does fresh water come from a well full of salt water? Wisdom from Above
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã ɔsɛ nɛ kamɔtɔ̃si tunikpo ɔlɛ nabhaa, bɔbaapɔ̃ bɔbɔ osi eyuyu dza? Alo wain ihui balà yu kibisɛ busi eyuyu tsyɛ dza? Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha kɛhɔ mɛ gɛ bɔmɔɛlĩ kuɔ, bulĩ gbangbã tsyɛ tɛ balà ziku nɛ kɛhɔ tinikpo ɛlɛ mɛ. Bubutiɛ Gɛide Kitití

english_verse: Are any of you wise or sensible? Then show it by living right and by being humble and wise in everything you do.
translation_verse: Afana gɛenu ebuitinɛ nɛ̀ ebui esi lulũelete nɛ wɔnɔ mɛ? Anɔ alɛ alɔkɔ ɛkpã gbangbã ebu ɛlɛ akasɛ ɔgana yɛebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ alɛ ɔgana ishu esi zhizhinɔ gɛide ubuti mɛ.

english_verse: But if your heart is full of bitter jealousy and selfishness, don't brag or lie to cover up the truth.
translation_verse: Onupɛ kiwuhũ dzadzã kɛtɛ́kɛtɛ́, nɛ̀ mɛ ete yɛtɛpɛpɛ ebui alɛ akpasɛ ɔnɔ etúɔ mɛɛ, nɔtɛotũ itelũ nɛ alɛishu alo tɛ nɔzɔdɛ adã nɛ ibui gbangbã shu.

english_verse: This kind of wisdom doesn't come from above. It is earthly and selfish and comes from the devil himself.
translation_verse: “Bubuti” ɛlɛ nɛidiɛ, anɛ kitití bude ba, pɔ kanɔ mɛ ɔyɛ bunu, gɛ ɔfɔfuĩa ɔma ɔlɛ mɛ, Abosam ɔyɛ ulinu.

english_verse: Whenever people are jealous or selfish, they cause trouble and do all sorts of cruel things.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ kiwuhũ dzadzã nɛ̀ mɛete ɛyɛ ko kɛlɛ pɛ lɛ̀ɛ, ɛkɛlɛ ɔtɔ bubú nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ka nyia ka idi tsyɛ azã.

english_verse: But the wisdom that comes from above leads us to be pure, friendly, gentle, sensible, kind, helpful, genuine, and sincere.
translation_verse: Bubutiɛ gɛide kititíɛ pɔɔ, putɔ nɔɔ, bɔlɛishu dalɛ, gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ anɔ nɛishu yɔyɔ mɛ, ɔhagbo esi tilulũ, ishu esi tizhizhinɔ, gɛ ashagabui ɖiɖi nɛ̀ eyuyu gbangbã akpasɛ, banɔ amɛ maɖimaɖi nɛ̀ ebui mɛ dadalɛ alɛ.

english_verse: When peacemakers plant seeds of peace, they will harvest justice.
translation_verse: Iboe evuvũeleteɛ gɛ aɖa ɔdɔ̃ nɛishu yɔyɔ mɛɛ, bapɔ ɔdɔ̃ gɛinu ibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ.

english_verse: Why do you fight and argue with each other? Isn't it because you are full of selfish desires that fight to control your body?
translation_verse: Kiɖe gɛ mana ekpli tatá nɛ̀ ebala nɛ wɔnɔɛishi? Pɛnɔsɛ anɛ ebuiɛ gɛ lakpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛ pɛ latɛ eyu nɛ ɔnɔ mɛɛ ledeɛ dza?

english_verse: You want something you don't have, and you will do anything to get it. You will even kill! But you still cannot get what you want, and you won't get it by fighting and arguing. You should pray for it.
translation_verse: Nɔpɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili, pɔ nɔgɛ mɔɛ ɛlɛ. Noyí anɔ pɛ nɔdzã awuhũ nɛ ɔdɔ̃ shu, pɔ nɔtɛ ɔlà mɔ ɛdɔ̃ɔ gɛ nɔ pɛ nɔ. Nohu ebala pɛ nɔta ekpli. Nɔtɛ ɔmɔ ɔdɔ̃, ɔmɔsɛ notɛ obisi Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: Yet even when you do pray, your prayers are not answered, because you pray just for selfish reasons.
translation_verse: Nobisiɛ, nɔtɛ ɔmɔ ɔyɛkɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nobisi nɛ idzo kpa abha, noo bisi udɔ̃ sɛ tɛ nɔwɔɛ ɛlɛ shu axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ ɛkpã ŋaŋã ete.

english_verse: You people aren't faithful to God! Don't you know if you love the world, you are God's enemies? And if you decide to be a friend of the world, you make yourself an enemy of God.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛelete, notinyi ɔsɛ nɔɔŋã ɛbhia nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ notsyina odzi banɔ gɛ banyana Owusoso Akaa akpɛ ɛya mɛɛ dza? Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ edzi ɔbhia ɔkɔ kanɔ alɛɛ, kɛlɛ etsyina edzi anunɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: Do you doubt the Scriptures that say, “God truly cares about the Spirit he has put in us”?
translation_verse: Pɛnɔsɛ noɖi ɔsɛ kibui ete ko baɖɔ elu nɛ Kibui fɔfɔnɔ luuɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, yɛɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ akɔ asɛ lɔzã ɔlɔ mɛɛ ɔwlɔãkɛ abhã gagalĩi.

english_verse: In fact, God treats us with even greater kindness, just as the Scriptures say, “God opposes everyone who is proud, but he blesses all who are humble with undeserved grace.”
translation_verse: Pɔ ebhui ɔlɔ ebu popopo. Kliso pɛ Yɛibuiɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Owusoso Akaa alɔɛtití nɛ bagɛ befeke ishuɔ shu pɔ ebhui bagɛ ezhinɔ ishu esiɛ ebu.”

english_verse: Surrender to God! Resist the devil, and he will run from you.
translation_verse: Nozhinɔ ɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa. Nɔ lɔɛtití nɛ Abosam shu tɛ ebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ashɛ nɛ ɔnɔ ɔbha.

english_verse: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Clean up your lives, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you people who can't make up your mind.
translation_verse: Nótsu ɔplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa tɛ yɛtsyɛ etsu aplɛnɔ ɔnɔ. Ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ, noplu ɔnɔ ahɔɛ, tɛ nɔdalɛ ɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ, wɔnɔ gɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ aya taabhaa.

english_verse: Be sad and sorry and weep. Stop laughing and start crying. Be gloomy instead of glad.
translation_verse: Kitúɔ tã ɔnɔ, nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, tɛ nobi yoyò. Wɔnɔ ɛmɔɛ dzi ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, kɛlɛ ɔnɔ samɛ mɔmɔ edzi bamɛ tsɛtsɛ́ kpɛ esi.

english_verse: Be humble in the Lord's presence, and he will honor you. Saying Cruel Things about Others
translation_verse: Nozhinɔ ɔnɔ ishu esi nɛ Apalete namɛ tɛ efeke ɔnɔ ewunɔ abha.

english_verse: My friends, don't say cruel things about others! If you do, or if you condemn others, you are condemning God's Law. And if you condemn the Law, you put yourself above the Law and refuse to obey either it
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔtɛ ɔzɔɖɔ ebui kpa nɛ bagɔlɔ shu. Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ ebui kpa nɛ yɛadzya shu alo ekulu ebhu niyɛɛ, alɔɛtití nɛ ɔshaa shu, kɛlɛ ekulu ebhu nɛ ɔlɛ. Onupɛ nokulu ebhu nɛ̀ ɔshaa, kɛlɛ anɛ ɔlɛ abha bhɛbhɛtɛelete nonu, pɔ nodzi ebhu ekukuluelete ɔkɔ ɔshaa.

english_verse: or God who gave it. God is our judge, and he can save or destroy us. What right do you have to condemn anyone? Warning against Bragging
translation_verse: Anɔ tenikpo ko yɛenu Ɔshakpɛkpɛelete nɛ̀ Kebhukluanɔ, yɛenu anunɔ gɛ alà elu anɔ ɛkpã kɛlɛ yɛalà ezĩ udɔ̃ tsyɛ. Wɔnɔ pɔ, afana nɔonu pɛ nokulu ebhu nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɔhagbo alɛ? Kitelũ Tutũ Ɔkɔ Ivũ

english_verse: You should know better than to say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to the city. We will do business there for a year and make a lot of money!”
translation_verse: Nɔtatɔ̃ tɛ nolũ, wɔnɔ agɛ nɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Oboɔ alo kivũ bɔbavɛ ɔma ɔlɛ alo odzyiedeɛ mɛ, bɔba dɛzã ɛkɛlɛ gã kedzì tɛ bɔlɔ ehoeyiɛ amɔ atɔɖɔ.”

english_verse: What do you know about tomorrow? How can you be so sure about your life? It is nothing more than mist that appears for only a little while before it disappears.
translation_verse: Kiɖeso, otinyi kɛgɛ bàba ɛlɛ mɛ ivũ. Kiɖe gɛinu wɔnɔ ɛkpã? Ɔmɔlɔ̃ gɛ oku nɛ kibe gulũi tili mɛ pɛ lozo wlui ɔyala ko nonu.

english_verse: You should say, “If the Lord lets us live, we will do these things.”
translation_verse: Nɛ kɛlɛ nɛinye mɛɛ, nɔzɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Onupɛ Apalete adɛmɛɛ, bɔbazã nɛ ɛkpã kɛlɛ bɔba bhɛtɛ kɛlɛ̀ nɛ̀ tili tsyɛ.

english_verse: Yet you are stupid enough to brag, and it is wrong to be so proud.
translation_verse: Otsiɛ nɔ, notũ itelũ pɛ nobu olugbũ mɛ. Kitelũ tutũ ɛlɛ nɛidi pɔɔ, kibui zizĩ kinu.

english_verse: If you don't do what you know is right, you have sinned.
translation_verse: Kliso anunɔ gɛ enyi ibui gbangbã gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ abhɛtɛ pɛ atɛ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛɛ, abhɛtɛ ibui kpa.

english_verse: You rich people should cry and weep! Terrible things are going to happen to you.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ ehoeyieleteɛ nɔtatɔ̃ tɛ nolũ otsi alɛ, nobi yoyo, tɛ nɔwɔa awuwoe, nɛ bɔtɔ gbagbla gɛ bàba ɔnɔ abhaa shu.

english_verse: Your treasures have already rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ ehoeyiudɔ̃ ɔtsɔmɔ, kɛlɛ iklusɛ tã ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛɛ.

english_verse: Your money has rusted, and the rust will be evidence against you, as it burns your body like fire. Yet you keep on storing up wealth in these last days.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ sikãɛkpã nɛ̀ sikã fufú edzyewoele. Bɔdɔ̃ tidzyedzyewoele ɛlɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ɔnɔ shu nɛ kɛtã gɛ kɛbatã ɔnɔ asɛ ifu ana. Nɔyalɛ ehoeyiudɔ̃ gelee ɔbalɛ olu nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ alɛ mɛ.

english_verse: You refused to pay the people who worked in your fields, and now their unpaid wages are shouting out against you. The Lord All-Powerful has surely heard the cries of the workers who harvested your crops.
translation_verse: Noɖi mɔ! Abhɛɛ gɛ nɔgɛ buia ɔkɔ ɔnɔ apaeyiɛ gɛ adzyaa wɔnɔ bayaa mɛ, ebieyo nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu. Bagɛ apɔ ɔdɔ̃ akɔ ɔnɔ, balɛ yoyo bibiɛ ku Apalete Ohumielete natɔ̃ mɛ.

english_verse: While here on earth, you have thought only of filling your own stomachs and having a good time. But now you are like fat cattle on their way to be butchered.
translation_verse: Nɔzã kanɔ alɛ mɛ, pɛ nɔŋã ɛkpã nɛ̀ ehoeyiudɔ̃. Nɔŋã ɔdɔ̃ olu bɔ, pɛ noopo banɔ yiyíwui.

english_verse: You have condemned and murdered innocent people, who couldn't even fight back. Be Patient and Kind
translation_verse: Nobú bagɛ agɛ bhɛtɛ ibui kpa nɛpɔ, pɛ noyí alɛ, gɛ anɛ kitití bazalɔ nɛ ɔnɔ shu tsyɛ flogo. Tɛdɔdɔ Fɔ̃ɔ Nɛ Bɔtɔ Mɛ

english_verse: My friends, be patient until the Lord returns. Think of farmers who wait patiently for the autumn and spring rains to make their valuable crops grow.
translation_verse: Kliso mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔvɛnɔ Apalete nɛbabe. Nolu awɔ̃ nɛ kɛdɔ gɛ ayadɛ àdɔ fɔ̃ɔ akɔ esiakpa sɛ tɛ kakɔ ɔdɔ̃eyi eshè nɛ alɛ abha, nɛ̀ kipoɔ gɛ epo subha nɛ yɛdɔbeɛ oɖi.

english_verse: Be patient like those farmers and don't give up. The Lord will soon be here!
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ tsyɛ elo, nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩi, ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ nɛbabe na beke.

english_verse: Don't grumble about each other or you will be judged, and the judge is right outside the door.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ ɔvɛnɔ olugbũ nɛ bagɔlɔ ɔkɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, sɛ tɛ batɛ bekulu ebhu nɛ ɔnɔ. Ɖio, kebhukulueleteɛ tsyɛ yɛeli edulũɔ alɛ!

english_verse: My friends, follow the example of the prophets who spoke for the Lord. They were patient, even when they had to suffer.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, tɛ kidzi tɛlɔlɔkɔ shɔnɔ nɛ tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ shuɔ, nɔbaka ebuiɖɔluanɛ gɛ azaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ Apalete nɛinye mɛ ayɛ oɖi.

english_verse: In fact, we praise the ones who endured the most. You remember how patient Job was and how the Lord finally helped him. The Lord did this because he is so merciful and kind.
translation_verse: Asɛ gɛ nonyi ana, bagɛ beyulaa, balɛ edzi anɔ gɛ bakpɛ emi. Nolũ kɛkpɛ gɛ Hiob akpɛ emi, kɛlɛ nɔmɔ kɛgɛ Apaleteɛ abhɛtɛ akɔɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ. Apaleteɛ ɛyamɛ yɔ kɛlɛ eɖi anɔ ashagabui.

english_verse: My friends, above all else, don't take an oath. You must not swear by heaven or by earth or by anything else. “Yes” or “No” is all you need to say. If you say anything more, you will be condemned.
translation_verse: Nɛ̀ kɛgɛdɛ pete nɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔtɛ tanà ɔdɔ̃, kitití udɔ̃ loo kesiakpa ɔyɛ, alo kɛdɔ̃ ka nyia ka ɛdi. Nɔkɔ ɔnɔ, “Ee” edzi ee, kɛlɛ ɔnɔ “Ao” tsyɛ edzi ao, tɛ Owusoso Akaa etibebu ɔnɔ ɛpɔ. Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu Nɛ Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Mɛ

english_verse: If you are having trouble, you should pray. And if you are feeling good, you should sing praises.
translation_verse: Bɔtɔ bá ɔnɔ mɛ teli abhaa, ekulu itití ayɛ. Anɔ teli amɔ sameɛ, azhã same ɛdzɛ tɛ akpɛ Akaa nɛinye nɛitití.

english_verse: If you are sick, ask the church leaders to come and pray for you. Ask them to put olive oil on you in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ teli ishu mɛ izĩ dza? Ekulu ɔhamɛ esheshèɛ tɛ bekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ yɛtakpu tɛ basara bɔbɔ́ akɔɛ nɛ Apalete nɛinye mɛ.

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray for sick people, they will get well. The Lord will heal them, and if they have sinned, he will forgive them.
translation_verse: Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ pɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa, kɛbakɔ ɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛishu mɛ zĩɛ, Apaleteɛ abakɔ asɛ yɛalɔ gagalĩi. Onupɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpaa, babàlɔkɔ ɛlɛ etsye.

english_verse: If you have sinned, you should tell each other what you have done. Then you can pray for one another and be healed. The prayer of an innocent person is powerful, and it can help a lot.
translation_verse: Kliso nɔdalɛ ɔnɔ ebui kpa mɛ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, tɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ nɔmɔ ishu mɛ gagalĩ. Bupu lɛ anɔ gbangbã yɛ Akaa tikukulu mɛ kɛlɛ kɛwɔa axɔ̃ɛ tsyɛ popopo.

english_verse: Elijah was just as human as we are, and for three and a half years his prayers kept the rain from falling.
translation_verse: Anɔdzyrame ko Eliya tsyɛ edzi asɛ ɔlɔ ana. Pɔ gɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa popopo asɛ subha atɛdɔɔ, agɛdɔ ɛgbã nɛ agɔ tatá nɛ̀ bewoele tehlo mɛ.

english_verse: But when he did pray for rain, it fell from the skies and made the crops grow.
translation_verse: Gɛ ezekulu Owusoso Akaa, kɛkɔ ɔsɛ kititíɛ dalɛ ɔkɔ subha yɛazadɔ, kɛlɛ bɔŋaŋã zikoeyi nɛ esiakpa nabha.

english_verse: My friends, if any followers have wandered away from the truth, you should try to lead them back.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, onupɛ ɔnɔ mɛ anɔ teli etsyina nɛ ibui gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ niede pɛ anɔ teli edzini yɛetsyina amanaa,

english_verse: If you turn sinners from the wrong way, you will save them from death, and many of their sins will be forgiven.
translation_verse: nɔbaka ɔsɛ, anunɔ gɛ etsyina ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛelete nɛ yɛesitatá edzo nabhaa, ebui nɛ utsí ahɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ yɛebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ gelee nɔ etsyee.

english_verse: From Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ. To God's people who are scattered like foreigners in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
translation_verse: Mɛ Petro anɔ gɛenu Yesu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ, mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ sɛsɛ bagɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu luɔ, pɛ bunu bafafala nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, pɛ bapɔɛ akanà nɛ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia nɛ̀ Bitania, ɔdɔ̃ mɛ

english_verse: God the Father decided to choose you as his people, and his Spirit has made you holy. You have obeyed Jesus Christ and are sprinkled with his blood. I pray that God will be kind to you and will keep on giving you peace! A Real Reason for Hope
translation_verse: banɔ gɛ bebu alɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ akpɛ otugbà nulũ, ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔlɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa adalɛ, ɔkɔ batɔ̃ lulũ ɔkɔ Yesu Kristo nɛ yɛ dzyosu hɔɛhɔ̃ɛ niesi. Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ tikpekpè mɛ. Owusoso Akaa Nɛinye Kpɛkpɛ Nɛitití Ɔkɔ Ɛkpã Gɛ Buɖi Kidzo Mɛ Ɔkɔ

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. God is so good, and by raising Jesus from death, he has given us new life and a hope that lives on.
translation_verse: Bɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa ɔkɔ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo nɛinyè nɛitití! Nɛ yɛ ashagabui ɖiɖi gbagbla mɛɛ, akɔ bedzinì ɔlɔ amɔ̃ avɔvɔ akpɛ ɛkpã gɛ buɖì kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ ɔgana Yesu Kristo yɛ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ,

english_verse: God has something stored up for you in heaven, where it will never decay or be ruined or disappear.
translation_verse: nɛ̀ kaŋãsiɛ gɛetibe belè ɖìɛ mɛ, gɛ ketìbezĩ alo pɛ kalɛ ulũ bafalàa, kalɛ babalɛ nɛititíɛ elu akɔ wɔnɔ

english_verse: You have faith in God, whose power will protect you until the last day. Then he will save you, just as he has always planned to do.
translation_verse: banɔ gɛ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ balɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ohumi nɔ akpɛ ɔkã nɛ wɔnɔ shu, ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ anɔ tibubuɔ gɛ babalɛ elu akɔ nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ mɛ babà.

english_verse: On that day you will be glad, even if you have to go through many hard trials for a while.
translation_verse: Nɛ alɛ mɛ nɔmɔ same hohoe, pɔ otsiɛ nɔ, agɔ kibè gulũi gɛ nɔbɔ mɔ̃ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ tifefekeɖi ediedi mɛ.

english_verse: Your faith will be like gold that has been tested in a fire. And these trials will prove that your faith is worth much more than gold that can be destroyed. They will show that you will be given praise and honor and glory when Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Ebui alɛ aba ɛlɛ mɛ ana sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, gɛ kigbogbolo ɔdɛ sikãɛkpã gɛ bazĩ, gɛ balɔkɔ kifù adalɛ ɛlɛ shu nɔ pɔ flogo. Tɛ babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ kidzi kibui ɛgbã gɛ babakpɛ ɛlɛ inye nɛitití, pɛ ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ inyè gbangbã tsyɛ bazã ɛlɛ shu gɛ onupɛ Yesu Kristo ebekoeyìɛ.

english_verse: You have never seen Jesus, and you don't see him now. But still you love him and have faith in him, and no words can tell how glad and happy
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ mɔ yɛoɖì pɔ, pɔ nɔdɛmɛ yɛibui, kɛlɛ gɛ nɔtɛ ɔmɔ yɛ otsiɛ tsyɛ elo, nɔyɛkɛ yɛabha ɔŋã kɛlɛ nɔtɛ bɔlà ɖɔaɖɔ nɛ same mɔmɔ hohoe alɛ shu.

english_verse: you are to be saved. This is why you have faith.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nɔyɛkɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ gɛ ɛlɛ shu so pɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã, gɛinu wɔnɔ atɔwuiɛ tibubu.

english_verse: Some prophets told how God would treat you with undeserved grace, and they searched hard to find out more about the way you would be saved.
translation_verse: Nɛ atɔwui tibubu kibui ɛlɛ shuɔ, ebuiɖɔluanɛ, gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ babaa ɔkɔ ɔnɔ shuɔ, kibui gɛ belu awɔ̃ eɖi ɛlɛ piapii pɛ beɖi ɛlɛ abha piapii,

english_verse: The Spirit of Christ was in them and was telling them how Christ would suffer and would then be given great honor. So they searched to find out exactly who Christ would be and when this would happen.
translation_verse: gɛ baapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ betì kibeɛ nɛ̀ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ alɛishu Yesu Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔkpasɛ alɛ mɛ ɔzɔ ɖɔaɖɔ, aɖɔ Yesu bɔtɔ mɔmɔ akpɛ otugbà elu, nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ gɛ babà nɛ̀ kɛlɛ idegbaa.

english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Bebu ɛlɛ akasɛ alɛ sɛ gɛnɛ balɛishu baakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ pɔ wɔ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bagɛ baɖɔ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ etitseɖe wɔnɔ ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gɛ basɛsɛ ɔnɔ odenɔ kititiɛ mɛ. Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tsyɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bapɔɛ ebui alɛ mɛ eɖi. Kɔ Wɔshu Dalɛ

english_verse: Be alert and think straight. Put all your hope in how God will treat you with undeserved grace when Jesus Christ appears.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, nɔ balɛ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ ɔkɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, nɔŋã wɔnɔ shu abha tɛ nozoɖì kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ babà kɔ wɔnɔ gɛ onupɛ Yesu Kristo ebè ekoeyìɛ.

english_verse: Behave like obedient children. Don't let your lives be controlled by your desires, as they used to be.
translation_verse: Asɛ beyi gɛ belũ atɔ̃ ana, nɔtɛ̀ dɛmɛ ɔtɔɖɔ abosam yɛebuiɛ gɛ lazã wɔnɔ mɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔzã matì matiɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: Pɔ asɛ gɛ agɛ yɛekulu wɔnɔ shu dalɛ anaa, kana nɔkɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ shu dalɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ mɛ,

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Nɔkɔ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ̃, ɔmɔsɛ mɛishu dalɛ̃.”

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Gɛ nokulu Akaa gɛ ekulù kebhu nɛ̀ anɔ nyia anɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa pɛ etiɖì banɔ amɛɛ soɔ, nɔzã nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɛkpã asɛ bafafala ana nɛ ishu esi zhizhini nɛ̀ kifusisi mɛ̀.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ gɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔbàzĩ asɛ sikãfufù nɛ̀ sikãɛkpã shu so pɛ bebú wɔnɔ odenɔ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛ ɛkpã zazãna gɛ wɔnɔ ashuĩ alɛ alɔkɔ elu akɔ wɔnɔ mɛ.

english_verse: You were rescued by the precious blood of Christ, that spotless and innocent lamb.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɛ Kristo dzyosu dadalɛ gɛenu obhoshi eyiɛ gɛ ɔkɔ nanà ogizĩ nɛ ɔlɛ shuɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Bebu yɛelu flogo pɛ babà bhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, pɔ bebu yɛakasɛ nɛ ewui gɔgɔ alɛ mɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: Gana yɛabha nɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha ɔŋã, anɔ gɛ yɛefeke yɛedenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ pɛ akɔ yɛ ishu dadalɛ, klisoɔ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ otugbà mɛ gɛ nɔoɖiɛ ɔlɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Otsiɛ gɛ nɔoplu ishu pɛ nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ kibui gbã, sɛ tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ adzya alɛ, tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ bagɔlɔ denɔ kitúɔ mɛ piapii.

english_verse: Do this because God has given you new birth by his message that lives on forever.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ bedzinì wɔnɔ amɔ, gɛnɛ denɔ busi eyuyuɔ gɛebetsíɛ mɛ, pɔ denɔ busi eyuyuɔ gɛ etibè etsì ɖiɛ mɛ, ganà Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ gɛ lɛ nɛkpã pɛ kɛlɛ ulu tɛ fala mɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ, “Banɔ petee edzì asɛ tɛwɔa ana, kɛlɛ balɛ ishu dadalɛ petee dzì asɛ osiefufù nɛ ayakpa mɛ ana, tɛwɔa tãpɔɛ kɛlɛ efufùɔ awɔlɛ,

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: pɔ Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ lɛ tihɔɔ.” Kɛlɛ inu kibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ etseɖe wɔnɔ.

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ nɔobu ishu oyinɔ odenɔ banɔ shu zizĩ nɛ̀ banɔ wɔɛwɔɛ mɛ, asɛnɛ sɛsɛ, kawɔ̃kpɛ nɛ̀ banɔ ishutibui tɛɖɔɖɔ ka nyia ka ɛdi mɛ.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Asɛ beyì vɔvɔ gɛ bamɔ ana, nɔobisi ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ kɛmɔlĩ gbangbã, sɛ tɛ nɛ bɔlɛ mɛɛ nɔobo shè oku wɔnɔ tibubuɔ mɛ,

english_verse: You have already found out how good the Lord really is.
translation_verse: kibè ɛlɛ gɛ nɔtɛ omini oɖi sɛ Apaleteɛ apɛ. Kɛklagbuɔ Gɛlɛ Nɛkpã Nɛ̀ Banunɔ Gɛ Bebú Eluɔ

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: Asɛ gɛ nɔba yɛɔbha, kɛklagbuɔ gɛlɛ nɛkpã, pɛ banɔ nɔ agɛ yɛkɛ ɛlɛ pɔ Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ ebu ɛlɛ gɛ kɛyɛkɛ edzi kɔɛ-

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: wɔnɔ tsyɛ, asɛ aklagbu gɛalɛ nɛkpã ana, balɔkɔ ɔnɔ abhɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ buvũ tɛ̀ budzi bukusi ɔŋãkɔ gɛ dalɛ, gɛ bɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ tɔɖɔ bɔlɛ abha ɔganà Yesu Kristo abha.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ ebui fɔfɔnɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ɖio, idzu kɛklagbu nɛ Zion, odekrekpui iklagbuɔ gɛ bebu pɛ kɛyɛkɛ kedziɛ, kɛlɛ̀ anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ yɛabha ŋã batɛ bàkpɛ̀ yɛ kiwũi eɖi.”

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Otsiɛ nɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋãa, kɛklagbu ɛlɛ yɛkɛ kedzi ɔkɔ ɔnɔ. Pɔ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ ɔŋã xɔnɔ, “Kɛklagbuɔ gɛ bevũbhɔ atɛɛ elúɔ kɛlɛ badzì odekrekpu kɛklagbuɔ,

english_verse: They disobeyed the message and stumbled and fell over this stone, because they were doomed.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ “Kɛklagbuɔ gɛkɔ asɛ bɔnɔ akpatà nɛ̀ ɔxɔa gɛɔkɔ asɛ baadɔ oboeɛ.” Bakpatà bɔdɔ̃ ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ yɛkɛ kibuiɛ, kibuiɛ gɛ babalɛ elu asɛ kɛba alɛ abha.

english_verse: But you are God's chosen and special people. You are a group of royal priests and a holy nation. God has brought you out of darkness into his marvelous light. Now you must tell all the wonderful things he has done. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔonu banɔ gɛ bebú elú, bukusi ɔŋakɔ gɛ nɔonu ekusi, kɛmadi gɛdalɛ, banɔ gɛ benu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔɖɔaɖɔ ɔkpɛ anunɔ gɛ ekulu wɔnɔ yɛinyeɛ nɛitití, anunɔ gɛ ebu wɔnɔ eyinɔ odenɔ otumũɔ mɛ amana tɛdadalɛ gɛ bhɛtɛ ibiɛ mɛ.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Kibè tili bafala gɛ nɔ ogi dzi anɔ, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ nɔonu Owusoso Akaa anɔ, kibè tili begiɖì wɔnɔ ashagabui, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ beɖi wɔnɔ ashagabui.

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: Ɛbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ɛɛkpalà wɔnɔ, wɔnɔ asɛ beefù ana nɛ̀ bafafala nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔobu wɔnɔ ishu oyinɔ odenɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ebui kpa, gɛ laatà keyù nɛ̀ wɔnɔ atɔwuiɛ.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Nɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã gbangbã ɛlɛ nɛidi nɛ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋã nɛishi, sɛ gɛ bebu wɔnɔ kɛpɔ sɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ebui kpa tsyɛ elo, babàmɔ wɔnɔ ebui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ kɛlɛ babà dalɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinyeɛ shu nɛ kiwui ɛlɛ nabha gɛ ababa ebeɖi ɔlɔ. Ishu Esi Zhizhinì Ɔkɔ Beekusiɛ Nɛ̀ Bapaleteɛ

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: Nɛ Apaleteɛ nɛtakpu soɔ nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ ɔsha ka nyia ka gɛ bakpɛ nɛ banɔishi, ezedzi asɛ ekusiɛ gɛ yɛeɖi ɔsha gbagbla nabha o,

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: alo amadi ekusiɛ, gɛ ekusiɛ akpɛ asɛ apɔ̃ batɔ̃ kɔ bagɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpa tɛ akpɛ ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ elete nɛitití.

english_verse: God wants you to silence stupid and ignorant people by doing right.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ɔsɛ ganà kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, tɛ̀ nɔkɔ bawɔaga gɛ baɖɔ matì matì kaɖɔ ataatɔ̃.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Nɔzanà ɛkpã asɛ banɔ gɛ balɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ ana, pɔ nɔtɛ̀ lɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazã ɔlɔkɔ ɔdã wɔnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nulũ, pɔ nɔzã nɛkpã asɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ ana.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi gbangbã ɔkɔ aka nyia aka. Nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bayɛyɛkɛŋã balɛ kɛdzya bhɛbhɛtɛ, nɔosì Owusoso Akaa nɛifù, tɛ nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ ekusiɛ.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Banɔ dzidzi mɔ, nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ bapaleteɛ nɛ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ petee mɛ, gɛnɛ banɔ alɛ gɛapɛ pɛ beeɖì banɔ ashagabui ete, pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ bagbanà wɔnɔ nɛ tɛgagalĩɛ mɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ baɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã nɛ anɔ gɛ akpɛ kemi azã bɔtɔ nɔnɔɛdi gɛ kɛma sɛ azã bɔliesi pɔ aza bɔlɛ esiɛ shu, nɛ gɛ elu awɔ̃ nɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha so.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Kɛbhɛ babuia ɖuwoe nɔbɔ mɔ onupɛ behuisi wɔnɔ nɛ wɔnɔ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ takpu pɛ nɔkpɛ kemi nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ? Pɔ onupɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɛtakpu pɛ nɔkpɛ kemi nɛ ɛlɛ shuɔ, kinu ishu dadalɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ bekulu wɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ Kristo atɔ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu, kɛlɛ abhɛtɛ kɛlɛ akasɛ wɔnɔ, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔgã asɛ gɛ agã ana.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: “Agɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà, kɛlɛ begi lu banɔ wɔɛwɔɛ ibui nanà nɛ yɛolugbũ mɛ.”

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Kibeɛ gɛ baza kwɔalà yɛɛ tsyɛ elo, egibu kɛlɛilũ, gɛ azamɔ bɔtɔɔ, agɛkã ɔkɔ ananà. Pɔ alɔkɔ yɛishu ɔkɔ agɛ yeekulù kebhu gbangbãa.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: Yɛalɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa akpɛ yɛishuɔ mɛ̀ nɛ busiɛ shu, sɛ tɛ butsì ɔkɔ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tɛ̀ bɔzã nɛkpã ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, ganà yɛapɔ̃ mɛ bebu banyã akɔ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nɔzã asɛ ibhoshi gɛ ɛzɛ tsaɖakɛ idzo ana, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔɔ, nozotsyina ba ibhoshi agbagbana eleteɛ nɛ̀ agɛ yɛeɖi wɔnɔ atɔwuiɛ nabha ɔkɔ.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Banyɛedzini mɔ, nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ enyine alɛ sɛ tɛ̀, onupɛ balɛ ɔmaɛyɛmɛ teli agɛ yɛkɛ kibui nabha ŋãa tsyɛ elo, tɛ bè tsyina ɔganà wɔnɔ ɛkpã zazãna mɛ,

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: gɛ onupɛ bamɔ ɛkpã dadalɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛ balɛ ɛkpã shu.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ bubite yiyiɛ tìde ishupi tiwoewoese mɛ, asɛ kɛtakpù yuyu nɛ̀ sikã ɔdɔ kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ apɔtɛ ɔdɔ̃ gbangbã kpɛkpɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔkɔ wɔnɔ bubite yiyìɛ dè kitúɔ mɛ, bubite yiyiɛ gɛ bɔtɛ balà bele gɛide ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛɔtɔ ɖɔaɖɔ mɛ̀ pɛ lɔtɛ ɖɔaɖɔ mɛ, gɛ kɛyɛkɛ kedzì hohoe nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abha badzɛ dadalɛ gɛ atɛzã afala pɛ beeɖi otugbà mɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ ewoese balɛishu nɔ. Bezhinì ishu esi akɔ balɛ enyine alɛ,

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: adzɛ asɛ Sara, gɛ elũ atɔ̃ akɔ Abraham pɛ ezekulu yɛasɛ yɛapalete. Wɔnɔ onù yɛeyi adzɛ alɛ onupɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ pɛ nɔgɛ kɔ kifù sisi idzoɔ.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Badzɛenyine mɔ, nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abhaa, wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔolũ ebui esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ edzinì alɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔlɛ ɔplɛnɔ alɛ, tɛ nɔgbanà alɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ alɛ asɛ ohumi bhlui elete ana gɛ wɔnɔ nɛ alɛ ɔbɔ mɔ kaŋãsiɛ nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibu idɔ kɔkɔ ɔkɔ ɛkpã, sɛ tɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà tɛbà kɔ nɔyɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu. Bɔtɔ Mɔmɔ Denɔ Kibui Gbangbã Tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ Mɛ

english_verse: Finally, all of you should agree and have concern and love for each other. You should also be kind and humble.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɔ, wɔnɔ petee, nɔzã tenikpo nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, nɔobì ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, nɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ asɛ baadzya ana, nɔoɖi ashagabui tɛ nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ lɔkɔ kibui kpa ɔlɔkɔ buia kɛbhɛ ɔkɔ kibui kpa nɔ, alo nɔtsɛɖakɛ̀ aklɔatu, pɔ nɔoyulà ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ bekulu wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ̀ nɔbɔmɔ tiyuyulà.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ, “Anunɔ gɛ abadɛmɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpãa tɛ amɔ ewui gbangbãa kɛlɛ sɛ ebu yɛinekeɛ eyinɔ nɛ ebui kpa ɖɔɖɔ shu nɛ̀ tɛ ebu olugbũ odenɔ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ gɛawɔɛ banɔ shu.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ sɛ etsyinà edenɔ kibui kpa shu tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ kɛgbangbã, kɛlɛ sɛ apɛɛ ishu yɔyɔ tɛ abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abha.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ yɛawuhũɔ etsiɖì banɔ dadalɛ nabha kɛlɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ balɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu, pɔ Apaleteɛ namɛ alɔɛtití nɛ̀ bagɛ babhɛtɛ̀ ebui kpa shu.”

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Afana gɛ abà bhɛtɛ kizizĩ nɛ̀ wɔ gɛ onupɛ ɔpɛɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɔbhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã dza?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Pɔ onupɛ edzi asɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɔmɔ bɔtɔ nɛ kibui gɛpɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ shu tsyɛ elo, beyulà ɔkɔ wɔnɔ. “Nɔotɛ osifù nɛ̀ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ besì kifù nɔɔ, nɔtɛkɔ kifù yi wɔnɔ.”

english_verse: Honor Christ and let him be the Lord of your life. Always be ready to give an answer when someone asks you about your hope.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛɛ, nɔlɔkɔ Kristo asɛ wɔnɔ Apalete. Nɔbalɛ kibe nyia be tɛ̀ nɔobu kibui ulũ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka gɛ ebisì wɔnɔ kibui sɛ tɛ̀ nɔɖɔ kɛnɔnɔ shu sopɛ nɔoɖì kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ ebui alɛ. Pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ alɛ nɛ tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ̀ kaɖɔ gbangbã tɛɖɔɖɔ mɛ,

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: tɛ̀ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ebuiɛ adalɛ piapi, sɛ tɛ̀ kiwũi yi bagɛ balɛ aɖɔaɖɔ kpa pɛ beezhinì olugbũ esi nɛ wɔnɔ ɛkpã gbangbã tɛzazãna nɛ Kristo mɛ shu.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Apɛ adɛ gɛ onupɛ kinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛɛ́, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔtɔ̀ ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ ɔdɛ kibui zizĩ bhɛbhɛtɛ̀.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Kristo etsí butsì tunikpo akɔ ɔlɔ ebui kpa, anɔ gbangbã ebetsí akɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ sɛ tɛ̀ agbanà wɔnɔ amana Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Beyíi nɛ ishudzya mɛ, pɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkɔ yɛazã nɛ ɛkpã,

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: ɔfɔfuĩa gɛ ganà ɔlɛ abha, yɛavɛ adɛ ɖɔ kibuiɛ etseɖe ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛkpasɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɛgagalĩ batɔ̃ mɛ kibe dzlolo nɛlɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa adɔ yɔɔ nɛ Noa ibèɛ gɛ azafatɛ aɖakaohu hohoeɛ. Banɔ kasasà tieli balɛ azã aɖakaohu hohoeɛ mɛ, banɔ tasɛ balɛ bayɛkɛ odenɔ bulĩɛ mɛ,

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ bulĩ ɛlɛ kasɛ bulĩkpɛkpɛ nɛ kɛtakpu ɔkɔ anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ wɔnɔ elu nɛkpã otsiɛ. Gɛnɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bebù kibò nɛ anɔ shu, pɔ kibui tɔtɔɖɔ lu ɔganà kitú mɛibui gbangbã nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu. Kɛlɛ yɛkɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ganà Yesu Kristo yɛ̀ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ,

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: anɔ gɛavɛ kititiɛ pɛ avɛ Owusoso Akaa kɛŋã mɛ, ɔplɛnɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ, ɔshaeleteɛ nɛ̀ ihumieleteɛ tɛ bezhinì balɛ ishu esì akɔɛ.

english_verse: Christ suffered here on earth. Now you must be ready to suffer as he did, because suffering shows that you have stopped sinning.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, gɛ Kristo abamɔ bɔtɔ nɛ ishupiɛ mɛɛ soɔ, wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔ balɛ wɔnɔ ishu ɔkɔ ɛkpã zazãna ɛlɛ nɛidi, ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ amɔ bɔtɔ nɛ yɛishudzya mɛɛ, aŋã kibui kpa abha.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, agazã yɛ ɛkpã gɔgɔɛnɔ nɛ esiakpa abha nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛebui kpa tɛpɛpɛɛ ulũ, pɔ azã nɛkpã akɔ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa apɛ nɔ.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ nɔotizĩ kibè dzlolo nɛ ewuiɛ gɛ atɛ fala mɛ pɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ ibudì eleteɛ azatɔɖɔ abhɛtɛ mɛ, nɔzã nɛkpã nɛ kɛgɛ ishudzya pɛ ulũ, kanɔ mɛ same mɔmɔ, bunù bubuku, akpɛnɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ, bunù ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ibudì ɛkɔ tishushù.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Kɛbhɛtɛ balɛibi nɛ kibui nɔnɔ shu so pɛ, nɔgɛ dɛmɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔkpà plɛnɔ balɛ nɛ ɛkpã kpa zazãna ɛlɛ mɛ, kliso bakɔalà wɔnɔ.

english_verse: But they will have to answer to God, who judges the living and the dead.
translation_verse: Pɔ babà bhɛtɛ̀ akɔnta akɔ anunɔ gɛ abalɛ̀ eli akɔ kebhu kukulu nɛ̀ benunuɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ etsitsíɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu baɖɔ kibui gbangbã ɔkɔ bagɛ etitsíɛ tsyɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bekulù kebhu nɛ̀ alɛ nɛ banɔdzyrame ishupiɛ mɛ̀, pɔ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa xɔnɔ mɛɛ, babazã asɛ Owusoso Akaa anà.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Ebuiɛ petee alɛ ɔtɔ̃kɔ tso ɔbà. Klisoɔ nɔkɔ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ adalɛ tɛ nɔŋã wɔnɔ ishu abha sɛ tɛ̀ nɔlà okulu Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ dɛ alɛ peteɛ, nu ɔsɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ piapii, ɔmɔsɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ dã ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ gelee ulũ.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Nɔyɛkɛ agɔlɔ kpɛ bapãmɛ ɔkɔ tɛ̀ nɔtɛ zɔɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ kɛlɛ shu.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Anɔ ka nyia ka alɔkɔ yɛdɔkɔkɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ tɛ̀ aplɛnɔ bagɔgɔɛ nɔ, gana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ tɛ̀ alɔkɔ aɖɔ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ nɛ edzo gelee abha.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔaɖɔɔ, abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ asɛ anɔ gɛ aɖɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛibui ana. Onupɛ anɔ teli adɛ axɔ̃ɛ, abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɛ̀ ohumiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔɛ nɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɛ ebui petee mɛɛ, babà kpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití ɔganà Yesu Kristo abha. Ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ohumi ɔlɛ onu yɛ ɔyɛ odenɔ otsiɛ vɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Amen. Bɔtɔ Nɛ Kristo Mɛzazã Shu

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: Mɛɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, tifefekeɖiɛ mɛ gɛ nɔgã tɛbhɛtɛ wɔnɔ ibì, asɛ gɛ onupɛ kibui gɛ ɛbhɛtɛ ibi kɛlɛ bà wɔnɔ abha ana.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔmɔ same sɛ nɔɔtɔ̀ asɛ Kristo ana, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔbɔ mɔ same ɔfalanɔ kifu gɛ onupɛ bebebù yɛishu dadalɛ akasɛ.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bakwala ɔnɔ nɛ Kristo yɛtakpù tsyɛ elo, beyulà akɔ ɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ ishu dadalɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa otsiɖì wɔnɔ abha.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Onupɛ nɔmɔ ɔtɔɔ, kɛtɛ zã asɛ anɔ gɛeyì anɔ, ezĩ alo anɔ kpa nanà idi, alo asɛ anɔ gɛ akpɛ olugbũ nɛ ebui gɛ lagɛ kpà plɛnɔ yɛɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to suffer for being a Christian. Praise God that you belong to him.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, onupɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ asɛ Kristoeyi ana, nɔ tɛkɔ kiwũi yi wɔnɔ, pɔ nɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití sɛ nɔyɛkɛ kinye ɛlɛ nɛidi.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ na ɔkɔ kebhu kukulu, kɛlɛ kɛbà kpɛ esi edenɔ Owusoso Akaa bɔpã mɛ, kɛlɛ onupɛ kakpɛ esi nɛ̀ bɔlɔɔ pɔ, kɛlɛ kɛbà zã ɔkɔ bagɛ agɛ abhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛibui gbangbã nabhaa dza?

english_verse: “If good people barely escape, what will happen to sinners and to others who don't respect God?”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ, “Onupɛ aba gagalĩ sɛ tɛ̀ bayɛkɛ banɔ dadalɛ elù nɛkpã pɔ, kɛlɛ kɛbà zã ɔkɔ bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ tsyɛ mɔ, dza?

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ otsiɛ nɔ, bagɛ bamɔ ɔtɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ, balɔkɔ balɛishu akɔ Agɛ yɛabhɛtɛ̀ alɛ pɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã tɛ̀ bazã ɛlɛ abha azabhɛtɛ ebui gbangbã.

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: Mɛ asɛ ɔhamɛ sheshè ana, ɛɛkɔ wɔnɔ ɔhamɛ esheshèɛ gɛ alɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ ɛtakpu, asɛ anɔ gɛazã amɔ Kristo yɛɔtɔ nɛ̀ anɔ tsyɛ gɛ aba mɔ ishu dadalɛ gɛ bebebu akasɛ.

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: Nɔodzì ibhoshì agbagbana elete ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ibhoshiɛ gɛ bakpɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ, asɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛeɖi bɔdɔ̃ abha ana, gɛnɛ sɛ kibui gɛ batɔɖɔ akɔ wɔnɔ, pɔ kibui gɛ nɔdɛmɛ ɔsɛ nɔbɔ bhɛtɛ̀ asɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa apɛ asɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana, gɛnɛ tɛ̀ nɔpɛ ehoeyi ɔkɔ ishu, pɔ tɛ̀ nɔdɛmɛ ɔsɛ ɔbɔ ɔdɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ,

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: gɛnɛ tɛ̀ nɔodzì bapalete ɔkɔ bagɛ bakpasɛ wɔnɔ esiɛ, pɔ tɛ̀ ibhoshiɛ ɖi wɔnɔ ɛkpã tɛ̀ bazã balɛ ɛyɛ nɛ ɛlɛ ulũ.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ onupɛ Ibhoshiɛ Agbagbana Ekusiɛ ebekoeyìɛ, nɔbɔ yɛkɛ ishu dadalɛ ɛkpã kikutuɔ gɛ ɛtɛbà zĩ ɖiɛ.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Bayisɔ̃ mɔ, nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ bagɛ eshè adɛ ɔnɔ. Wɔnɔ petee nɔozhinì ishu esi ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ, “Owusoso Akaa alɔɛtití nɛ bagɛ beefeke balɛishuɔ shu pɛ ebhui bagɛ bezhinì balɛ ishu esiɛ xɔnɔ ebú.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi nɛ Owusoso Akaa Ohumieleteɛ ahɔɛ niesi, sɛ tɛ̀ efeke wɔ ewunɔ kabha nɛ kibè gulũi mɛ.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ petee ɔtɔɖɔ yɛabha ɔmɔsɛ, yɛeɖì wɔnɔ abha.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Nɔŋã wɔnɔ ishu abha tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛ̀ awɔ. Agɛ atɛadɛmɛ wɔnɔ ɛbui gɛenu abosamuɔ aafala asɛ dzata gɛ aadzɔ̀ pɛ apɛ anɔ asɛ tɛ̀ evũ atã.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Nɔlɔɛtití nɛishu, tɛ̀ nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ wɔnɔ adzya alɛ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee tsyɛ bagã bɔtɔ ɔlɛ nɛidi mɛ.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu tibhui bhuibu eleteɛ petee nɔ, anɔ gɛ yɛekulu wɔnɔ amana Kristo yɛ sameɛ gɛ etibeleɛ mɛɛ, gɛ onupɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ̀ ebekeɛ nɛ kibè gulũi lɛ, yɛabàkɔ nɔzã gagalĩi pɛ nɔ otɛbɔ hɔa.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Yɛahɔɛ ohumi ɔlɛ denɔ otsiɛ vɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Amen. Bɔdɔ̃ Sɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Denɔ Sila anɔ gɛ ɛlɔkɔ yɛasɛ anɔ gɛ ɛyɛkɛŋã, denɔ yɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ mɛ ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ gulũi kɔ wɔnɔ pɛ̀ ɛkpɛ wɔnɔ kemi tɛ̀ ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ dalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ sɛ, kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ. Nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ̀.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Ɔhaa gɛ ɔlɛ Babilonia pɛ bebu aplɛnɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ, kana mɛeyianyɛ Marko tsyɛ asɛnɔ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Nɔlɔkɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔsɛnɛ bagɔlɔ nɔ. Ishuyɔyɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔkpasɛ̀ Kristoɔ mɛ petee.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Mɛ Simon Petro, gɛinu Yesu Kristo yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ̀ anɔkpɛkpɛ, Mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ sɛsɛ, bagɛ ɔganà ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Yesu Kristoɔ gɛebu ɔlɔ bayɛkɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ɛlɛ gɛ yɛkɛ edzi asɛ bɔlɔ ɛyɛ ana.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ tikpekpè mɛ ɔganà Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu kibui titìɛ mɛ̀. Bhɛtɛ Wɔ Tikukuluɔ Nɛ̀ Tibubuɔ Tɛ Kɛzã Ɛlɛ Ɔzãkɔ

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Yɛohumi nɔ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bɔɔpɛ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ ɛkpã nɛ̀ Akaa mɛ tɛzazã, ɔganà kanà gɛ bɔbatì yɛ gɛ ekulu ɔlɔ amanà yɛishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ yɛebui gbangbã mɛ.

english_verse: God made great and marvelous promises, so his nature would become part of us. Then we could escape our evil desires and the corrupt influences of this world.
translation_verse: Ɔganà alɛ mɛɛ, akɔ ɔlɔ yɛɔdɔ̃ gbagbla nɛ̀ bɔgbangbã gɛ atɔɖɔ elu akɔ ɔlɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ ɔganà bɔlɛ mɛɛ, ɔbàzã yɛohumi nɔ mɛ, tɛ̀ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ nɔobu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ɔshɛ̃ nɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui tsɔtsɔmɔ̃ gɛide kalɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɛpɛ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Do your best to improve your faith by adding goodness, understanding,
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, nɔga kidzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ̀ nɔlɔkɔ kibui gbangbã plɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tɛ̀ ebui gbangbã tsyɛ plɛnɔ kibuititì,

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ɛkpã gbangbã ɛlɛ nɛidi lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ tikpekpè mɛɛ, kɛbà kɔ ɔsɛ wɔnɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa avɛ kabha nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛibui titìɛ mɛ.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Pɔ onupɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ nɛidi ma anɔ teli ahɔɛ, enu anɔ gɛ atɛ amɔ piapii kɛlɛ enu awuhũpú, pɛ adzɛkɛ asɛ betiplu yɛebui kpa gɛ abhɛtɛ abafala nɔ.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔ owlui ɔkpɛ emi gagalĩ tɛ kɛkasɛ ɔsɛ wɔnɔ tikukuluɔ nɛ̀ tibubuɔ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzakɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ nɔbhɛtɛ̀ ana, nɔtɛ bɔdɔ̃ oboe oɖi,

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ nɔbɔ mɔ tɛtsyatyanà gbangbã otsoku ɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ gɛ ebu ɔlɔ yɛukusi ŋaŋã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ. Kibuiɛ Gɛ Baɖɔ Elúɔ

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ ɛba zɛbakà wɔnɔ kibè nyia bè nɛ ebui alɛ shu, gɛ nɔonyi alɛ pɛ nɔkpɛ igu nɛ kibui gbã gɛ nɔyɛkɛ mɛ tsyɛ flogo.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: Nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛkà lɛ nɛkpã nɛ ishupi ɛlɛ mɛ koɔ kɛpɛ ɔsɛ ɛzɛ nyɛmɛ ɔnɔ nɛ ebui alɛ shu,

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ inyi ɔsɛ ezedzè pɛ ɛbà lɔkɔ ɛlɛ lù kɛwɔ̃a, asɛ gɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo adalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ kɔ mɛ ana.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Kliso ɛbà bhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka tɛ mɛiɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ onupɛ ɛba shɛɛ, nɔbɔ zɔbakà ebui alɛ kiwui nyia iwui.

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Anɛ ɛdzɛdzɛ gɛ bafatɛ ede bɔza pɛ bɔɖɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo ohumi nɛ̀ yɛ tɛbaba shu ebui tseɖe ɔnɔ, pɔ bɔza pɛ bɔmɔ yɛohumi nɔ nɛ̀ awuhũ.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ ayɛkɛ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ ishu dadalɛ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ozĩ oyì odenɔ Ohumi Ishudadalɛ Eleteɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ, “Mɛeyianyɛ nɛ alɛ, yɛibui mɛdɛmɛ, yɛ shu mɛmɔ same.”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Bɔlɔ atɔ elũ kaɖɔ alɛ gɛeyì odenɔ ititiɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔzã Yesu ɔbhà nɛ butu dadalɛ nabha.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Kɛkɔ ɔsɛ bɔba mɔ sɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ akpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, klisoɔ nɔ olu awɔ̃ piapii nɛ kibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ shu, asɛ kitséɛ gɛ kifu tsè nɛ otumũ mɛ ɔvɛnɔ olizatɔɔ, pɛ kɛvɔlɔ ɛwɔ̃ɛ tsyɛ kpaa tsé nɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Kɛgɛ dɛ alɛ petee kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, kibui ɖɔɖɔlu nanà ma gɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ aɖɔ nɛ balɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kibui gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ tide anɔ nanà tɛpɛpɛ ulũ, banɔ aɖɔaɖɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ gɛ onupɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gbanà alɛ kanà.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Asɛ kɛzã gɛ asɛnɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ atɛzã banɔɛishi abafala nɔ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ tsyɛ abekoeyì nɛ wɔnɔɛshi. Babà gã bɔshɛ mɛ abalɔkɔ asɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛ bazĩ udɔ akasɛ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɔ, babàdã kadã nɛ Apaleteɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ balɛ edziɛ shu, gɛ balɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ aba gbanà alɛ akpɛ butsì mɛ gulũi.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Banɔ gelee abàzã ebui kpa elete alɛ edzo niede pɛ babà zaɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛidzoɔ gɛinu kɛgbangbã shu.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Nɛ balɛ awuhũ dzadzã nɛ bɔdɔ̃ shu soɔ, asɛnɛ badɔkasɛ alɛ abalɔkɔ alɛ ɛdzɛdzɛ gɛ bafatɛ zhinì wɔnɔ kpɛ nɔ. Balɛ ɛpɔ bubuɔ dzi po alɛ kukuku, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ bayì alɛ, lɛ nɛ̀ awɔ̃.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Onupɛ Owusoso Akaa agɛ lɔkɔ etsye baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ babhɛtɛ ebui kpa, pɛ avɛnɔ alɛ nɛifúɔ gɛtã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ tɛ̀ bezepo kebhu kukuluɔ,

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: onupɛ agɛ lɔkɔ etsye kibelianɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ amana budekelĩ hohoe pɛ buvũ bagɛ egi tì Owusoso Akaa, pɛ ebú Noah, anɔ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, nɛ̀ baanɔ tegegene gɔgɔɛ nɔ,

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: onupɛ ebu Sodom nɛ̀ Gomora ɛma gbagbla ɛpɔ pɛ apɔɛ ɛlɛ lɛidzì bɔtɔ̃ɔ, pɛ abhɛtɛ ana sɛ tɛ̀ banɔ amɔ̃ elu nɛ kɛgɛ babà bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa nabhaa,

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: onupɛ ana kɛlɛ́ɛ, kɛlɛ notì ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ enyi ibu gɛ ebebù bagɛ adɛmɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa odenɔ tifefekeɖi mɛ, bagɛ atɛ abhɛtɛ ebui gbã nɛ kebhu kukulu iwui nabha, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ kɔ alɛ ɛtsiɖi ɛlɛ abha avɛ.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ inu kɛgbã ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ̀ gɛ bazana ɛkpã kpa nɛ alɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulu pɛ bagɛ lɔkɔ ɔsha niesi gɛ balɛ akpɛ kɛnanà mɛ betielũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɔsha. Nɛ kitè kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ishu fefeke mɛɛ, balà ɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛ kititì banɔ nɔ shu

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: gɛ Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ agagalĩ adɛ pɛ benu ohumi elete tsyɛ elo, batɛ aɖɔaɖɔ alɔkɔ ebhui kititì anɔ alɛ nɛidi ulũ nɛ Apaleteɛ amɛ.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Pɔ banɔ alɛ aaɖɔ atsɔ̃bui nɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ̀ begilũ alɛ esi mɛ. Bedzi asɛ kifutù mɛ bagãhoe, gɛ bamɔ alɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bevu alɛ eyí, kɛlɛ balɛ tsyɛ ebetsì asɛ bagãhoe ana.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Babà mɔ ɔtɔ odenɔ bɔtɔ gɛ balɛ tsyɛ akɔ anɔ bhlatɔ shu. Kɛgɛ bapɛ nɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bawɔ̃ɛ tɛ̀ bebukù gɛ nɛ kiwui nyenyé hrɛrɛrɛ mɛ. Benu banɔ gɛ babhɛtɛ̀ awuĩ ebui nɛ̀ ebui kpɛnɛ̀ kpɛnɛ̀ gɛ bamɔ̃ samè nɛ ɛkpã ŋaŋã kibeɛ gɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Balɛ awuhũɔ etsiɖi ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ shu, kliso batɛ balà yɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ. Bawɔɛ bagɛ agɛ kpɛ iguɔ, bedzi beyì gɛ baɖɔ kibui akpɛ!

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Bashɛ̀ nɛ kidzoɔ gidzì tĩi nabha pɛ betsyina atɔnɔ̃ Balam gɛenu Boa yɛeyianyɛ edzoɔ niede, anɔ gɛ adɛmɛ kɛbhɛ babuia nɛ̀ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui.

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: Pɔ etukusɔ ete yɛetseɖe nii nɛ yɛ ebui kpa bhɛtɛ bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, agãhoe gɛ atɛaɖɔaɖɔ, yɛaɖɔ anɔdzyrame aɖɔ pɛ agɛ dɛmɛ atɔɖɔ ebuiɖɔluanɔ egugu dɔdɔ ibuiɛ nabha.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Banɔ alɛ edzi asɛ bulĩ ahɔ gɛiti ku ulĩ, nɛ̀ ɔmɔlɔ̃ gɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ lɔkɔ ɔlɛ vɛnɔɔ. Otumũɔ gɛ ɔlɔ ɔnɔ ɔdɛɛ babalɛ elú akɔ alɛ.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Pɔ baaɖɔ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛ ebui alɔkɔ ahɔɛ etũ etelũ nɔ, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ balɛ ishupiɛ nɛ̀ ebui kpa gɛ badɛmɛ nɔ, awɔɛ bagɛ akpɛ esi ebù tɛtsɛɖɛ̀ mɛ ashɛ nɛ bagɛ azanà ɛkpã kpa ɔbha.

english_verse: They promise freedom to everyone. But they are merely slaves of filthy living, because people are slaves of whatever controls them.
translation_verse: Asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ alɛ atɔɖɔ ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã elu kɔ anɔ, gɛ balɛ pɔ enu banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui, ɔmɔsɛ̀ anɔdzyrame edzì anɔ dzidzì akɔ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ kɛŋã yɛabha.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ashɛ nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu pɛ bebetì Apalete Yesu pɛ banyana yɛ mɛ evunɔ gagalĩ pɛ bezetsodzì avɛ ɛkpã kpa gɛ ɛlɛ batɛzã mɛɛ eɖi pɛ lɛŋã alɛ abha, kidegba ɛkpã gɛ babà zanàa bazĩ ɔdɛ ɛgɛ batɛzã bafala nɔ.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Kɛtapɛ̃ ɔkɔ alɛ ɔdɛ sɛ begitì edzo dadalɛ, ɔdɛ sɛ betì ɛlɛ pɛ bewlui tsyina ede kpɛ ɔsha dadalɛ gɛ bakɔ alɛ.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Buluhũ sheshèɛ gɛ behu nɛ alɛ shu sɛ, “Ebú etsodzì avɛ̀ yɛoyukukùɔ shu, kɛlɛ ɛhàa gɛ bewulunɔ piapii nɔ tsyɛ eze etsyina avɛ̀ edi wulu nɛ apɔtɔ mɛ̀.”

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: Ɛpɛ ɔsɛ nɔ bakà ebuiɛ gɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ dadalɛ aɖɔ elù aba falanɔ nɛ̀ ɔsha gɛ bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ gɛ ebu ɔlɔ akɔ ɔlɔ ɔganà wɔnɔ banɔkpɛkpɛ nabha.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Putɔnɔ kɔ ɛlɛ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ nɔolũ kɛlɛ esi ɔsɛ̀ nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛɛ banɔ gɛezĩ banɔ shuɔ ebekoeyì, bebè zĩ anɔ shu pɛ babà za nɛ̀ ɛkpã kpa nɛ alɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulũ.

english_verse: and say, “Didn't your Lord promise to come back? Yet the first leaders have already died, and the world hasn't changed a bit.”
translation_verse: Babàɖɔ asɛ, “Gɛ atɔɖɔ asɛ ‘abaa’ pɔ yɛɛxɔ? Denɔ kibeɛ gɛ bɔlɔ akaalɛ etsíɛ, kɛka nyia ka vɛ ɛlɛ abha asɛ kana gɛ kɛzã odenɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ esi kpɛkpɛ ibè.”

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Pɔ badzɛkɛ asɛ kibè dzlolo nɛlɛ gɛ ɔganà Owusoso Akaa kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ mɛ babhɛtɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ odenɔ bulĩ mɛ gɛ kede bulĩ mɛ̀.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: Denɔ beelĩ alɛ mɛ, balɔkɔ budekelĩ zĩ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ nɔ.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Ganà kibui ɛlɛ tinikpo mɛɛ, babàlɛ obo iwusosonɔ nɛ̀ kesiakpa elu akɔ kebhu kukulu iwui nabha ɔkɔ bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa balɛ tiyiyí.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Anɛ gɛ Apaleteɛ atɛ ahɔa nɛ yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ shu asɛ ilũɔ gɛ beteli elu tɛmahɔa mahɔa esi anà. Adɔ fɔ̃ɔ kɔ ɔnɔ, gɛ atɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ananà ɛkpã zĩ, pɔ tɛ̀ aka nyia aka etsyinà yɛitúɔ mɛ.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Pɔ Apaleteɛ nɛiwuiɛ babà asɛ kɛba gɛ ezĩ aba ana. Nɛ iwui ɛlɛ nabhaa, kititíɛ bayalà nɛ̀ ozĩ gagalĩ, kifu bapɔɛ kititì udɔ̃, kɛlɛ kesiakpa nɛ̀ kalɛ kɛka nyia ka batã.

english_verse: Everything will be destroyed. So you should serve and honor God by the way you live.
translation_verse: Gɛ bebè zĩ kɛka nyia ka nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabha soɔ, banɔ ɖuwoe idì kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ nɔodzìɛ dza? Kɛlɛ sɛ nɔzã ɛkpã dadalɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa mɛ

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: nɛ kibèɛ gɛ nɔoɖì idzomɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa iwuiɛ tɛbaba tsĩɔɔ nɔ. Kiwui ɛlɛ kifu bazĩ kititì ɔdɔ̃, kɛlɛ kititì ɔdɔ̃ balolò ganà kɛkpɛkpɛ hohoe mɛ̀.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Pɔ gɛ bupo kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ eluɔ soɔ, buuɖì kidzo mɛ tsyɛ ɔkɔ kititì vɔvɔ nɛ̀ kesiakpa vɔvɔ, bɔpã lɛ mɛ̀ gɛ ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ̀ alɛ.

english_verse: My friends, while you are waiting, you should make certain the Lord finds you pure, spotless, and living at peace.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, mɛ ɔbhialɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ nɔoɖì idzomɛ ɔkɔ ebui ɛlɛ soɔ, nɔbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbɔlà tɛ̀ batɛ mɔ kibò nɛ̀ bamɛtsitsí ibui nanà nɛ wɔnɔ shu, tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ ɔplɛnii.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ kɛzã wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ɔsɛ, Apaleteɛ tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ nu tɛyɛyɛkɛ kɔ ɔlɔ, asɛ kana gɛ Paulo bɔlɔ adzya gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ̀ tsyɛ alɔkɔ bubutiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔɛ afɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ wɔnɔ nɔ.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, yɛtsyɛ afɔnɔ yɛ̀ buplukpa petee gɛ asɛsɛ wɔnɔ, pɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ebui alɛ shu nɛ bɔlɛ mɛ. Ebui teli idi akpasɛ yɛuplukpa mɛ gɛ alɛ esi lulũ agagalĩ, ebuiɛ gɛ matì matì mɛ anɔ gɛ agɛ kpɛ iguɔ etsyina etũ, asɛ gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ ebui fɔfɔnɔ bhlatɔ tsyɛ shu ana, ɔkɔ alɛ ishu tizizĩ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Klisoɔ, mɛ ɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ nonyi kibui ɛlɛ soɔ, nɔzã nawɔ̃ sɛ tɛ̀ bagɛ betie shù ɔshaa atɛba gbanà wɔnɔ ata esi, tɛ̀ nɔotibo dɔ oboe nɛ ɔzãkɔ gɛ nodzi gagalĩɛ.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔzã ɛlɛ tɛ nozoshè nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ nɛ̀ bubutiɛ gɛ Apaleteɛ Yesu Kristo gɛ ayɛkɛ akɔ bɔlɔ mɛ. Yɛ bakɔ ishu dadalɛ odenɔ otsiɛ, ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ! Amen.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Kibuiɛ gɛ zã odenɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ esiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ, gɛ butilũ ɖiɛ, pɛ bɔtɛ mɔɖi tsyɛ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ awuhũɔ, pɛ bulu awɔ̃ oɖi pɛ bɔlɔ ɛhɔɛ tsyɛ hunùɔ, ebui alɛ bɔɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ nɛ ɛkpa Ebuiɛ shu.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Gɛ ɛkpã ibuiɛ ekoeyìɛ, bɔmɔ ɛlɛ kɛlɛ bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ dalɛ ɛlɛ shu, kɛlɛ bɔɖɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ ebuiɛ tseɖe wɔnɔ, ebuiɛ gɛ lazã Akaa ɔkɔ pɛ lebekoeyi ɔkɔ bɔlɔ.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Bɔɖɔ ebuiɛ gɛ bɔmɔ pɛ bulũɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔzã ɔhakpɛkpɛ mɛ̀ nɛ ɔlɔ. Kɛlɛ bɔlɔ ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Akaa nɛ̀ Yɛeyì anyɛ Yesu Kristo

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Bɔfɔnɔ ebui alɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bɔkɔ bɔlɔ same mɔmɔ aná. Tɛgagã Nɛ Tɛdadalɛ Mɛ

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Ebuiɛ gɛ bulũ odenɔ yɛɔkɔ pɛ̀ bɔɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ nɛ alɛ sɛ, Owusoso Akaa enu tɛdadalɛ, otumũ nanà ɔmã yɛmɛ.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bɔɔɖɔ ɔsɛ bɔkpasɛ ɔhakpɛkpɛ mɛ ɔplɛnɔ yɛɛ, pɛ bɔkà gã nɛ otumũɔ mɛɛ, bɔsɛ asɛnɛ kɛlɛ bɔgɛ gã nɛ kibui gbã shu.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Pɔ onupɛ bɔgã nɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛɛ, asɛ kana gɛ yɛtsyɛ agã nɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ anaa, kɛlɛ bɔkpasɛ ɔhakpɛkpɛ mɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, kɛlɛ Yɛeyì Yesu dzyosu nɔ, abadalɛ bɔlɔ shu nɛ ebui kpa ka nyia ka mɛ.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bɔɔɖɔ ɔsɛ kibui kpa nanà ma bɔlɔ shuɔ, ishu bɔwɔɛ kɛlɛ kibui gbã ma bɔlɔ mɛ.

english_verse: But if we confess our sins to God, he can always be trusted to forgive us and take our sins away.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bɔɖɔ ebui kpa gɛ bɔbhɛtɛ, enu anɔ gɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã ɔsɛ, abalɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ etsye bɔlɔ tɛ̀ eplu ɔlɔ odenɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bɔɖɔ ɔsɛ bɔgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa, kɛlɛ bɔbhɛtɛ yɛ asɛ asɛnɛ elete ana, kɛlɛ yɛeibuiɛ ama ɔkɔ nanà nɛ bɔlɔ ɛkpã mɛ.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔtɛ̀ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa. Pɔ onupɛ anɔ teli abhɛtɛ kibui kpa, anɔ teli alɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ ebu bɔlɔ ulũ nɔ nɛ Akaa namɛ, yɛenu Yesu Kristo, Anɔ Dadalɛ.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: Yɛenu bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ, gɛnɛ bɔlɔ ete pɔ ɔkɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ petee kalɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Onupɛ bɔbhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabhaa, kɛlɛ kɛkasɛ ɔsɛ̀ bunyi yɛ.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Inyi yɛ,” pɛ atɛa abhɛtɛ̀ atɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabhaa enu asɛnɛ elete, kɛlɛ kibui gbã ma yɛ mɛ.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Pɔ onupɛ anɔ teli abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabha, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ná nɛ yɛmɛ. Kidzo ɛlɛ aba buutì ɔsɛ bɔkpasɛ yɛ mɛ yɛ.

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ asɛ akpasɛ yɛmɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ agã asɛ Yesu anà tsyɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛnɛ ɔshà vɔvɔ mɛfɔnɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ, pɔ okukuɔ gɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔ. Ɔsha kuku ɛlɛ inù ebuiɛ gɛ nolũɔ.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Pɔ ɛfɔnɔ ɔsha vɔvɔ kɔ wɔnɔ, bɔmɔ ɛlɛ ebui gbã nɛ yɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ otumũ nulũ ɔbafala kɛlɛ kifúigbã vɛlɛ dɛkɛ.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ asɛ akpasɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ, pɛ anyanã yɛadzya akpɛ ɛyamɛɛ, anɔ alɛ aka kpasɛ otumũ mɛ.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛadzyaa, anɔ alɛ akpasɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ kibui nanà ma yɛmɛ gɛ bakɔ yɛakpatà bɔdɔ̃.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Pɔ anunɔ gɛ anyana yɛadzya akpɛ ɛyamɛ xɔnɔ akpasɛ otumũ mɛ kɛlɛ anyɔ afalà nɛ otumũ mɛ, kɛlɛ etinyi ɛkɛlɛ gɛ avɛɛ, ɔmɔsɛ otumũɔ opú yɛahũɔ.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ, mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔmɔsɛ balɔkɔ wɔnɔ ebui kpa etsye wɔnɔ nɛ yɛinye nɛtakpu.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ, bakaa ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi anunɔ gɛenu odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ. Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ bayisɔ̃, ɔmɔsɛ nɔ ɔŋã anɔ kpa nabha. Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ beyiɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi Akaa.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ beyiakaa, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi anunɔ gɛenu odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ. Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ bayisɔ̃, ɔmɔsɛ nɔgagalĩ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa nibuiɛ kpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ nɔŋã anɔ zizĩɛ nabha. Nɔtɛ̀ Dɛmɛnɔ Nɛ̀ Kanɔ Nɔ̀

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ̀ dɛmɛ nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ alo kɛdɔ̃ nanà nɛ kalɛ mɛ tsyɛ. Onupɛ anɔ teli adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Akaa ma yɛmɛ.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, lɛenu ɔdɔ gɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete adɛmɛ nɔ, yɛ awuhũ ɔdɔ pɛpɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ahɔɛ tutu nɛitélũ nɛ kɛgɛ lɛ yɛahɔɛ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛɛ shu, ebui alɛ gide Akaa ɔkɔ, pɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ ɔkɔ ledè.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Kanɔ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ kalɛ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɛpɛ ulũ baafala, pɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ nabha xɔnɔ abazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã tihɔɔ. Ɔshakpɛkpɛ Nɛ Asɛnɛ Kristoeleteɛ Shu

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ɔɖà tata gɔgɔɛ nɔ nɔlɛ, nɛ̀ asɛ kana gɛ notilũ ɔsɛ asɛnɛ kristoelete abaa, otsiɛ nɔ tsyɛ asɛnɛ kristoeleteɛ atɛba eku. Kana bɔlɔkɔ tì ɔsɛ ɔɖà tata gɔgɔɛ nɔ nɔlɛ.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Bekoeyì nɛ bɔlɔ ishi, pɔ betinù banɔ tsyɛ gɛ akpasɛ bɔlɔ ishi. Ɔmɔsɛ pɛ otɛ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ ishi bakpasɛɛ, tsyɛ alo batɛ azã bɔlɔ mɛ̀, pɔ balɛ tɛshɛshɛ kasɛ sɛ̀ balɛ ɔmayɛmɛ nanà ama bɔlɔ ishi.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔmɔ bɔbɔ sasara odenɔ Anɔ Dadalɛ Ɔkɔ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ petee onyi kibui gbã.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Ɛtɛ fɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ sɛ gɛ nɔotinyi kibui gbã so, pɔ gɛ nɔonyi ɛlɛ, pɛ asɛnɛ ebui nanà eti odekoeyì nɛ kibui gbã mɛ so.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Afana gɛenu asɛnɛ eleteɛ? Yɛenu anunɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ tɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha sɛ Yesu yɛenu Kristoɔ. Anɔ alɛ nɛidiɛ yɛenu asɛnɛ kristoɔ, yɛenu anɔ gɛ yɛatɛ ayɛkɛ Akaa nɛ̀ Eyianyɛ nabha aŋã.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
