translation_verse: Anɔ nanà ma gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ Eyianyɛ pɛ ebetì Akaa xɔnɔ, anunɔ gɛenyi Eyianyɛɛ yɛenyi Akaa tsyɛ.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Nɔoɖi kɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ kɛgɛ nɔolũ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ zã wɔnɔ mɛ. Onupɛ kɛzãa ana, wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔbɔzã Eyianyɛ nɛ̀ Akaa mɛ.

english_verse: The Son has promised us eternal life.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ elú akɔ bɔlɔ kɛlɛinu, ɛkpã gɛlɛ tihɔɔ nɔ.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ bagɛ bapɛ asɛ agbanà wɔnɔ atsaɖakɛ kidzoɔ shu.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ xɔnɔɔ, bɔbɔ sasara gɛ nɔyɛkɛ odenɔ yɛ mɛɛ kakpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ. Nɔgɛ pɛ ananà tɛ akasɛ wɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃. Pɔ gɛ yɛɔbɔ sasara kasɛ wɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ ebuiɛ petee shu pɛ butinu asɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛɛ, bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔbɔ sasara kasɛ wɔnɔɔ, nɔzã yɛ mɛ ana. Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyi Alɛ

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, otsiɛ nɔ, nɔzã yɛmɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ onupɛ ebekoeyìɛ, bɔbàmɔ awɔ̃ lulu kɛlɛ kiwũi tɛbàyì bɔlɔ nɛ yɛamɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ebekuɔ.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Onupɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ anɔ dadalɛ yɛenuɔ, pɛ nɔonyi tsyɛ ɔsɛ aka nyia aka gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ kibui gbangbã edekoeyì nɛ yɛmɛ.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gbagbla ɖuwoe idi nɛ ɛlɛ gɛ Akaa alɔkɔ akɔ ɔlɔ mɔ dza, sɛ̀ bekulu ɔlɔ asɛ yɛeyi alɛ bunu! Kɛlɛ yɛeyi alɛ bunu ɛgbã! Kɛgɛ kɛlɛ shu so pɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ etinyi ɔlɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ gɛ betinyi yɛ so.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ, otsi alɛ bunu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ, kɛlɛ bekebu kɛgɛ bɔbà dziɛ kasɛ. Pɔ bunyi sɛ onupɛ ebekoeyìɛ, bɔbà zã asɛ yɛanà, ɔmɔsɛ bɔbà mɔ yɛ asɛ kana gɛ alɛɛ ana.

english_verse: This hope makes us keep ourselves holy, just as Christ is holy.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ eɖì idzomɛ akɔ yɛɛ adalɛ yɛishu, asɛ kana gɛ yɛishuɔ dalɛ ana.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa, ɔshaa yɛayɛɛ, kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ, kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nu ɔshabha abha mabhɛtɛ mabhɛtɛ.

english_verse: You know Christ came to take away our sins. He isn't sinful,
translation_verse: Pɔ nɔonyi ɔsɛ, aba sɛ tɛ̀ ebu ɔlɔ ebui kpa shɛnɛ. Kɛlɛ kibui kpa ma yɛ mɛ.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Ananà ma gɛ akpasɛ yɛmɛ pɛ azazã kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha. Ananà mɛ gɛ etsiɖi kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha pɛ abàɖɔ asɛ amɔ̃ yɛ alo enyi yɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpaa, yɛenu anɔ gɛedè abosam ɔkɔ, ɔmɔsɛ abosam xɔnɔɔ, ebui kpa abhɛbhɛtɛ elete yɛenu odenɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ esi ɔkpɛkɔ. Kibui nɔnɔ shu so pɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyianyɛ aba kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ebezĩ abosam yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Anɔ nanà ama gɛenu Owusoso Akaa anɔ pɛ abazã kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha, ɔmɔsɛ bamɔ́ yɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ abha bɔgã pɛ buuti bagɛ enu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ enu abosam yɛeyi alɛ tsyɛ. Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ atɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzakɔ etinu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi, kana anɔ yia anɔ gɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛadzya tsyɛ alɛ. Nɔdɛmɛ Bagɔlɔ Ibui

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ nɔolũ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔ ɔsɛ̀, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Nɔtɛ̀ zã asɛ Kain ana, anɔ gɛenu Abosam ayɛ pɛ eyí yɛadzyaa. Kɛlɛ kiɖuwoe so pɛ eyíi? Ɔmɔsɛ yɛ ahɔɛ edzoɔ enu edzo kpa pɛ yɛadzya ayɛ xɔnɔ adalɛ.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔtɛ kɔ kɛbhɛtɛ wɔnɔ ibì gɛ onupɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ agɛ dɛmɛ wɔnɔ ibuiɛ.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Bunyi sɛ̀ budekoeyì nɛ butsi mɛ ba ɛkpã mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bɔdɛmɛ bɔlɔ adzya alɛ ibui. Anunɔ gɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ anɔ akakpasɛ butsì mɛ.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ yɛadzya ibuiɛ enu anɔ gɛ eyianɔ, kɛlɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ anɔ gɛ eyianɔ atɛ bàmɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ mɛ azã.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ abha bɔgã pɛ butì kɛgɛ inu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, Yesu Kristo alɔkɔ yɛkpã elú akɔ ɔlɔ. Bɔlɔ tsyɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔkɔ ɔlɔ ɛkpã lu ɔkɔ ɔlɔ adzya alɛ.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Onupɛ kanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ lɛ anɔ teli ahɔɛɛ pɛ amɔ asɛ yɛadzya apɛ ɛdɔ̃ɔ pɛ egibì yɛ ashagabuiɛ, kɛlɛ́ Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ baza yɛ mɛ̀ dza?

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔtɛkɔ bɔlɔkɔ kineke lɔkɔ dɛmɛ nɛ anɔ nɔ, pɔ nɔkɔ bɔlɔkɔ ɔlɔ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ kibui gbã builɛ ɔkasɛ.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Alɛ abha bɔbà gã pɛ bɔbà tisɛ bɔkpasɛ kibui gbã mɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ bɔlɔkɔ bɔlɔ etúɔ lu awɔ̃ nɛ yɛabha

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: gɛ onupɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ bu ɔlɔ ɛpɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa egbogblo adɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ kɛlɛ enyi kɛka nyia ka.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, onupɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ etiebu ɔlɔ ɛpɔɔ, kɛlɛ́ bulu awɔ̃ nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa nabha

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: asɛ bɔbà yɛkɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bubusì odenɔ yɛahɔɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bulũ batɔ̃ akɔ yɛɔsha pɛ bɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ kikù yɛawɔ nabha.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ yɛɔsha ɔlɛ onu ɔsɛ, tɛ̀ bɔyɛkɛ Yɛeyianyɛ Yesu Kristo abha ŋã, nɛ̀ tɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ asɛ gɛ ɔkpɛ ɔshà akɔ ɔlɔ ana.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Bagɛ babhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabha balɛ akpasɛ yɛmɛ, kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ akpasɛ balɛ mɛ. Kana bɔbhɛtɛ pɛ buutì ɔsɛ akpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ. Bunyi kibui ɛlɛ gana ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔlɛ yɛakɔ ɔlɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: Mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔtɛ yɛkɛ ɛfɔfuĩa ka nyia ka abha ɔŋã, pɔ nɔolũ awɔ̃ oɖi ɛfɔfuĩa nɔ tɛ̀ nɔmɔ ɔsɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ lide, ɔmɔsɛ asɛnɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ kpekpèɛ etsoku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ.

english_verse: and you can know which ones come from God. His Spirit says that Jesus Christ had a truly human body.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ abha nɔbɔ gã pɛ nɔbɔ mɔ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔɔlɛ, ɔfɔfuĩa ka nyia ka gɛ lɔonyi ɔsɛ Yesu Kristo aba nɛ ishudzya mɛɛ, ɔfɔfuĩa ɔlɛ ode Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ,

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: pɔ ɔfɔfuĩa ka nyia ka gɛ lɔotinyi Yesuɔ, logidè Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Ɔfɔfuĩa ɔlɛ onù asɛnɛ kristoelete ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, gɛ nɔolũ ɔsɛ lɔbàa, pɛ lɔotibo ku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ otsiɛ nɔ.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ nɔodè kɛlɛ nɔŋã alɛ abha, ɔmɔsɛ agɛ yɛakpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛɛ egbogblo adɛ agɛ yɛalɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ.

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ balɛ, kliso baaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ mɔmɔ ulũ, kɛlɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ alɛ.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ bɔlɔ xɔnɔ dè, kɛlɛ aka nyia aka gɛ enyi Owusoso Akaa ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ, pɔ anunɔ gɛ egide Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ atɛ atàaatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ. Kidzo ɛlɛ abha bɔgã pɛ bɔmɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛonu kibui gbã nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɔonù asɛnɛ ɔyɛ. Owusoso Akaa Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ Nɛ̀ Bɔlɔ Ɔyɛ

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔkɔ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ de Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Aka nyia aka gɛ adɛmɛ nɛ anɔ, enu anɔ gɛ bamɔ́ yɛ edenɔ Owusoso Akaa mɛ kɛlɛ enyi Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ atɛ dɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ, etinyi Owusoso Akaa, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha Owusoso Akaa akasɛ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ bɔlɔ ishi, akpɛ Yɛeyianyɛ tenikpo nɔ asɛsɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ asɛ tɛ bɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã gana yɛabha.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛnɛ kana gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛenu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, pɔ yɛadɛmɛ ɔlɔ ɛbui sopɛ asɛsɛ Yɛeyianyɛ asɛ tɛ̀ abedzi bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa etsye bɔlɔ.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: Mɛɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ ɔlɔ ibui soɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ dɛmɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Anana akamɔ Owusoso Akaa eɖi, pɔ onupɛ bɔdɛmɛ agɔlɔ ibuiɛ, Owusoso Akaa abazã ɔlɔ mɛ kɛlɛ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ bana nɛ ɔlɔ mɛ.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Bunyi sɛ bɔkpasɛ yɛmɛ kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ akpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ, Ɔmɔsɛ yɛakɔ ɔlɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ bɔmɔ pɛ bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ dalɛ kɛlɛ shu sɛ, Akaa yɛakpɛ Yɛeyiɛ sɛ tɛ̀ abayɛkɛ akɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli adalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ asɛ Yesu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ, Owusoso Akaa akpasɛ yɛmɛ kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Kliso bunyi, kɛlɛ bɔkpà plɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ. Owusoso Akaa enu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɛ anɔ. Anunɔ gɛ edzinɔ yɛkpã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ, anɔ alɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ akpasɛ yɛ mɛ.

english_verse: If we truly love others and live as Christ did in this world, we won't be worried about the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ná nɛ bɔlɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔlɔkɔ zipo kebhukulu kiwuiɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɛ asɛ yɛ ana nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Kifù sisi ma tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ. Pɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛnáa bu kifù sisi oyinɔ, ɔmɔsɛ kifusisi mɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ azã. Anunɔ gɛ esi kifuɔ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tɛnà.

english_verse: We love because God loved us first.
translation_verse: Bɔdɛmɛ nɔ, ɔmɔsɛ yɛeputɔ adɛmɛ nɛ bɔlɔ.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔ asɛ “Ɛdɛmɛ nɔ Owusoso Akaa,” pɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛadzyaa, asɛnɛ elete yɛenu. Ɔmɔsɛ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛadzyaa, anɔ gɛ amɔ nɛ̀ awuhuɔ, atɛ balà adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa gɛ atɛ amɔ nɛ̀ awuhũ.

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ akɔ ɔlɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ asɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ adɛmɛnɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa, tɛ adɛmɛ nɛ̀ yɛadzya tsyɛ.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã sɛ̀ Yesu yɛenu Kristoɔ, enu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ, kɛlɛ aka nyia aka gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ Akaa adɛmɛ nɔ yɛeyiɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha bɔgã pɛ buti sɛ̀ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ, gɛ onupɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ Owusoso Akaa pɛ bɔbhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ yɛɔshaa nabhaa.

english_verse: We show our love for God by obeying his commandments, and they are not hard to follow.
translation_verse: Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ̀, tɛ bɔbhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ yɛɔshaa nabha. Kɛlɛ yɛɔshaa tsyɛ gɛ gagalĩ,

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ aka nyia aka gɛede Owusoso Akaa mɛ aŋã kanɔ nɔ̀ nabha. Kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu kabha ŋaŋã gɛŋã kanɔ nɔ̀ nabha, gɛenu ɔlɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: Afana gɛenu anɔ gɛ aŋã kanɔ nɔ̀ nabha? Anunɔ gɛ yɛayɛkɛ aŋã sɛ̀ Yesu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyiɛ ete.

english_verse: Water and blood came out from the side of Jesus Christ. It wasn't just water, but water and blood. The Spirit tells about this, because the Spirit is truthful.
translation_verse: Anɔ alɛ yɛagã bulĩ nɛ̀ dzyosu mɛ aba, yɛenu Yesu Kristoɔ. Agɛ gã bulĩ ete mɛ̀ pɛ aba, pɔ bulĩ nɛ̀ dzyosu mɛ yɛagã aba. Kɛlɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ ɖɔaɖɔ dalɛ̃ kɛlɛishu, ɔmɔsɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ onu kibui gbã.

english_verse: In fact, there are three who tell about it.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ banɔ edì tata balɛ aɖɔaɖɔ dalɛ kɛlɛishu,

english_verse: They are the Spirit, the water, and the blood, and they all agree.
translation_verse: Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, bulĩɛ nɛ̀ dzyosu nɔ, kɛlɛ banɔ edi tata alɛ tenikpo.

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: Bɔyɛkɛ anɔdzyrame ebui ɖɔɖɔ, pɔ Owusoso Akaa ebui ɖɔɖɔ egbogblo adɛ, ɔmɔsɛ alɛenu Owusoso Akaa ebui gɛaɖɔ nɛ Yɛeyianyɛ shu.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ gɛ baɖɔ adalɛ yɛishuɔ bazã anɔ ka nyia ka yɛitúɔ mɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa Eyi nabha aŋãa. Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha aŋãa abhɛtɛ yɛ yɛedzi asɛnɛ elete, ɔmɔsɛ agɛ yɛkɛ kibuiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ adalɛ Yɛeyiɛ shuɔ nabha aŋã.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Kibui ɛlɛ yɛaɖɔ adalɛ yɛishu asɛ, Owusoso Akaa akɔ ɔlɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ, kɛlɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ kpasɛ Yɛeyianyɛ mɛ.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ Eyiɛ nabha ŋã ɛkpã lɛ yɛahɔɛ, kɛlɛ ɛkpã ma anunɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi nabha mɛ. Ebuiɖɔɖɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa Eyiɛ ninye nabha aŋã, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔotì ɔsɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ.

english_verse: We are certain God will hear our prayers when we ask for what pleases him.
translation_verse: Awɔ̃ lulu alɛ yɛakpasɛ ɔlɔ mɛ sopɛ butso ɔplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa, sɛ tɛ̀ onupɛ bubisì kɛdɔ̃ tiliɛ nɛ yɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ, aba taatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ onupɛ bunyi sɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ nɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bubisiɛ shuɔ, bunyi sɛ bɔbà mɔ kɛgɛ bubisi odenɔ yɛɔkɔɔ.

english_verse: Suppose you see one of our people commit a sin that isn't a deadly sin. You can pray, and this person will be given eternal life. But the sin must not be one that is deadly.
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli amɔ yɛadzya gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa tili gɛ kɛtɛ bagbanà yɛ ɔvɛnɔ butsì mɛɛ, ekulu Owusoso Akaa tɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ̀ anɔ alɛ amɔ ɛkpã. Ɛɖɔaɖɔ nɛ banɔ alɛ gɛ balɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tɛ gbanà alɛ kpɛ butsi mɛ shu. Kibui kpa tili lɛ gɛ kɛgbanà anɔ ɔvɛnɔ butsì mɛ. Ɛtɛɖɔ ɔsɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Kesitata ka nyia ka ɛdi nu kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ, kɛlɛ kibui kpa tili lɛ gɛ kɛtɛ gbanà anɔ vɛnɔ butsì mɛ.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Bunyi sɛ aka nyia aka gɛ bamɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ atɛzã kɛlɛ abha pɛ aza bhɛtɛ̀ kibui kpa, anunɔ gɛ bamɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ yɛakɔ anɔ alɛ nɛidi azã piapii, kɛlɛ abosam atɛ balà kpɛ̀ kɛpɔ̃ nɛishu.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Bunyi sɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ bunu, kɛlɛ bunyi tsyɛ ɔsɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ tɛgbagbana kpasɛ abosam esi.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Bunyi tsyɛ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ aba kɛlɛ abakɔ bulũ kɛlɛ esi, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ butì anunɔ gɛ yɛaɖɔ kibui gbã. Kɛlɛ bɔkpasɛ agɛ yɛaɖɔ kibui gbã mɛ, gɛ yɛenu Yɛeyianyɛ Yesu Kristo. Yɛenu Owusoso Akaa kibui gbã nɛ̀ ɛkpã tihɔɔ elete.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nobu wɔnɔ ishu oyinɔ nɛ ibudì shù.

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Denɔ Esheshèɛ ɔkɔ, Ɔsɛsɛ apãlĩɛ gɛ bebu eluɔ nɛ̀ yɛeyi alɛ, gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ alɛ nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, gɛnɛ mɛ ete pɔ bagɛ balɛ enyi kibui gbã tsyɛ petee,

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: ɔmɔsɛ kibui gbã kpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ̀ kɛlɛ kɛkpasɛ ɔlɔ mɛ ɖaa.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: Tibhui bhuibu, ashagabui ɖiɖi nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ode Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Yesu Kristo gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa Yɛeyiɛ ɔkɔ, balɛ abazã aplɛnɔ ɔlɔ nɛ kibui gbã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ̀.

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Kɛkɔ mɛ same gbagbla sɛ ɛmɔ wɔnɔ eyi alɛ teli sɛ bagã nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ Akaa akpɛ ɔsha akɔ wɔnɔ ana.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ otsiɛ nɔ, apalĩɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, gɛnɛ ɔsha vɔvɔ mɛfɔnɔ pɔ ɔgɛ ɔlɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ odenɔ kesi ɔkpɛkɔ. Ibisi ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ agɔlɔ.

english_verse: Love means we do what God tells us. And from the beginning, he told you to love him.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔgã nɛ yɛɔsha nabha nɛ batɔ̃ lulũ mɛ. Asɛ gɛ nɔolũ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔ ana, yɛɔsha gɛ akpɛ ɔlɛ onù ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔgã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Asɛnɛ elete gelee, gɛ bagɛ mɔ̃ Yesu Kristo sɛ̀ aba nɛ ishudzya mɛ, betsoku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ. Anɔ alɛ nɛidì enu anɔ gɛ awɔɛ anɔ nɛ̀ asɛnɛ kristoelete.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Nɔoɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ̀ nɔgɛ yala kɛnanà gɛ nɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ, pɔ sɛ tɛ̀ babuia ɛlɛ shu kɛbhɛ akɔ wɔnɔ tɛ̀ kɛna.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ atɛ fala eputɔ pɛ agɛ akasɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ Kristo yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ nabhaa, Owusoso Akaa ama yɛmɛ, pɔ anunɔ gɛ etsiɖì ɛlɛ abha pɛ akasɛ Kristo ɔdɔ̃ɔ, yɛahɔɛ Akaa nɛ̀ Eyiɛ pete alɛ.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Onupɛ anɔ teli aba wɔnɔ ɔhha pɛ agɛ mana bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ, nɔtɛ̀ gbanà yɛ kpɛ wɔnɔ bɔpã mɛ alo tɛ̀ nɔyɛkɛ yɛ tsyɛ.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ anɔ alɛ ayɛkɛ yɛtakpumɛ zizĩ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa tsyɛ.

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: Ebui kpekpè alɛ mɛahɔɛ gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ ɔnɔ, pɔ ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ ɛwɔa keplukpa nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ uli shu axɔ̃ɛ. Pɔ ɛpɛ sɛ̀ tɛ̀ mɛba wɔnɔ ɔbha tɛ̀ ɛbaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ bamɛ nɛ̀ amɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔlɔ same mɔmɔ ana.

english_verse: Greetings from the children of your very special sister.
translation_verse: Wɔada nɔ gɛ bebu eluɔ, yɛeyi alɛ asɛnɛ ɔnɔ o.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Mɛ asɛ ɔhamɛ anɔ sheshè ana, Ɛsɛsɛ wɔ Gayo epluka alɛ, wɔ anɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ nɛ kibui gbã mɛ.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: Mɛɔbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, iikulu Owusoso Akaa kɔwɔ sɛ tɛ̀ ɔmɔ ishumɛ gagalĩ, sɛ tɛ kɛka nyia ka vɛ ɛlɛ abha piapii nɛ̀ wɔ, asɛ kana gɛ inyi ɔsɛ ɔgagalĩ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: It makes me very happy when the Lord's followers come by and speak openly of how you obey the truth.
translation_verse: Kiku mɛ samè ɔsɛ badzya teli aba aɖɔ nɛ kana gɛ ɔlɛ piapi nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ otsiɖì ɛlɛ abha ɔgã nɛ kɛlɛ shuɔ.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Same mɔmɔ hohoe nanà abhama mɛahɔɛ ɔdɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ilũ sɛ mɛeyi alɛ aagã nɛ kibui gbã mɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: Mɛɔbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, ɔbhɛtɛ kibuiɛ gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzakɔ nɛ kɛgɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ badzya shu, gɛ beefu pɔ benu akɔ wɔ flogo.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Baɖɔ wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ etseɖe ɔhaa. Ebedzi kibui piapi akɔwɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɔtɔɖɔ alɛ nɛ kidzoɔ gɛpɛ̃ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nabha.

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: Kinyeɛ shu sopɛ bavɛ ada ɔnyɔ̃ɔ, pɔ batɛ amɔ tɛpɛplɛnɔ odenɔ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋã ɔkɔ tsyɛ flogo.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bɔbhɛtɛ̀ ɛyamɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ banyɛ alɛ nɛidi sɛ tɛ̀ bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ kpɛitsù ɔkɔ kibui gbã.

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: Ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa kɔ ɔhaa, pɔ Ɖiotrefo, gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ eku anɔ awɔ̃ soɔ, atɛ eɖi ɔlɔ akpɛ kɛnanà mɛ.

english_verse: So if I come, I will remind him of how he has been attacking us with gossip. Not only has he been doing this, but he refuses to welcome any of the Lord's followers who come by. And when other church members want to welcome them, he puts them out of the church.
translation_verse: Kliso onupɛ ɛba, ɛbakɔ notì kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛ̀ɛ, agã olugbũ edzì alɔkɔ ezĩ bɔlɔ shu nɔ. Gɛ kɛlɛ gɛikpè ɔkɔɛ soɔ, agɛpɛ tsyɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ayɛkɛ baadzya. Etsodzì bagɛ apɛ asɛ ayɛkɛ alɛ tsyɛ, kɛlɛ ebu alɛ eyinɔ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, don't imitate the evil deeds of others, but follow the example of people who do kind deeds. They are God's children, but those who are always doing evil have never seen God.
translation_verse: Mɛɔbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, tiɖi kibui kpa tɛ̀ ɔbhɛtɛ̀ nɛ kɛlɛ ulũ, pɔ ɖi kɛgɛ pɛ̃ tɛ ɔbhɛtɛ̀ nɛ ɛlɛ shu. Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã, enu anɔ gɛ ede Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ ebui kpa etinyi Owusoso Akaa.

english_verse: Everyone speaks well of Demetrius, and so does the true message that he teaches. I also speak well of him, and you know what I say is true. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Anɔ ka nyia ka aɖɔ ebui gbangbã nɛ Demetrio shu, kibuiɛ tsyɛ ɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã nɛishu ana. Bɔlɔ tsyɛ ɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã nɛ yɛishu, kɛlɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ bɔlɔ kibuiɛ gɛ bɔɖɔ dalɛ yɛishuɔ nu kibui gbã.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink.
translation_verse: Ebui kpekpè alɛ mɛ ahɔɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ wɔ, pɔ ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ lɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ ishìi nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ bulĩ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɔ.

english_verse: I hope to see you soon, and then we can talk in person.
translation_verse: Iɖì kidzomɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛmɔ wɔ gulũi, kɛlɛ bɔbà ɖɔaɖɔ bamɛ nɛ̀ amɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will bless you with peace! Your friends send their greetings. Please give a personal greeting to each of our friends.
translation_verse: Ishuyɔyɔ kɔ wɔ. Badzya nɛ ɛkɛlɛ̀ asɛnɛ wɔ. Ɛsɛnɔ wɔnɔ ɛbhia alɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ piapi.

english_verse: From Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and the brother of James. To all who are chosen and loved by God the Father and are kept safe by Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Mɛ Yuda, Yesu Kristo yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ̀ Yakobo yɛadza ɔkɔ. Mɛfɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ ɛsɛsɛ bagɛ bekulu pɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɔ pɛ Yesu Kristo abalɛ alɛ elúɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God will greatly bless you with mercy, peace, and love! False Teachers
translation_verse: Ashagabui ɖiɖi, ishu yɔyɔ nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ lidzì wɔnɔ ɔyɛ nɛ tikpekpè mɛ. Ebui Kpa Nɛ̀ Butsiɛ Gɛbabà Bagɛetinyi Owusoso Akaa Nabha

english_verse: My dear friends, I really wanted to write you about God's saving power at work in our lives. But instead, I must write and ask you to defend the faith that God has once for all given to his people.
translation_verse: Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ kinù mɛ same ɔsɛ tɛ̀ mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ ɔnɔ nɛ tibubuɔ gɛ bɔmɔ̃ shu tsyɛɛ, ɛmɔsɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ wɔnɔ tɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ kpalà wɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ bayɛyɛkɛŋã ku balɛ awɔ̃.

english_verse: Some godless people have sneaked in among us and are saying, “God treats us much better than we deserve, and so it is all right to be immoral.” They even deny we must obey Jesus Christ as our only Master and Lord. But long ago the Scriptures warned that these godless people were doomed.
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ banɔ teli gɛ batɛ fɔnɔ balɛ ɛpɔ bubuɔ elù kibè tili gɛ bafalaa, banɔ alɛ abafala eku wɔnɔɛshi nɛ tikpukpũ mɛ. Benu banɔ gɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa, gɛ balɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ asɛ kidzo kɔkɔ anɔ ɔkɔ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã kɛlɛ bagɛ yɛkɛ Yesu Kristoɔ gɛenu bɔlɔ Apalete nɛ̀ Ekusi Gbagbla tenikpo nɔ.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to those people the Lord rescued from Egypt. Some of them did not have faith, and he later destroyed them.
translation_verse: Nɔonyi ebui alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ, pɔ ɛpɛ sɛ bakà wɔnɔ sɛ̀ Apaleteɛ ebu yɛanɔ nɔ̀ odenɔ Egipte, pɔ kidegbaa ebeyì bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋãa.

english_verse: You also know about the angels who didn't do their work and left their proper places. God chained them with everlasting chains and is now keeping them in dark pits until the great day of judgment.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ bagɛ wɔa balɛ axɔ̃ɛ nɛ ohumi nɔ gɛ bakɔ alɛ shu pɛ bashɛ nɛ balɛ ɛzãkɔ, balɛ yɛalɔkɔ akpɛ otumũɔ mɛ elu, pɛ banyã alɛ nɛ̀ ɛɖahuiɛ odiyinɔ Kebhu kukulu Kiwui nabha.

english_verse: We should also be warned by what happened to the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah and the nearby towns. Their people became immoral and committed all sorts of sexual sins. Then God made an example of them and punished them with eternal fire.
translation_verse: Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, Sodom nɛ̀ Gomora nɛ̀ ɛma nɛ ɛma ɛlɛ mɛ alɔkɔ balɛishu akpɛ agɔlɔ ŋaŋã nɛ̀ tɛwɔwɔsɔ̃ nɛ bagɔlɔ mɛ. Banɔ alɛ edzì kibui mɔmɔlu ɔkɔ bagɛ bamɔ bɔtɔ nɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ ɔkɔ kifúɔ gɛtã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: The people I am talking about are behaving just like those dreamers who destroyed their own bodies. They reject all authority and insult angels.
translation_verse: Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abha, banɔ alɛ gɛ baza bɔlala akpɛ balɛ̀ishu dzya nɔtsɔ̃, batɛ abhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ ɔsha abha, kɛlɛ baɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛ kititì banɔ nɔ shu.

english_verse: Even Michael, the chief angel, didn't dare to insult the devil, when the two of them were arguing about the body of Moses. All Michael said was, “The Lord will punish you!”
translation_verse: Pɔ otugbà axɔ̃ɛdɛ Mixael, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ aza wlɔãkɛ kibui nɛ̀ abosam nɛ Mose ishudzya shu tsyɛ, agɛ kpɛité aɖɔaɖɔ kpa alɔɛtití nɛ yɛishu, pɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Apaleteɛ etseɖenɔ nɛ̀ wɔ!”

english_verse: But these people insult powers they don't know anything about. They are like senseless animals that end up getting destroyed, because they live only by their feelings.
translation_verse: Pɔ banɔ alɛ xɔnɔ baɖɔ akwalatu ebui alɔɛtití nɛ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ begilũ kɛlɛ esiɛ shu. Asɛ efutumɛ agã gɛ batɛ abhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ, ebui nɛ alɛ gɛezĩ alɛ.

english_verse: Now they are in for real trouble. They have followed Cain's example and have made the same mistake that Balaam did by caring only for money. They have also rebelled against God, just as Korah did. Because of all this, they will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Aba gagalĩ akɔ alɛ! Balɔkɔ Kain idzoɔ, bebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ avɛ̀ tɛ badɛ mɔ ɛdɔ̃ gɛmɔ tɔɖɔ odenɔ Baalam kesi tata mɛ, beyì alɛ nɛ Korax kititì lɔlɔ mɛ.

english_verse: These people are filthy minded, and by their shameful and selfish actions they spoil the meals you eat together. They are like clouds blown along by the wind, but never bringing any rain. They are like leafless trees, uprooted and dead, and unable to produce fruit.
translation_verse: Banɔ alɛ enu kihututũ nɛ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔdɔ̃ ɔŋãkɔ, gɛ baŋã ɔdɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ gɛ kɛtɛ wɔa axɔ̃ɛ bhlui nɛ balɛishu mɛ tsyɛ, ibhoshi agbagbana elete gɛ beeɖì balɛ ete ishu abha. Bedzi asɛ ɔmɔlɔ̃ gɛ subhà ma ɔlɛ mɛ, gɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ nɔ fù ɔlɛ ɔshɛnɔ, ekpemɛ beesìɛ gɛ etieyù eyuyù nanà pɛ bakpà ebho pɛ betsí pete nɔ.

english_verse: Their shameful deeds show up like foam on wild ocean waves. They are like wandering stars forever doomed to the darkest pits of hell.
translation_verse: Benu aƒuɔ gɛetsu guɖaguɖà, gɛebu balɛ awũi ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ̀ akasɛ, awɔ̃ɛ gɛ anyɔ̃ akanà, banɔ gɛ babalɛ otumũ tutũ gɛɔdɛ elu akɔ tihɔɔ.

english_verse: Enoch was the seventh person after Adam, and he was talking about these people when he said: Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of holy angels
translation_verse: Henox, anɔ gegenemiɛ odenɔ Adamu mɛ̀, aɖɔ ebui elú nɛ banɔ alɛ nɛidì shu asɛ̀, “Nɔoɖi mɔ, Apaleteɛ aba nɛ̀ yɛanɔ dadalɛ nɛ ihotu, ihotu mɛ

english_verse: to judge everyone. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners for every evil thing they have ever said about him.
translation_verse: tɛ̀ ebekulu kebhu nɛ̀ aka nyia aka, tɛ̀ bebù bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa petee ɛpɔ nɛ̀ ubui kpa petee gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ gɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa so, nɛ̀ kaɖɔ kpa gɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ̀ elete gɛ beti esì Owusoso Akaa ifùɔ aɖɔ nɛ yɛishuɔ.”

english_verse: These people grumble and complain and live by their own selfish desires. They brag about themselves and flatter others to get what they want. More Warnings
translation_verse: Banɔ alɛ enù banɔ gɛ̀ bakpɛmɛ ishu pɛ bapɛ̀ kizizĩ nɛ anɔ shu, batɔnɔ balɛ ahɔɛ ebui kpa tɛpɛpɛɛ ede, beetũ ahɔɛ etelũ ɔkɔ balɛishu pɛ beedzyinì banɔ akpɛ̀ akɔ balɛishu tɛpɛpɛ so. Tikukulu Ɔkɔ Kemì kpɛkpɛ

english_verse: My dear friends, remember the warning you were given by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Pɔ mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔ bakà ebuiɛ gɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ aɖɔ akpɛ otugbàa.

english_verse: They told you that near the end of time, selfish and godless people would start making fun of God.
translation_verse: Betseɖe wɔnɔ asɛ, “Nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛɛ, bagɛ amɔ̃ɛ anɔ ababa, banɔ gɛ abazã alɛ mayɛkɛ mayɛkɛŋã edzoɔ niede.”

english_verse: And now these people are already making you turn against each other. They think only about this life, and they don't have God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Banɔ alɛ balɛ ebù wɔnɔ ɔtɔ, banɔ gɛ batɔnɔ ishupi mɛ ebui ede pɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ma balɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, keep building on the foundation of your most holy faith, as the Holy Spirit helps you to pray.
translation_verse: Pɔ mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ xɔnɔ, nɔbhɔ wɔnɔ shu owunɔ kabha nɛ wɔnɔ ishu dadalɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ̀, tɛ̀ nokulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã mɛ̀.

english_verse: And keep in step with God's love, as you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to show how kind he is by giving you eternal life.
translation_verse: Nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu ɔzã Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ̀ kibeɛ gɛ nopo Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛashagabui ɖiɖiɛ, tɛ̀ amanà wɔnɔ nɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Be helpful to all who may have doubts.
translation_verse: Nɔobì bagɛ batɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã ashagabui,

english_verse: Rescue any who need to be saved, as you would rescue someone from a fire. Then with fear in your own hearts, have mercy on everyone who needs it. But hate even the clothes of those who have been made dirty by their filthy deeds. Final Prayer
translation_verse: nɔbhɛ̃ bagɔgɔɛ odenɔ kifúɔ gɛta mɛ tɛ̀ nɔyɛkɛ ɔkɔ alɛ. Banɔ gɔgɔɛ nɔ nɔobì alɛ ashagabui nɛ kifu sisi mɛ̀, kɛlɛ nɔtɛ dɛmɛnɔ nɛ̀ balɛ akpɛkpɛ gɛ etuturu edenɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ tsyɛ. Tikukulu Ɔkɔ Kinyè Kpɛkpɛ Nɛitití

english_verse: Offer praise to God our Savior because of our Lord Jesus Christ! Only God can keep you from falling and make you pure and joyful in his glorious presence. Before time began and now and forever, God is worthy of glory, honor, power, and authority. Amen.
translation_verse: ishu dadalɛ, bukusi ŋaŋã, ohumi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ete gɛenu anɔ gɛ ebu ulɔ, ɔgana Apalete Yesu Kristo abha, nɛ agɔ gɛ latɛ bafala petee mɛ, odenɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ mɛ! Amen.

english_verse: This is what God showed to Jesus Christ, so that he could tell his servants what must happen soon. Christ then sent his angel with the message to his servant John.
translation_verse: Ebui bubu kasɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ Yesu Kristo asɛ tɛ ebu akasɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ etibedze pɛ labàbaa alɛ mɛɛ shu. Akɔ tititì ɛlɛ ɔgana yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ akpɛ asɛsɛ Yohanɛs ɔkɔɔ.

english_verse: And John told everything he had seen about God's message and about what Jesus Christ had said and done.
translation_verse: Yohanes adalɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ gɛ amɔɔ, gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ nɛ̀ Yesu Kristo yɛishu dadalɛ shu.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who reads this prophecy to others, and he will bless everyone who hears and obeys it. The time is almost here.
translation_verse: Tiyuyula ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ aakalà ebuiɖɔluanɔ ebui alɛ, kɛlɛ tiyuyula ɔkɔ banunɔ gɛ belũ alɛ pɛ bayɛkɛ kɛgɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ akpɛ itúɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ tsu ba. Tɛsɛsɛnɔ Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Nɛinye Kpɛkpɛ Nɛitití

english_verse: From John to the seven churches in Asia. I pray that you will be blessed with kindness and peace from God, who is and was and is coming. May you receive kindness and peace from the seven spirits before the throne of God.
translation_verse: Mɛ Yohanes, Mɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ sɛsɛ baha tegegeneɛ galɛ Asia ɔdɔ̃ mɛ ɔsɛ, Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ odenɔ anunɔ gɛ alɛ pɛ atɛzã eɖi, pɛ azabàbaa, nɛ̀ odenɔ ɛfɔfuĩa tigegeneɛ nɛ yɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà,

english_verse: May kindness and peace be yours from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness. Jesus was the first to conquer death, and he is the ruler of all earthly kings. Christ loves us, and by his blood he set us free from our sins.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ odenɔ Yesu Kristo gɛenu anunɔ gɛ adalɛ ebuiɛ alɛ nɛ àlɛ ɔzãkɔ shu, pɛ enu eyi gɛ eputɔ ede bekpuɔ mɛ, pɛ aŋã ukusi nɛ kesiakpa abha ekusi nabha. Yɛenu anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɛ ɔlɔ pɛ ebu ɔlɔ edenɔ ebui kpa mɛ nɛ̀ yɛdzyosu nɔ,

english_verse: He lets us rule as kings and serve God his Father as priests. To him be glory and power forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: edzu ukusi aŋãsi akɔ ɔlɔ pɛ abhɛtɛ ɔlɔ bunu banɔlũazazã sɛ tɛ bɔdɛ axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ yɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Yɛakaa, yɛyɛ́ kɛlɛinu ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ohumi odenɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔ tihɔ! Amen.

english_verse: Look! He is coming with the clouds. Everyone will see him, even the ones who stuck a sword through him. All people on earth will weep because of him. Yes, it will happen! Amen.
translation_verse: Noɖio abà nɛ̀ ɔmɔlɔ̃, kɛlɛ kiwuhũ ka nyia ka bamɔɛ, bagɛ bashɔɛ nɛ̀ bɔɖadɔ̃ tsyɛ abamɔɛ, yɛ soɔ, kanɔmanɛ pete abamɔ̃ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ. Kana kɛbàba ɛlɛ mɛ! Amen.

english_verse: The Lord God says, “I am Alpha and Omega, the one who is and was and is coming. I am God All-Powerful!” A Vision of the Risen Lord
translation_verse: Apalete Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ asɛ, “Mɛinu agɛ Eputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ tsyɛ, gɛ ɛlɛ otsiɛ, pɛ ɛtɛzã ɖi, pɛ ɛzɛbàbaa, mɛinu Ohumieleteɛ.” Yesu Tibubu Kasɛ

english_verse: I am John, a follower together with all of you. We suffer because Jesus is our king, but he gives us the strength to endure. I was sent to Patmos Island, because I had preached God's message and had told about Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɛ, wɔnɔ adzya Yohanɛs, gɛ bɔzã itsu nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ pɛ bɔkpɛ emi, dɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔkɔ bukusiɛ gɛinu ɔlɔ ɔyɛ ɔgana Yesu mɛ, ɛzã Patmo bulĩetukpɔ nabha, nɛ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔ dalɛ Yesu shu so.

english_verse: On the Lord's day the Spirit took control of me, and behind me I heard a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
translation_verse: Nɛ Apalete Nɛiwui nabhaa, Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ oku mɛ mɛ̀ kɛlɛ izilũ ozĩ toli gagalĩ asɛ kexoele babɔ nɛ mɛedeɛ,

english_verse: The voice said, “Write in a book what you see. Then send it to the seven churches in Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.”
translation_verse: kaɖɔ asɛ, “Fɔnɔ kɛgɛ ɔmɔ ɔtɔɖɔ eplukpa abha ɔsɛsɛ baha tegegeneɛ gɛ alɛ Efeso, Smina, Pergamo, Tiatira, Sardis, Filadelfia nɛ̀ Ladokia.”

english_verse: When I turned to see who was speaking to me, I saw seven gold lampstands.
translation_verse: Itsyina sɛ tɛ mɛiɖi anunɔ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ akɔ mɛ. Gɛ itsyinaa, ɛmɔ sikãefu isí tigegene,

english_verse: There with the lampstands was someone who seemed to be the Son of Man. He was wearing a robe that reached down to his feet, and a gold cloth was wrapped around his chest.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ nɛ kifu isí nɛishiɛ, ɛmɔ anɔ teli “gɛ azã asɛ anɔdzyrame yɛeyianyɛ ana,” gɛ azã akpɛkpɛ dzlolo gɛ ezhi aba yɛtɛtsɛɖɛ pɛ atsa sikã atsatsatɔɖɔ nɛ yɛitéɛ mɛ.

english_verse: His head and his hair were white as wool or snow, and his eyes looked like flames of fire.
translation_verse: Yɛtakpuɔ nɛ̀ tɛkã fuli asɛ obhoshi tɛkã, alo asɛ kɛmɔɛklagbu, kɛlɛ yɛawuhũɔ azã asɛ kifu gɛ kɛtã hanyã ana.

english_verse: His feet were glowing like bronze being heated in a furnace, and his voice sounded like the roar of a waterfall.
translation_verse: Yɛtɛtsɛɖɛ dzã hanyã asɛ ɔɖa dzadzã nɛ kifu gɛtã mɛ, kɛlɛ yɛozĩ ozoyi ɔmɔ asɛ kelĩkekpu gɛ akpɛ hɔa nɔ ana.

english_verse: He held seven stars in his right hand, and a sharp double-edged sword was coming from his mouth. His face was shining as bright as the sun at noon.
translation_verse: Awɔ̃ɛ tegegene azã kɛŋã ɔhɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɛtɛ̀, ilugbũ tɛbha ŋaŋã teli ikoeyì odenɔ yɛolugbũɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ yɛamɛ ezetse ɔmɔ asɛ kiwi gɛinye nɛ ɛlɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ ana.

english_verse: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead person. But he put his right hand on me and said: Don't be afraid! I am the first, the last,
translation_verse: Gɛ ɛmɔ yɛ, izhi kumu nɛ yɛotugbà ɔmɔ asɛ anɔtsitsí ana. Pɔ alɔkɔ yɛŋã ahɔɛ atɔɖɔ mɛabha pɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tɛ osí ifu. Mɛinu agɛ Eputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ.

english_verse: and the living one. I died, but now I am alive forever, and I have the keys to death and the world of the dead.
translation_verse: Mɛinu Enunuɔ, ititsí bafalanɔ, pɔ otsi alɛ ɛlɛ nɛ ɛkpã tihɔ, tihɔ! Kɛlɛ butsí nɛ̀ bekpu ipupukɔɔ lɛ mɛahɔɛ.

english_verse: Write what you have seen and what is and what will happen after these things.
translation_verse: Kliso, fɔnɔ agɛ ɔmɔ̃ɔ. Agɛ alɛ otsiɛ nɔ nɛ̀ agɛ abàba nɛ idegba olu.

english_verse: I will explain the mystery of the seven stars you saw at my right side and the seven gold lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the lampstands are the seven churches.
translation_verse: Kibui kpukpũɔ gɛlɛ awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ gɛ ɔmɔ̃ nɛ mɛŋã ɔhɔɛ mɛ nɛ̀ sikãefu isí tigegeneɛ nu ɛlɛ. Awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ enu baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegeneɛ ɔkɔ baha tegegene, kɛlɛ ifu isí tegegeneɛ nu bahá tegegeneɛ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Ephesus: I am the one who holds the seven stars in my right hand, and I walk among the seven gold lampstands. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Efeso ɔha mɛ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ anyana awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ evunɔ nɛ kɛŋã ahɔɛ mɛ, pɛ agãfala nɛ sikã efu isí tigegene nɛishiɛ, yɛebui nu alɛ.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, including your hard work and how you have endured. I know you won't put up with anyone who is evil. When some people pretended to be apostles, you tested them and found out they were liars.
translation_verse: Inyi ebuiɛ gɛ ɔbhɛtɛɛ, wɔaxɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ wɔawɔa nɛ̀ emi kpɛkpɛ. Inyi sɛ ɔtɛ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩelete ibui, kɛlɛ nolu awɔ̃ oɖi agɛ beekulu alɛishu asɛ anɔ kpɛkpɛ benu, pɔ anɛ ana flogo nɔ, pɛ nɔmɔ alɛ ɔsɛ asɛnɛ elete benu.

english_verse: You have endured and gone through hard times because of me, yet you have not given up.
translation_verse: Inyi ikpɛ gɛ ɔkpɛ emi nɛ̀ ilu gɛ olu itú esi nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ gɛ ɔgã nɛ mɛtakpu, pɔ ɔgɛkɔ ɛtakpu.

english_verse: But I do have something against you! And it is this: You don't have as much love as you used to.
translation_verse: Pɔ kɛgɛ mɛmɔ nɛ wɔshuɔ nu ɔsɛ, ɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛiputɔ shu olu.

english_verse: Think about where you have fallen from, and then turn back and do as you did at first. If you don't turn back, I will come and take away your lampstand.
translation_verse: Baka ɔɖaɖama ɔkɔ gɛ ɔwɔlɛ odeɛ. Tsyina itú mɛ tɛ owlui ɔbhɛtɛ ebui asɛ kuku ibeɛ. Onupɛ ogitsyina wɔɛtúɔ mɛɛ, ɛbàba wɔkɔ bàbu wɔɛfu osíɛ nɛ ɔlɛ ɔzãkɔ.

english_verse: But there is one thing you are doing right. You hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, and so do I.
translation_verse: Pɔ kɛgiku mɛawɔ̃ nɛ wɔshuɔ nu ɔsɛ, ɔgɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ Nikolainɛ ede azazã ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ asɛ kɛdɛmɛ gɛ mɛtsyɛ gɛ dɛmɛ balɛ ibui ana.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. I will let everyone who wins the victory eat from the life-giving tree in God's wonderful garden. The Letter to Smyrna
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛ, tɛ elũ ibuiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe baháa. Kɛlɛ anɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔ yɛidzo yɛaŋã busiɛ gɛ ɛkɔ ɛkpã, pɛ lɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa Bɔkã mɛɛ. Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ɔha Nɛ Smirna

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Smyrna: I am the first and the last. I died, but now I am alive! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Smirna ɔha mɛ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛenu anɔ gɛ Eputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ, gɛ etsí pɛ azamɔ ɛkpãa, nɛibui nɛlɛ.

english_verse: I know how much you suffer and how poor you are, but you are rich. I also know the cruel things being said about you by people who claim to be God's people. But they are not really God's people. They are a group that belongs to Satan.
translation_verse: Inyi ampɔɛ ebuiɛ gɛ ɔmɔ nɛ̀ wɔɛtsyui dɔdɔɔ, pɔ ehoeyielete wonu nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ flogo! Inyi ishu zizĩ ebuiɛ gɛ bagɛ basɛ Yudanɛ benu, pɔ anɛ alɛ benu flogo nɔ, pɛ benu Satana ɔtsyɔakɔ azazã.

english_verse: Don't worry about what you will suffer. The devil will throw some of you into jail, and you will be tested and made to suffer for ten days. But if you are faithful until you die, I will reward you with a glorious life.
translation_verse: Tɛ osí ifu nɛ bɔtɔ gɛ bàba wɔabha shu. Itseɖe wɔ ɔsɛ, Abosam abakpɛ ɔnɔ eteli nɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ, sɛ tɛ efeke ɔnɔ eɖi, kɛlɛ nɔbɔmɔ ede tɔtɔnɔ nɛ ewui gulũi mɛ. Onupɛ butsí ibui tsyɛ elo, nɔzã kɛgɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã niede, kɛlɛ ɛbakɔ ɔnɔ ɛkpã ekusikutu.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. Whoever wins the victory will not be hurt by the second death. The Letter to Pergamum
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛ, tɛ elũ ibuiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe baháa. Kɛlɛ anɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, butsí bhalà tɛbabhɛtɛ ibui nanà nii. Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ɔha Nɛ Pergamo

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Pergamum: I am the one who has the sharp double-edged sword! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Pergamo ɔha mɛ, Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ bɛtɛ̀ ilugbũ tɛbha ŋaŋã lɛ yɛahɔɛɛ, yɛebui nu alɛ.

english_verse: I know you live where Satan has his throne. But you have kept true to my name. Right there where Satan lives, my faithful witness Antipas was taken from you and put to death. Even then you did not give up your faith in me.
translation_verse: Inyi wɔzãkɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Satana yɛekusiegbuɔ alɛ, pɔ ogitso dzi nɛ miede. Ɔgɛɖɔ ɔsɛ ɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu olu. Nɛibeɛ gɛ Antipa azaɖɔ mɛibuiɛ nɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ pɛ beyí nɛ wɔnɔ ɔma hohoe mɛ tsyɛ elo, owlui ɔzã miede kokoko nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Satana alɛɛ.

english_verse: I do have a few things against you. Some of you are following the teaching of Balaam. Long ago he told Balak to teach the people of Israel to eat food that had been offered to idols and to be immoral.
translation_verse: Pɔɔ, ebui teli xɔnɔ alɛ mɛahɔɛ nɛ wɔshu. Banɔ teli alɛ wɔahɔɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ banyana Bileam yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛ evunɔ. Yɛ gɛ akɔ asɛ tɛ Balak awɔɛ Israelanɛ akpɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ɔgana bɔdɔ̃ tɔtɔ ɔkɔ ibudi tɛŋaŋã, nɛ̀ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Now some of you are following the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
translation_verse: Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha wɔnɔ mɛ beteli tsyɛ anyana Nikolaianɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛ evunɔ.

english_verse: Turn back! If you don't, I will come quickly and fight against these people. And my words will cut like a sword.
translation_verse: Kliso notsyina etúɔ mɛ! Onu gɛ nanàa, kɛtɛ badzè, ɛbàba wɔnɔkɔ, kɛlɛ ɛbaté banɔ alɛ nɛ̀ bɛtɛ̀ gɛ ede mɛolugbũɔ mɛ nɔ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. To everyone who wins the victory, I will give some of the hidden food. I will also give each one a white stone with a new name written on it. No one will know that name except the one who is given the stone. The Letter to Thyatira
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛ tɛ elũ ibuiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe bahá. Kɛlɛ anɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔɛ manà kpukpũɔ teli. Ɛbakɔɛ kɛklagbu fufuɔ tsyɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ kinye vɔvɔ atɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha ɔplɛnɔ, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ kɛklagbuɔ ete yɛebeti kinyeɛ. Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ɔha Nɛ Tiatira

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Thyatira: I am the Son of God! My eyes are like flames of fire, and my feet are like bronze. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Fɔnɔ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Tiatira. Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ gɛ yɛawuhũɔ edzi ɔmɔ asɛ kifu ɔɖɛklɛmɛ, pɛ yɛtsɛɖɛ dzi asɛ ɔɖa dzadzã gɛ bewoese ɔlɛishu piapii ana.

english_verse: I know everything about you, including your love, your faith, your service, and how you have endured. I know you are doing more now than you have ever done before.
translation_verse: Inyi ebuiɛ gɛ ɔbhɛtɛ, wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, wɔaxɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ nɛ̀ wɔemi kpɛkpɛ, kɛlɛ ɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ otsiɛ, ɔdɛ kuku ibeɛ.

english_verse: But I still have something against you because of that woman Jezebel. She calls herself a prophet, and you let her teach and mislead my servants to do immoral things and to eat food offered to idols.
translation_verse: Pɔ kibui tili lɛ mɛahɔɛ nɛ wɔshu ɔsɛ, ɔdɛmɛ obuidzo ɔkɔ adzɛ alɛ gɛ enu Izebel, gɛ ekulu yɛishu asɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ yɛenuɔ. Kɛlɛ gana yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛɛ, awɔɛ mɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ asɛ tɛ bedzi ɔmamɛ dɛdɛeleteɛ, tɛ bazaŋã ɔdɔ̃ gɛ batɔ akɔ ibudiɛ.

english_verse: I gave her a chance to turn from her sins, but she did not want to stop doing these immoral things.
translation_verse: Ɛkɔ yɛibe sɛ tɛ etsyina itúɔ mɛ, nɛ yɛɔmamɛ dɛdɛ ebui kpaa shu, pɔ atɛ adɛmɛ.

english_verse: I am going to strike down Jezebel. Everyone who does these immoral things with her will also be punished, if they don't stop.
translation_verse: Ɛbakɔ yɛadɔ ɔnyã, atɔ nɛ oputso abha, kɛlɛ ɛbakɔ bagɛ awɔ̃sɔ niyɛ amɔ ɔtɔ nyagãa, onupɛ begitsyina nɛ yɛebui kpa niedeɛ.

english_verse: I will even kill her followers. Then all the churches will see that I know everyone's thoughts and feelings. I will treat each of you as you deserve.
translation_verse: Ɛbahu yɛeyi alɛ bho bebètsí. Kɛlɛ baha nyɔ̃ɔ bebèti asɛ mɛinu anunɔ gɛ ɛmɔ banɔ etúɔ nɛ̀ alɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ. Kɛlɛ ɛbabuia ɛbhɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ mɛ anɔ nyia anɔ nɛ wɔ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ ulũ.

english_verse: Some of you in Thyatira don't follow Jezebel's teaching. You don't know anything about what her followers call the “deep secrets of Satan.” So I won't burden you down with any other commands.
translation_verse: Wɔnɔ Tiatiranɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ gɛ nɔgɛ nyana yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ovunɔ, pɛ nɔgɛ kpasɛ Satana yɛotumũ mɛedzoɔ

english_verse: But until I come, you must hold firmly to the teaching you have.
translation_verse: Nɔnyana kɛgɛ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ ovunɔ piapii, ɔvɛnɔ mɛ babeɛ.

english_verse: I will give power over the nations to everyone who wins the victory and keeps on obeying me until the end.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ akpɛ emi, pɛ abhɛtɛ nɛ mɛ tɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔ nabha ɔvɛnɔ kibe gɔgɔɛ nɔɔ, ɛbakɔɛ ohumi nɛ ɛmadiɛ nabha.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ etseɖe baháa.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Sardis: I have the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. Listen to what I say. I know what you are doing. Everyone may think you are alive, but you are dead.
translation_verse: “Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Sardis ɔha mɛ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛanyana Owusoso Akaa Ɛfɔfuĩa tigegene nɛ̀ awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ evunɔɔ, yɛebuiɛ nɛ alɛ. Inyi wɔebui bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔsɛ, ɔyɛkɛ kinye ɔsɛ, ɔlɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã, pɔ anɔ tsitsí wonu.

english_verse: Wake up! You have only a little strength left, and it is almost gone. So try to become stronger. I have found that you are not completely obeying God.
translation_verse: Nyɛmɛ! Nyana kɛgɛ gɔ̃ nɛ wɔahɔɛ pɛ kɛɛvɛ otsikɔ mɛ ovunɔ gagalĩi, ɔmɔsɛ wɔaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa akaná ebeke nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ.

english_verse: Remember the teaching you were given and heard. Hold firmly to it and turn from your sins. If you don't wake up, I will come when you least expect it, just as a thief does.
translation_verse: Kliso bakà kɛgɛ olũ pɛ ɔyɛkɛɛ, lũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɛlɛ tɛ otsyina itú mɛ. Pɔ ɔgɛ nyɛmɛɛ, ɛbàba asɛ ezĩ ana, kɛlɛ oti botì kibeɛ gɛ ɛbaba yi nɛ̀ wɔɔ.

english_verse: A few of you in Sardis have not dirtied your clothes with sin. You will walk with me in white clothes, because you are worthy.
translation_verse: Pɔ banɔ asasà teli alɛ Sardis, gɛ alɛ xɔ̃nɔ egi tuturu alɛ akpɛkpɛɛ. Babàzã alɛ akpɛkpɛ frɛrɛ mɛ pɛ babàgã nɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ balɛ tɛzazã mɛ ku awɔ̃.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will wear white clothes. Their names will not be erased from the book of life, and I will tell my Father and his angels that they are my followers.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, yɛtsyɛ abazã bakpɛkpɛ frɛrɛ mɛ asɛ balɛ ana. Ɛtɛba xoele yɛinye nɛ ɛkpã eplukpa mɛ ɖi ɖa, pɔ ɛbabui kasɛ nɛ Mɛakaa nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ namɛ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Philadelphia
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ etseɖe bahá. Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Filadelfia Ɔha

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: I am the one who is holy and true, and I have the keys that belonged to David. When I open a door, no one can close it. And when I close a door, no one can open it. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Filadelfia ɔha mɛ. Ebui alɛ enu anunɔ gɛ yɛenu anɔ dadalɛ, pɛ aɖɔ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ, pɛ yɛevunɔ David ukusiupã opupuiakɔɔ. Kɛgɛ adalɛɛ, anɔ nanà atɛ kalà ɛlɛ adã, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ adãa anɔ nanà atɛ kalà adalɛ ɛlɛ.

english_verse: I know everything you have done. And I have placed before you an open door no one can close. You were not very strong, but you obeyed my message and did not deny you are my followers.
translation_verse: Inyi wɔaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. Ɖio, ɛlɔkɔ opupuɔ gɛ ɔdalɛ odziɛ ilu wotugbàa, gɛ anɔ nanà atɛ balà ɔlɛ adã. Gɛ inyi sɛ ohumi bhlui toli ko ɔlɛ lɛ wɔahɔɛ pɔ tsyɛ elo, ɔnyana mɛibuiɛ mɛ ovunɔ kɛlɛ ogitso dzi nɛ miede.

english_verse: Now you will see what I will do with those people who belong to Satan's group. They claim to be God's people, but they are liars. I will make them come and kneel down at your feet. Then they will know that I love you.
translation_verse: Bagɛ benu Satana yɛɔtsyɔakɔanɔ pɛ balɔkɔ ishu asɛ Yudanɛ benu, pɔ anɛ balɛ benu, pɔ asɛnɛ elete benuɔ-ɛbakɔ ɔsɛ bebèdzu ekluisi esi nɛ wòtugba tɛ bamɔ asɛ, ɛdɛmɛ nɛ wɔ.

english_verse: You obeyed my message and endured. So I will protect you from the time of testing everyone in all the world must go through.
translation_verse: Gɛ ɔkpɛ emi olu itú esi pɛ ɔbhɛtɛ mɛɔsha nabha soɔ, mɛ tsyɛ ɛbabu wɔ odenɔ tifefekeɖi ibe gagalĩɛ gɛbàba kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ pete abhaa mɛ, sɛ tɛ befeke bagɛ alɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ eɖiɛ.

english_verse: I am coming soon. So hold firmly to what you have, and no one will take away the crown you will be given as your reward.
translation_verse: Ɛbàba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ. Nyana kɛgɛ lɛ wɔahɔɛ mɛ ovunɔ, sɛ tɛ anɔ nanà atɛ yɛkɛ wɔekusikutuɔ nɛ wɔahɔɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will be made into a pillar in the temple of my God, and they will stay there forever. I will write on each of them the name of my God and the name of his city. It is the new Jerusalem my God will send down from heaven. I will also write on them my own new name.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔ yɛedzi bubhiashaka nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ mɛ. Ezekoeyì nɛ ɛkɛlɛ eɖi ɖa. Ɛbafɔnɔ mɛ Owusoso Akaa inyeɛ, nɛ̀ yɛɔma gbagbla gɛonu Yerusalem vɔvɔ, gɛ ezhi ede itití odenɔ mɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔɔ, ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔɔ, ɛbafɔnɔ mɛinye vɔvɔ tsyɛ nɛishu.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Laodicea
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ etseɖe aháa. Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ladokia Ɔhaa

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Laodicea: I am the one called Amen! I am the faithful and true witness and the source of God's creation. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Ladokia ɔhaa mɛ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛakɔ ebuiɛ aba ɛlɛ mɛ, gɛenu agɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã, nɛ̀ kibui mɛ adadalɛelete, pɛ yɛaŋã ukusi nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ nulũɔ, yɛebui nɛ ɛlɛ.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, and you are not cold or hot. I wish you were either one or the other.
translation_verse: Inyi wɔaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. Ɔgɛyɔ loo ovuifu. Mɛ tɛpɛpɛ tadzi ɔsɛ tɛ odzi anɔ yɔyɔ loo anɔ gɛ evũifu!

english_verse: But since you are lukewarm and neither cold nor hot, I will spit you out of my mouth.
translation_verse: Kliso, gɛ ɔlɛ ete pɛ ɔgɛyɔ loo ovuifu soɔ, ɛbàpí wɔ tɛ bu nɛ mɛolugbũ mɛ.

english_verse: You claim to be rich and successful and to have everything you need. But you don't know how bad off you really are. You are pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.
translation_verse: Ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, ‘Inu ehoeyielete, gɛ ɛmɔ ehoeyiudɔ̃ gɛ ɛtɛpɛ ɛdɔ̃ nanà.’ Pɔ ɔgɛmɔ wɔshu ɔsɛ onu ahɔɛ kpaelete, ashagabuielete, etsyuitsyui, awuhũpu nɛ̀ ɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ nɛishu anɔ.

english_verse: Buy your gold from me. It has been refined in a fire, and it will make you rich. Buy white clothes from me. Wear them and you can cover up your shameful nakedness. Buy medicine for your eyes, so you will be able to see.
translation_verse: Ihu uluhũ kɔ wɔ ɔsɛ tɛ odzi sikã gɛ bewoese nɛ ifu mɛɛ, sɛ tɛ ɔlà otsyina odzi ehoeyielete. Dzi apɔtɛ fufu tɛ ɔdã, tɛ ɔlɔkɔ obu wɔ ɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ iwuĩ nɔ nɛishu, nɛ̀ awuhũ bɔwa tɛ ɔkpɛ nɛ awuhũɔ mɛ tɛ ɔzɔmɔ piapii.

english_verse: I correct and punish everyone I love. So make up your minds to turn away from your sins.
translation_verse: Bagɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ, balɛ mɛitseɖe nɔ pɛ ɛpɔ̃ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ. Kliso nɔkpɛ emi tɛ notsyina etú mɛ.

english_verse: Listen! I am standing and knocking at your door. If you hear my voice and open the door, I will come in and we will eat together.
translation_verse: Mɛ nɛ alɛ! Ili itití nɛ edulũɔ pɛ ibho opupuɔ. Onupɛ anɔ teli elũ mɛɔdɔ̃ pɛ adalɛ opupuɔ, ɛbatsoku buvũɔ mɛ kɛlɛ ɛbaŋã ɔdɔ̃ nii, kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ abaŋã nɛ̀ mɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will sit with me on my throne, just as I won the victory and sat with my Father on his throne.
translation_verse: Anunɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔ yɛidzo yɛazã aplɛnɔ mɛ nɛ mɛekusiegbu nabha, ɔmɔ asɛ kɛŋã gɛ ɛŋã abha, pɛ izhidzi plɛnɔ Mɛakaa, nɛ yɛekusiegbu nabha.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Anɔ gɛ atɔ̃ alɛ yɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe baháa.

english_verse: After this, I looked and saw a door that opened into heaven. Then the voice that had spoken to me at first and that sounded like a trumpet said, “Come up here! I will show you what must happen next.”
translation_verse: Kidegbaa, ilu awɔ̃ ɖi kɛlɛ ɛmɔ opupu toli gɛ ɔdalɛ ɔzã nɛ kititíɛ. Kɛlɛ kaɖɔ gɛ itilũ putɔ ɔmɔ asɛ exoele olimɛ ana, lɔzɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Wù ɔba ɛkɛlɛ tɛ mɛibu kɛgɛ bàba ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ ɛlɛ̀ niedeɛ kasɛ wɔ.”

english_verse: Right then the Spirit took control of me, and there in heaven I saw a throne and someone sitting on it.
translation_verse: Tsĩɔ ɔlɛ koɔ, Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ otsoku mɛ mɛ̀ kɛlɛ mɛmɔ ekusiegbu tieli nɛititíɛ gɛ anɔ teli azã kalɛ abha.

english_verse: The one who was sitting there sparkled like precious stones of jasper and carnelian. A rainbow that looked like an emerald surrounded the throne.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ azã ekusiegbu nabha shu dalɛ asɛ yaspa nɛ̀ sardis aklagbu dadalɛ ana. Enegèɛ gɛ azã asɛ ɛklagbu gɛitse ana kana ekusiegbuɔ shu ɔfala nɔ.

english_verse: Twenty-four other thrones were in a circle around that throne. And on each of these thrones there was an elder dressed in white clothes and wearing a gold crown.
translation_verse: Bukusiugbu afɛtaabha nɛ̀ tɔlɛ bhlatɔ tuli tsyɛ zɛ kana kalɛ, kɛlɛ banɔ sheshè afɛtaabha nɛ̀ talɛ gɛ akpɛ akpɛkpɛ fufu pɛ bekumũ sikã ekusiekutuɔ nɛ alɛ atakpuɔ zã bɔlɛ abha.

english_verse: Flashes of lightning and roars of thunder came out from the throne in the center of the circle. Seven torches, which are the seven spirits of God, were burning in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Denɔ ekusiegbuɔ mɛɛ, subhaɛfu ezeboele, ɛkɛlɛ ozogũ kɛlɛ subha azalɛ́ɛ. Efu tegegene azatã nɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà. Alɛ enu Owusoso Akaa yɛfɔfuĩa tigegeneɛ.

english_verse: Also in front of the throne was something that looked like a glass sea, clear as crystal. Around the throne in the center were four living creatures covered front and back with eyes.
translation_verse: Nɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbàa, kɛdɔ̃ tili tsyɛ lɛ ɔmɔ asɛ aƒu gɛ edzi asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ dadalɛ teli idi, gɛ yɛmɛ adalɛ eli lĩalĩalĩa. Nɛ kɛmamɛ gɛ ekusiegbuɔ azãa, bagã talɛ azã gɛ beyi awuhũ nɛ otugbà nɛ̀ kedeɛ.

english_verse: The first creature was like a lion, the second one was like a bull, the third one had the face of a human, and the fourth was like a flying eagle.
translation_verse: Agã gɛ eputɔ azã asɛ dzyata, abhalà eyi nɛtsyɔɛnye, atramɛ namɛ eyi anɔdzyrame ayɛ, kɛlɛ alɛlɛmɛ asɛ odì gɛ opruɖu ana.

english_verse: Each of the four living creatures had six wings, and their bodies were covered with eyes. Day and night they never stopped singing, “Holy, holy, holy is the Lord, the all-powerful God, who was and is and is coming!”
translation_verse: Bɔsɛ tuxlo zã bagã talɛ alɛ aka nyia aka shu, kɛlɛ awuhũ gelee azã balɛishu ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ bɔsɛ niesi tsyɛ. Kɛlɛ kibe nyiɛ be bazaɖɔ asɛ, “Tɛdadalɛ, tɛdadalɛ, tɛdadalɛ yɛenu Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumieleteɛ, gɛ atɛzã eɖi, pɛ alɛ, pɛ azabàbaa.”

english_verse: The living creatures kept praising, honoring, and thanking the one who sits on the throne and who lives forever and ever.
translation_verse: Kibe nyiɛ be gɛ bagã alɛ alɔkɔ ishu dadalɛɛ, kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ahɔɛ huhu akɔ anunɔ gɛ alɛ ekusiegbu nabha pɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔɔ,

english_verse: “Our Lord and God, you are worthy to receive glory, honor, and power. You created all things, and by your decision they are and were created.”
translation_verse: “Bɔlɔ Apalete nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa, wɔ kɛshɔnɔ ɔsɛ, tɛ ɔyɛkɛ tɛdadalɛ, tɛ kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ ohumi ɔmɔsɛ wɔbhɛtɛ kanɔ mɛɔdɔ̃ nyɔ̃ɔ, kɛlɛ gana wɔ tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ babhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka kɛlɛ wɔkɔ ɔsɛ bɔlɛ.”

english_verse: In the right hand of the one sitting on the throne I saw a scroll that had writing on the inside and on the outside. And it was sealed in seven places.
translation_verse: Nɛ kɛlɛ niedeɛ, ɛmɔ anunɔ gɛ azã esi nɛ ekusiegbu nabha yɛevunɔ keplukpa nɛ yɛŋã ahɔɛ mɛ gɛ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ zã kalɛ ɛmɛ nɛ̀ kedeɛ nyɔ̃ɔ, kɛlɛ bedere alɛ amɔnɔ nɛ̀ badadã tegegene.

english_verse: I saw a mighty angel ask with a loud voice, “Who is worthy to open the scroll and break its seals?”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gagalĩ teli gɛ akpɛ ɛlɛ amana nɛ ozĩ asɛ, “Afana gɛ ashɔnɔ asɛ tɛ ayɛɛ badadã alɛ tɛ adalɛ eplukpaa dza?”

english_verse: No one in heaven or on earth or under the earth was able to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Pɔ anɔ nanà ama ititíɛ alo kesiakpa nabha alo kesiakpa niesi gɛ abalà adalɛ eplukpa mɛ pɛ abalà eɖi alɛ mɛ ete tsyɛ.

english_verse: I cried hard because no one was found worthy to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Ibi yoyo popopo ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ mɔ anɔ nanà pɛ ashɔnɔ asɛ tɛ adalɛ eplukpa alo tɛ eɖi alɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Then one of the elders said to me, “Stop crying and look! The one who is called both the ‘Lion from the Tribe of Judah’ and ‘King David's Great Descendant’ has won the victory. He will open the scroll and its seven seals.”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ anɔ sheshèɛ tenikpo etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tɛ obi yoyo! Ɖio, Dzyata gɛede Yuda igbogboɔ mɛ pɛ enu David yɛeshui nɔɔ, aŋã abha. Yɛabalà eplukpa adalɛ nɛ̀ badadã tegegeneɛ.”

english_verse: Then I looked and saw a Lamb standing in the center of the throne surrounded by the four living creatures and the elders. The Lamb looked as if it had once been killed. It had seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven spirits of God, sent out to all the earth.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛzɛmɔ obhoshieyi, gɛ ɔmɔ asɛ bebhui ɔlɛ, pɛ loli bagã talɛ nɛ̀ banɔ sheshèɛ gɛ ebu kɛma akpɛ ekusiegbuɔ nɛishi. Asha tegegene nɛ̀ awuhũ tegegene lɔkpɛ. Gɛenu Owusoso Akaa Ɛfɔfuĩa tigegeneɛ gɛ akpɛ asɛsɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ peteɛ.

english_verse: The Lamb went over and took the scroll from the right hand of the one who sat on the throne.
translation_verse: Aba kɛlɛ abayɛkɛ eplukpa edenɔ anunɔ gɛ azã ekusiegbu nɛ ŋãmɛ ahɔɛ.

english_verse: Then they sang a new song, “You are worthy to receive the scroll and open its seals, because you were killed. And with your own blood you bought for God people from every tribe, language, nation, and race.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ bazhã ɔdzɛ vɔvɔ asɛ, “Wonu anunɔ gɛ ɔshɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ bɔlɔkɔ eplukpa kɔ tɛ ɔdalɛ kalɛ adadã, Ɔmɔsɛ wɔ bebhui, kɛlɛ wɔdzyosu nɔ, wɔlɔkɔ odzi banunɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa odenɔ egbogboɔ nyɔ̃ɔ mɛ, beluhũ, banɔdzyrameeyi nɛ̀ ɛmadi.

english_verse: You let them become kings and serve God as priests, and they will rule on earth.”
translation_verse: Ɔbhɛtɛ alɛ sɛ tɛ bedzi ekusiupã nɛ̀ banɔlũazazã sɛ tɛ badɛ axɔ̃ɛ akɔ ɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa, kɛlɛ babàŋã ukusi nɛ esiakpa nabha.”

english_verse: As I looked, I heard the voices of a large number of angels around the throne and the voices of the living creatures and of the elders. There were millions and millions of them,
translation_verse: Gɛ iɖi pɛ ilũ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ ihotu, ihotu gelee ozĩ kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ alɛ ihotu lɔfɔ edi lɔfɔ. Bebu kɛma akana ekusiegbuɔ, bagã nɛ̀ banɔ sheshèɛ.

english_verse: and they were saying in a loud voice, “The Lamb who was killed is worthy to receive power, riches, wisdom, strength, honor, glory, and praise.”
translation_verse: Bazazhã ɔdzɛ nɛ̀ ozĩ asɛ, “Obhoshieyiɛ gɛ beyiɛ, ɔlɛ ɔshɔnɔ ɔsɛ, tɛ lɔyɛkɛ ohumi, ehoeyiudɔ̃, bùbuti, nɛ̀ bupu kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití, tɛdadalɛ nɛ̀ same kpɛkpɛ!”

english_verse: Then I heard all beings in heaven and on the earth and under the earth and in the sea offer praise. Together, all of them were saying, “Praise, honor, glory, and strength forever and ever to the one who sits on the throne and to the Lamb!”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ilũ idɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ ka nyia ka nɛitití nɛ̀ esiakpa, kesiakpa niesi nɛ̀ aƒu nabha, nɛ̀ kɛka nyia ka gɛlɛ alɛ mɛɛ bazazhã ɔdzɛ asɛ, “Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ edzi ekusiegbu nabha nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití, tɛdadalɛ, ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ohumi, odenɔ tihɔ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ!”

english_verse: The four living creatures said “Amen,” while the elders knelt down and worshiped.
translation_verse: bagã talɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Amen,” kɛlɛ banɔ sheshè akpɛ bamɛ esi pɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Akaa.

english_verse: At the same time I saw the Lamb open the first of the seven seals, I heard one of the four living creatures shout with a voice like thunder. It said, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Gɛ ilu awɔ̃ pɛ iɖiɛ, ɛmɔ Obhoshieyiɛ gɛ ɔzadalɛ badadã tegegeneɛ gɛeputɔ. Kɛlɛ ilũ bagã talɛ ɔmayɛmɛ tenikpo gɛ azaɖɔ kaɖɔ ɔmɔ asɛ subha gɛ alɛ́ɛ asɛ, “Ba!”

english_verse: Then I saw a white horse. Its rider carried a bow and was given a crown. He had already won some victories, and he went out to win more.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ tɛ mɛiɖiɛ, ɔmɔ ɛsɔ fufu teli nɛ mɛotugbà. Bɔnyɔ̃ zã anunɔ gɛ azã yɛabha ahɔɛ kɛlɛ bakɔɛ ekusikutu tili. Kɛlɛ ekoeyì nɛ̀ ɛsɔ nɔ asɛ kabha ŋaŋãelete gɛ avɛ adɛŋã abha nɛ keyutu ana.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Gɛ Obhoshieyiɛ adalɛ adadã bhalàa, ilũ gɛ agã bhalà aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!”

english_verse: Then another horse came out. It was fiery red. And its rider was given the power to take away all peace from the earth, so people would slaughter one another. He was also given a big sword.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛsɔ bhlatɔ ekoeyì aba, gɛ adzã hanyã. Bakɔ anunɔ gɛ etsiɖi yɛabha ohumi asɛ tɛ ebu ishu yɔyɔ nɛ kesiakpa nabha tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ banɔ bezeyí bagɔlɔ. Kliso balɔkɔ bɛtɛ̀ hohoe teli akpɛ yɛahɔɛ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, “Come out!” Then I saw a black horse, and its rider had a balance scale in one hand.
translation_verse: Gɛ Obhoshieyiɛ adalɛ adadã tramɛɛ, ilũ gɛ agã tramɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!” kɛlɛ gɛ iɖiɛ, ɛmɔ ɛsɔ tutũ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛazã yɛabha anyana buyintse tɔɔbha gɛ badɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɔ̀ evunɔ nɛ ahɔɛ mɛ

english_verse: I heard what sounded like a voice from somewhere among the four living creatures. It said, “A liter of wheat will cost you a whole day's wages! Three liters of barley will cost you a day's wages too. But don't ruin the olive oil or the wine.”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ izilũ ozĩ toli gɛ ɔmɔ asɛ bagã talɛɛ nɛishi loyi odenɔ pɛ baɖɔ asɛ, “Agɔ̃lɛ bɔna kayintse tienikpo tɛdɛdɛ ayɛkɛ kiwui zɛzɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɛbhɛ, kɛlɛ nikpèe bɔna buyintse tɔɔta bɔyɛkɛ kiwui zɛzɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɛbhɛ gɛinu sikã ɛhoeyi tinikpo. Kɛlɛ notizĩ bɔbɔ́ nɛ̀ wain!”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Gɛ Obhoshieyiɛ adalɛ adadã lɛlɛ̃mɛɛ, ilũ kaɖɔ odenɔ agã lɛlɛ̃mɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ, “Ba!”

english_verse: Then I saw a pale green horse. Its rider was named Death, and Death's Kingdom followed close behind. They were given power over one fourth of the earth, and they could kill its people with swords, famines, diseases, and wild animals.
translation_verse: Gɛ iɖiɛ ɛmɔ ɛsɔ teli gɛ azã pɔlɔ̃ɔ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ azã yɛabha nɛinye nu Butsí, kɛlɛ bekpuɔ azã yɛede aba kpakpa mii. Bakɔ alɛ ohumi nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ kalɛ awɔ̃pɛ lɛlɛ̃mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ balɔkɔ bɛtɛ̀, bɔbhɛ, banyã kpa nɛ̀ bagãhoeɛ nɛ kesiakpa nabhaa, tɛ beyí banunɔ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of everyone who had been killed for speaking God's message and telling about their faith.
translation_verse: Gɛ adalɛ adadã trimiɛ, ɛmɔ bagɛ beyí nɛ Owusoso Akaa ibui nɛtakpu, nɛ̀ bagɛ anyana yɛibui dadalɛ mɛ evunɔ, balɛ atɔwuiɛ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha niesi.

english_verse: They shouted, “Master, you are holy and faithful! How long will it be before you judge and punish the people of this earth who killed us?”
translation_verse: Bakpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ pɛ bebisi asɛ, “Apalete Ekusi Dadalɛ nɛ̀ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔelete, kibe ɖuwoelu wobòkulu ebhu nɛ̀ kesiakpa abhaeleteɛ pɛ obobisi ulɔ dzyosu nɔ gɛ babàlɛ nɛibui ɔkɔ ɔlɔɔ dza?”

english_verse: Then each of those who had been killed was given a white robe and told to rest for a little while. They had to wait until the complete number of the Lord's other servants and followers would be killed.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ balɔkɔ akpɛkpɛ dzlolo fufu akɔ balɛ mɛ anɔ nyia anɔ, kɛlɛ betseɖe alɛ asɛ, bewlui adɔfɔ̃ kɛbɔɛ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ beyí balɛ ɔhagbo baxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ̀ balɛ adzya alɛ gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ asɛ bebèyíɛ ebeke.

english_verse: When I saw the Lamb open the sixth seal, I looked and saw a great earthquake. The sun turned as dark as sackcloth, and the moon became red as blood.
translation_verse: Izilu awɔ̃ ɖi gɛ adalɛ adadã hlomiɛ. Kesiakpa eshuku gagalĩ. Kiwiɛ tsyina nɔ tututũ ɔmɔ asɛ ɔkpɛtɛ gɛ balɔkɔ epidzya tutũ tɛkã ɛpɔtɛ akamɛ ɔlɛ nɔ ana. Kɛlɛ woele nɔ pɔ etsyina adzã ɔmɔ asɛ dzyosu ana,

english_verse: The stars in the sky fell to earth, just like figs shaken loose by a windstorm.
translation_verse: kɛlɛ awɔ̃ɛ awɔlɛ ede ititíɛ abadɔ nɛ esiakpa asɛ kɛzã gɛ kɛzã onupɛ kɛlɛ́ gagalĩ fu pɛ kamɔtɔ̃síyuyu awɔlɛ̀ ana.

english_verse: Then the sky was rolled up like a scroll, and all mountains and islands were moved from their places.
translation_verse: Kititíɛ yalá ku kɛlɛ́ nɔ mɛ ɔmɔ asɛ kɛkã gɛ bakã eplukpa ewunɔ itití ana, kɛlɛ butu nɛ̀ kelĩ mɛ etukpɔ ka nyia ka agazã alɛ ɔzãkɔ.

english_verse: The kings of the earth, its famous people, and its military leaders hid in caves or behind rocks on the mountains. They hid there together with the rich and the powerful and with all the slaves and free people.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ kesiakpa abha ekusi, bekusieyi, keyuta agbagbla, ehoeyielete, ohumielete, banɔ dzidzi nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ alɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ nyɔ̃ɔ bebè kpũ ishu nɛ izĩ nɛ̀ aklagbuɔ galɛ butu shuɔ nɛishi.

english_verse: Then they shouted to the mountains and the rocks, “Fall on us! Hide us from the one who sits on the throne and from the anger of the Lamb.
translation_verse: Bekulu etseɖe betuɔ nɛ̀ aklagbuɔ asɛ, “Nɔwɔlɛ ɔdɔ ɔlɔ abha, tɛ nokpũ ɔlɔ sɛ tɛ anunɔ gɛ edzi ekusiegbu nabha atɛmɔ ɔlɔ tɛ Obhoshieyiɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔtɛba ɔlɔ abha!

english_verse: That terrible day has come! God and the Lamb will show their anger, and who can face it?”
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ balɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpa ɛkpɛbe iwuiɛ na, kɛlɛ wɔafana gɛ ɔbɔlàzã ɔlɛ ulũ?”

english_verse: from Benjamin. People from Every Nation
translation_verse: ) gɛ bebu edenɔ Israelanɛ egbogboɔ pete mɛ.

english_verse: “Don't harm the earth or the sea or any tree! Wait until I have marked the foreheads of the servants of our God.”
translation_verse: “Notɛ ozĩ esiakpa alo aƒuɔ alo besiɛ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ bedere adadã nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛutukpe nɔ.”

english_verse: Then I heard how many people had been marked on the forehead. There were
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ilũ banɔ tɛkakalà mɛ nɔnɔ́ gɛ betũ inye nɛ alɛ abha gɛenu banɔ ihotu kɛkpã zɛzɛ̀ nɛ̀ afɛtalɛ nɛ̀ talɛ (

english_verse: and said, “Amen! Praise, glory, wisdom, thanks, honor, power, and strength belong to our God forever and ever! Amen!”
translation_verse: baɖɔ asɛ, “Amen! Kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ ishu dadalɛ bubuiti, ahɔɛ huhú nɛ̀inye tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛitití ohumi nɛ̀ bupu onu bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛ denɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Amen!”

english_verse: After this, I saw a large crowd with more people than could be counted. They were from every race, tribe, nation, and language, and they stood before the throne and before the Lamb. They wore white robes and held palm branches in their hands,
translation_verse: Nɛ kɛlɛ niedeɛ ɛmɔ banɔɛza kpekpè tili gɛ anɔ nanà atɛ balà akalà nɛ mɛotugbà, bede ɛmadi ka nyia ka, egbogbo, banɔ edi edi nɛ̀ beluhũ ka nyia ka mɛ, pɛ balɔ itití nɛ ekusiegbuɔ nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ otugbà. Bakpɛ akpɛkpɛ dzlolo frɛrɛ, pɛ bevunɔ trɛwɔ̃a nɛ balɛ ahɔɛ mɛ.

english_verse: as they shouted, “Our God, who sits upon the throne, has the power to save his people, and so does the Lamb.”
translation_verse: Bakpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ asɛ, “Tibubu de bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, anunɔ gɛedzi ekusiegbu nabha, nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ.”

english_verse: The angels who stood around the throne knelt in front of it with their faces to the ground. The elders and the four living creatures knelt there with them. Then they all worshiped God
translation_verse: Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ pete alɔɛtití akana ekusiegbuɔ, banɔ sheshèɛ nɛ̀ bagã talɛɛ. Bakpɛ amɛ esi nɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà kɛlɛ bazakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ Owusoso Akaa,

english_verse: One of the elders asked me, “Do you know who these people are that are dressed in white robes? Do you know where they come from?”
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ banɔ sheshèɛ mɛ anɔ tenikpo ebisi mɛasɛ, “Banɔ alɛ gɛ bakpɛ akpɛkpɛ fufu dzlolo alɛ pɔ, fakɔ anɛ benu kɛlɛ fakɔ bedeɛ dza?”

english_verse: “Sir,” I answered, “you must know.” Then he told me: “These are the ones who have gone through the great suffering. They have washed their robes in the blood of the Lamb and have made them white.
translation_verse: Ibuiliulũ asɛ, “Apalete, wonyi.” Kɛlɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Balɛ enu banunɔ gɛ bagã ekoeyì nɛ bɔtɔ gagalĩɛ mɛ, pɛ beplu balɛ akpɛkpɛ dzloloɔ, pɛ babhɛtɛ alɛ befuli frɛrɛrɛ nɛ Obhoshieyiɛ dzyosu nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: And so they stand before the throne of God and worship him in his temple day and night. The one who sits on the throne will spread his tent over them.
translation_verse: Kliso pɛ, balɛ Owusoso Akaa ekusiegbuɔ otugbà pɛ badɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ nɛ yɛuvũɔ mɛ kemuze nɛ̀ elishi, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ edzi ekusiegbu nabha ebefe yɛpɔtɛ agba nɛ balɛ abha.

english_verse: They will never hunger or thirst again, and they won't be troubled by the sun or any scorching heat.
translation_verse: Bɔbhɛ zaayi alɛ oɖi, oluwɔ̃ɛ ozoyi alɛ oɖi. Kiwi zɛbanye tã alɛ, kɛlɛ kɛkpɛkpɛ nanà tsyɛ zakpɛ alɛ ɔtɔ.

english_verse: “The Lamb in the center of the throne will be their shepherd. He will lead them to streams of life-giving water, and God will wipe all tears from their eyes.”
translation_verse: Ɔmɔsɛ Obhoshieyiɛ gɛ ɔlɛ ekusiegbu nabha nɛ kɛma nɛishiɛ, ɔlɛ obodzi balɛ agbagbana, abagbana alɛ avɛnɔ ɛkpã ulĩ gɛ ikoeyi ɔmɔ asɛ Kahɔɛ ana shu. Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa ebetsuru ɛwɔ̃mɛ ka nyia ka nɛ balɛ amɛ.”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.
translation_verse: Gɛ adalɛ adadã gegenemiɛ, kitití udɔ̃ mɛ nyɔ̃ɔ tatɔ̃ klananá ɔvɛnɔ asɛ ɔɖa tatá tonikpo egulũ ana.

english_verse: I noticed that the seven angels who stood before God were each given a trumpet.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegene gɛ balɔɛtití nɛ Owusoso Akaa otugbà kɛlɛ bakɔ alɛ buxoele tugegene.

english_verse: Another angel, who had a gold container for incense, came and stood at the altar. This one was given a lot of incense to offer with the prayers of God's people on the gold altar in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ gɛ evunɔ sikã ilifi itsikpi nɔ tsyɛ aba, pɛ alɔɛtití nɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha shu. Bakɔɛ ilifi gelee sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ aplɛnɔ banɔ dadalɛ balɛ Akaa tikukulu, atɔɖɔ sikãosubha gɛ ɔlɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà nabha.

english_verse: Then the smoke of the incense, together with the prayers of God's people, went up to God from the hand of the angel.
translation_verse: Kilifi ɔnyɔ̃, nɛ̀ banɔ dadalɛ Akaa tikukuluɔ wu ɔvɛ Owusoso Akaa otugbà gana axɔ̃ɛdɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ.

english_verse: After this, the angel filled the incense container with fire from the altar and threw it on the earth. Thunder roared, lightning flashed, and the earth shook. The Trumpets
