translation_verse: Ɛgɛmɔ Owusoso Akaavũ nanà nɛ ɔmamɛ, Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumieleteɛ nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ balɛ enu Owusoso Akaavũɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ.

english_verse: And the city did not need the sun or the moon. The glory of God was shining on it, and the Lamb was its light.
translation_verse: Kiwi nɛ̀ woele etienye nɛ ɔma mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛdadalɛ yɛakɔ ɔsɛ ɔlɛ mɛ ɔdalɛ, kɛlɛ Obhoshieyiɛ yɛenu ɔlɛ kifuɔ.

english_verse: Nations will walk by the light of that city, and kings will bring their riches there.
translation_verse: Yɛtɛdadalɛ mɛ ɛmadiɛ abàgã, kɛlɛ kesiakpa abha ekusiɛ abalɔkɔ alɛ tɛpɔpɔɖiɛ mana ɔlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Its gates are always open during the day, and night never comes.
translation_verse: Batɛ badã ɔma ɔlɛ budulũɔ eɖi, ɔmɔsɛ elishi nanà atɛ bazã ɛkɛlɛ.

english_verse: The glorious treasures of nations will be brought into the city.
translation_verse: Ɛmadiɛ abalɔkɔ balɛishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití amana ɔma ɔlɛ mɛ.

english_verse: But nothing unworthy will be allowed to enter. No one who is dirty-minded or who tells lies will be there. Only those whose names are written in the Lamb's book of life will be in the city.
translation_verse: Kɛdɔ̃ gɛ ɛlɛ shu gɛdalɛ nanà tɛbaku ɔma ɔlɛ mɛ ɖi, alo bagɛ babhɛtɛ awuĩ ebui alo asɛnɛ elete atɛ bazã ɔlɛ mɛ. Pɔ bagɛ alɛ enye bafɔnɔ akpɛ Obhoshieyiɛ ɛkpã eplukpa mɛ ete ko balɛ abazã ɛkɛlɛ.

english_verse: The angel showed me a river that was crystal clear, and its waters gave life. The river came from the throne where God and the Lamb were seated.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ akasɛ mɛ kelĩkekpuɔ gɛ kalɛ mɛ ulĩ kɔ ɛkpãa. Bulĩɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔmɔ asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ ana, kɛlɛ bɔkpɛ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ ekusiegbuɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Then it flowed down the middle of the city's main street. On each side of the river are trees that grow a different kind of fruit each month of the year. The fruit gives life, and the leaves are used as medicine to heal the nations.
translation_verse: Bɔkpɛ gã ɔma ɔlɛ tipɔ hohoe nɛishi tɛbha. Nɛ kelĩkekpuɔ ogbogbò ka nyia kaa, ɔbɔmɔ busiɛ gɛ akɔ ɛkpã tonikpo. Gɛ eyu eyuyu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha tɔɖɔ nɛ woele ka nyia ka mɛ. Kɛlɛ busiɛ awɔlakpa enu bɔwa akɔ ɛmadiɛ.

english_verse: God's curse will no longer be on the people of that city. He and the Lamb will be seated there on their thrones, and its people will worship God
translation_verse: Kibui ɖɔɖɔ kpɛ anɔ nanà zaazã. Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ ekusiegbuɔ abazã ɔma mɛ kɛlɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ abaadɛ axɔ̃ɛ akɔɛ.

english_verse: and will see him face to face. God's name will be written on the foreheads of the people.
translation_verse: Baba mɔ yɛamɛ kɛlɛ yɛinye bazã balɛ utukpe nɔ.

english_verse: Never again will night appear, and no one who lives there will ever need a lamp or the sun. The Lord God will be their light, and they will rule forever. The Coming of Christ
translation_verse: Elishi azaazã. Ananà azapɛ kifu gɛkɔ tɛdadalɛ alo kiwi nyenye, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛabakɔ alɛ tɛdadalɛ. Kɛlɛ babà ŋã bukusi ɔvɛnɔ tihɔ, tihɔ.

english_verse: Then I was told: These words are true and can be trusted. The Lord God controls the spirits of his prophets, and he is the one who sent his angel to show his servants what must happen very soon.
translation_verse: Axɔ̃ɛdɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Ebui alɛ, lalɛ alɛ ɔzãkɔ kɛlɛ lɛenu ebui igbã. Apalete, Owusoso Akaa gɛenu ɛfɔfuĩa ɔkɔ ebuiɖɔluanɛ, yɛasɛsɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ asɛ tɛ akasɛ bagɛ adɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ ababà alɛ mɛ gulũi nɔ.” Yesu Aaba

english_verse: Remember, I am coming soon! God will bless everyone who pays attention to the message of this book.
translation_verse: “Noɖio ɛɛba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ! Beyulà anunɔ gɛ anyana ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ evunɔ.”

english_verse: My name is John, and I am the one who heard and saw these things. Then after I had heard and seen all this, I knelt down and began to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown it to me.
translation_verse: Mɛ, Yohanes, mɛinu anunɔ gɛ ilũ pɛ ɛmɔ ebui alɛ. Kɛlɛ gɛ ilũ pɛ ɛmɔ alɛɛ, izhi kumu sɛ tɛ mɛkpɛ ɛtakpu esi nɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ ezebu ebui alɛ akasɛ mɛ otugbà.

english_verse: But the angel said, Don't do that! I am a servant, just like you. I am the same as a follower or a prophet or anyone else who obeys what is written in this book. God is the one you should worship.
translation_verse: Pɔ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tɛbhɛtɛ ana! Wɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛdɛ ete mɛinu ɔplɛni wɔ nɛ̀ wɔadzya alɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ anyana ebuiɛ nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ evunɔ. Kpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ete!”

english_verse: Don't keep the prophecies in this book a secret. These things will happen soon.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tidere ɔdɔ̃ nɛ ebui alɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ ulũ, ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ tso ba.

english_verse: Evil people will keep on being evil, and everyone who is dirty-minded will still be dirty-minded. But good people will keep on doing right, and God's people will always be holy.
translation_verse: Nɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpa azã yɛebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha, anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ atsɔ̃buiɛ, tɛ azã alɛ abha tɛ azabhɛtɛ, nɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui gbangbã, tɛ azã alɛ abha tɛ azabhɛtɛ ebui gbangbã, kɛlɛ nɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ enu anɔ dadalɛ tsyɛ azã yɛ tɛdadalɛ nabha.”

english_verse: Then I was told: I am coming soon! And when I come, I will reward everyone for what they have done.
translation_verse: “Noɖio, ɛɛba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ! Ivũnɔ kɛbhɛ gɛ ɛbabuia nɔ, kɛlɛ ɛbakɔ anɔ ka nyia ka nɛ kɛbhɛtɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ nulũ.

english_verse: I am Alpha and Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.
translation_verse: Mɛinu anɔ Gɛeputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ, Agɛ alɛ Otugba nɛ̀ agɛ yɛalɛ Kedeɛ, Kesikpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Ɔtɔ̃kɔ.

english_verse: God will bless all who have washed their robes. They will each have the right to eat fruit from the tree that gives life, and they can enter the gates of the city.
translation_verse: Beyulà banunɔ gɛ beplu balɛ akpɛkpɛ dzloloɔ, sɛ tɛ bakɔ alɛ idzo nɛ busiɛ gɛ akɔ ɛkpãa shu, kɛlɛ tɛ bamɔ idzo agã afala nɛ budulũɔ tɛ betsoku ɔma mɛ.

english_verse: But outside the city will be dogs, witches, immoral people, murderers, idol worshipers, and everyone who loves to tell lies and do wrong.
translation_verse: Bagɛ babàwɔ kevudeɛ, balɛ enu beebu, behuinɛ, bagɛ baaŋã agɔlɔ, bagɛ beyi anɔ, ibudielete nɛ̀ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ adɛmɛ asɛnɛ sɛsɛ ebui pɛ asɛɔsɛ.

english_verse: I am Jesus! And I am the one who sent my angel to tell all of you these things for the churches. I am David's Great Descendant, and I am also the bright morning star.
translation_verse: Mɛinu Yesuɔ, gɛ ɛkpɛ mɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ sɛ tɛ adalɛ ebui alɛ shu akɔ wɔ tɛ odi tseɖe bahameɛ. Mɛinu David yɛogu nɛ̀ Yɛeshui nɔ, nɛ̀ Kɛvɔlɔ Ɛwɔ̃ɛ gɛ kɔ tɛdadalɛɛ.”

english_verse: The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” Everyone who hears this should say, “Come!” If you are thirsty, come! If you want life-giving water, come and take it. It's free!
translation_verse: Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ nɛ̀ anyɛedziniɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!” Anunɔ gɛ elũɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!” Anunɔ gɛ oluwɔ̃ɛ oyi yɛɛ, nɔkɔ yɛaba, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ apɛɛ nɔ, nɔkɔ yɛabawɔ̃ɛ bulĩɛ gɛkɔ ɛkpã faa, kɛbhɛ mabuia, mabuia.

english_verse: Here is my warning for everyone who hears the prophecies in this book: If you add anything to them, God will make you suffer all the terrible troubles written in this book.
translation_verse: Itseɖe nɔ nɛ̀ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ elũ ebui alɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ asɛ, onupɛ anɔ teli alɔkɔ kibui tili aplɛnɔ alɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa abalɔkɔ bɔtɔ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛɛ, aplɛnɔ akɔɛ.

english_verse: If you take anything away from these prophecies, God will not let you have part in the life-giving tree and in the holy city described in this book.
translation_verse: Kɛlɛ onupɛ anɔ teli ebu ebui teli tsyɛ eyinɔ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ abayɛkɛ anɔ alɛ yɛɔŋãkɔ gɛ ɔlɛ busiɛ gɛ akɔ ɛkpãa nɛ̀ ɔma dadalɛ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛɛ, nɛ yɛahɔɛ.

english_verse: The one who has spoken these things says, “I am coming soon!” So, Lord Jesus, please come soon!
translation_verse: Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ ebui alɛ shuɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ee, ɛɛba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ.” Amen, Apalete Yesu ba.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Apalete Yesu tibhui bhuibu zã ɔplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ oo. Amen.
